title: When Roles Fail: Epistemic Constraints on Advocate Role Fidelity in LLM-Based Political Statement Analysis
summary: Democratic discourse analysis systems increasingly rely on multi-agent LLM pipelines in which distinct evaluator models are assigned adversarial roles to generate structured, multi-perspective assessments of political statements. A core assumption is that models will reliably maintain their assigned roles. This paper provides the first systematic empirical test of that assumption using the TRUST pipeline. We develop an epistemic stance classifier that identifies advocate roles from reasoning text without relying on surface vocabulary, and measure role fidelity across 60 political statements (30 English, 30 German) using four metrics: Role Drift Index (RDI), Expected Drift Distance (EDD), Directional Drift Index (DDI), and Entropy-based Role Stability (ERS). We identify two failure modes - the Epistemic Floor Effect (fact-check results create an absolute lower bound below which the legitimizing role cannot be maintained) and Role-Prior Conflict (training-time knowledge overrides role instructions for factually unambiguous statements) - as manifestations of a single mechanism: Epistemic Role Override (ERO). Model choice significantly affects role fidelity: Mistral Large outperforms Claude Sonnet by 28pp (67% vs. 39%) and exhibits a qualitatively different failure mode - role abandonment without polarity reversal - compared to Claude's active switch to the opposing stance. Role fidelity is language-robust. Fact-check provider choice is not universally neutral: Perplexity significantly reduces Claude's role fidelity on German statements (Delta = -15pp, p = 0.007) while leaving Mistral unaffected. These findings have direct implications for multi-agent LLM validation: a system validated without role fidelity measurement may systematically misrepresent the epistemic diversity it was designed to provide.

AI.tldr: 首次系统验证多角色LLM管道中模型是否可靠维持分配角色的实证研究，引入角色漂移指数等指标，识别两种失败模式并提出统一的认识论角色override机制
AI.motivation: 多主体LLM管道假设模型能可靠维持分配的角色，但这一核心假设从未被系统检验过
AI.method: 开发认识论立场分类器，使用四个指标(RDI/EDD/DDI/ERS)在60条政治声明(30英/30德)上测量角色保真度
AI.result: Mistral Large角色保真度(67%)显著高于Claude Sonnet(39%)，识别出认识论地板效应和角色-先验冲突两种失败模式，语言robust，事实核查提供商选择对不同模型影响不同
AI.conclusion: 需在多主体LLM验证中加入角色保真度测量，否则系统可能系统性误报其设计的认知多样性

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM role fidelity analysis in political statement processing - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. It focuses on NLP/LLM methods for analyzing political statements, not visual feature extraction, video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or diffusion-based motion generation. The application domain (NLP/political analysis) has no connection to computer graphics, text-to-motion, or any of the specified pain points. This is fundamentally different field entirely.

title: Automated Detection of Mutual Gaze and Joint Attention in Dual-Camera Settings via Dual-Stream Transformers
summary: Analyzing mutual gaze (MG) and joint attention (JA) is critical in developmental psychology but traditionally relies on labor-intensive manual coding. Automating this process in multi-camera laboratory settings is computationally challenging due to complex cross-camera relational dynamics. In this paper, we propose a highly efficient dual-stream Transformer architecture for detecting MG and JA from synchronized dual-camera recordings. Our approach leverages frozen gaze-aware backbones (GazeLLE) to extract rich visual priors, combined with a custom token fusion mechanism to map the spatial and semantic relationships between interacting dyads. Evaluated on an ecologically valid dataset of caregiver-infant interactions, our model exhibits good performance, significantly outperforming both a convolutional baseline and a state-of-the-art multimodal Large Language Model (LLM). By open-sourcing our model and pre-trained weights, we provide behavioral scientists with a scalable tool that can be fine-tuned to diverse laboratory environments, effectively bridging the gap between computational modeling and applied interaction research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流Transformer架构，用于从双摄像头 recordings 中自动检测相互凝视（MG）和联合注意（JA），旨在解决传统人工编码方法效率低下的问题。
AI.motivation: 在发展心理学中，分析MG和JA至关重要，但传统人工编码方法 labor-intensive且效率低下。在多摄像头实验室环境中实现自动化检测面临复杂的跨摄像头关系动态计算挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种高效的雙流Transformer架构，利用冻结合凝视感知的backbone（GazeLLE）提取丰富的视觉先验，结合自定义token fusion机制来映射交互双方之间的空间和语义关系。
AI.result: 在生态有效的照顾者-婴儿交互数据集上评估，模型表现良好，显著优于卷积基线和state-of-the-art多模态大型语言模型（LLM）。
AI.conclusion: 通过开源模型和预训练权重，为行为科学家提供了一种可扩展的工具，可针对不同实验室环境进行微调，有效弥合计算建模与应用交互研究之间的差距。

relevance_reason: Application domain completely different. This paper is about automated detection of mutual gaze and joint attention in developmental psychology (computer vision for behavioral analysis), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text). The methods, goals, and application areas are entirely unrelated. Using gaze detection (GazeLLE) is not equivalent to visual feature extraction for motion generation. This is a fundamental field mismatch, not just a method difference.

title: Reconstruction by Generation: 3D Multi-Object Scene Reconstruction from Sparse Observations
summary: Accurately reconstructing complex full multi-object scenes from sparse observations remains a core challenge in computer vision and a key step toward scalable and reliable simulation for robotics. In this work, we introduce RecGen, a generative framework for probabilistic joint estimation of object and part shapes, as well as their pose under occlusion and partial visibility from one or multiple RGB-D images. By leveraging compositional synthetic scene generation and strong 3D shape priors, RecGen generalizes across diverse object types and real-world environments. RecGen achieves state-of-the-art performance on complex, heavily occluded datasets, robustly handling severe occlusions, symmetric objects, object parts, and intricate geometry and texture. Despite using nearly 80% fewer training meshes than the previous state of the art SAM3D, RecGen outperforms it by 30.1% in geometric shape quality, 9.1% in texture reconstruction, and 33.9% in pose estimation.

AI.tldr: RecGen是一个用于从单张或多张RGB-D图像中联合估计物体和部件形状及姿态的生成式框架，通过组合合成场景生成和强3D形状先验，在复杂严重遮挡的数据集上实现先进性能，同时使用比SAM3D少近80%的训练网格。
AI.motivation: 准确从稀疏观测重建复杂的多目标场景仍然是计算机视觉的核心挑战，也是实现机器人大规模可靠仿真的关键一步。
AI.method: RecGen利用组合合成场景生成和强3D形状先验，能够泛化到不同物体类型和真实世界环境。
AI.result: 在复杂严重遮挡的数据集上实现最先进的性能，鲁棒地处理严重遮挡、对称物体、物体部件和复杂几何纹理。相比SAM3D，在几何形状质量上提高30.1%，纹理重建提高9.1%，姿态估计提高33.9%，且使用近80%更少的训练网格。
AI.conclusion: RecGen在多目标场景重建方面展现出显著优势，特别是在处理遮挡和部分可见性方面表现出色，是一个有前景的生成式框架。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D multi-object scene reconstruction from RGB-D images, which is fundamentally different from Text-to-Motion generation. While the research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from visual/text inputs with emphasis on temporal consistency and motion smoothness, this paper deals with static 3D shape reconstruction of objects and scenes. The application domains are completely different: scene/object reconstruction vs. human motion generation. The methods also differ - this uses compositional scene generation with 3D shape priors for reconstruction, not diffusion-based motion synthesis for temporal motion data. Even though both involve 3D, the goal and data nature are entirely distinct (static geometry vs. temporal motion).

title: Language Models Refine Mechanical Linkage Designs Through Symbolic Reflection and Modular Optimisation
summary: Designing mechanical linkages involves combinatorial topology selection and continuous parameter fitting. We show that language models can systematically improve linkage designs through symbolic representations. Language model agents explore discrete topologies while numerical optimisers fit continuous parameters. A symbolic lifting operator translates simulator trajectories into qualitative descriptors, motion labels, temporal predicates, and structural diagnostics that models interpret across iterative design cycles. Across six engineering-relevant motion targets and three open-source models (Llama 3.3 70B, Qwen3 4B, Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B), the modular architecture reduces geometric error by up to 68% and improves structural validity by up to 134% over monolithic baselines. Critically, 78.6% of iterative refinement trajectories show measurable improvement, with the system correctly diagnosing overconstraint (56.3%) and underconstraint (35.6%) failure modes and proposing grounded corrections. Models across all three families acquire interpretable mechanical reasoning strategies without fine-tuning, demonstrating that principled symbolic abstraction bridges generative AI and the numerical precision required for engineering design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语言模型和数值优化的模块化机械连杆设计系统，通过符号 lifting 算子将模拟器轨迹转换为定性描述符，使语言模型能够迭代改进连杆设计，在6个工程目标下将几何误差降低高达68%，结构有效性提升134%。
AI.motivation: 机械连杆设计涉及组合拓扑选择和连续参数拟合，但现有方法难以在离散拓扑搜索与连续参数优化之间建立有效桥梁，设计过程中的过约束和欠约束故障难以被诊断和修正。
AI.method: 提出模块化架构：语言模型智能体探索离散拓扑，数值优化器拟合连续参数。核心创新是符号 lifting 算子，将模拟器轨迹转换为定性描述符、运动标签、时间谓词和结构诊断信息，使模型能够跨迭代设计周期进行解释和推理。实验采用6个工程相关运动目标和3个开源模型（Llama 3.3 70B、Qwen3 4B、Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B）。
AI.result: 模块化架构将几何误差降低高达68%，结构有效性提升高达134%。78.6%的迭代 refinement 轨迹显示可测量改进，系统正确诊断过约束（56.3%）和欠约束（35.6%）故障模式并提出有效修正。三个模型家族都展示了无需微调的可解释机械推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 原则性符号抽象架起了生成AI与工程设计所需数值精度之间的桥梁，证明符号 lifting 是一种有效的技术路径，能够让语言模型在，无需微调的情况下获得机械推理能力。

relevance_reason: The paper is about mechanical engineering design (designing mechanical linkages for physical robotic systems) using LLMs and numerical optimization. This is completely outside the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion domain. While both deal with "motion," they are in fundamentally different application areas: CG text-to-motion is about generating virtual human motion for characters/avatars from text/video, whereas this paper designs physical mechanical linkages/robots. The methods are also completely different - this uses LLM reasoning and symbolic operators, not video generation models, VLMs, visual feature extraction, or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: When Your LLM Reaches End-of-Life: A Framework for Confident Model Migration in Production Systems
summary: We present a framework for migrating production Large Language Model (LLM) based systems when the underlying model reaches end-of-life or requires replacement. The key contribution is a Bayesian statistical approach that calibrates automated evaluation metrics against human judgments, enabling confident model comparison even with limited manual evaluation data. We demonstrate this framework on a commercial question-answering system serving 5.3M monthly interactions across six global regions; evaluating correctness, refusal behavior, and stylistic adherence to successfully identify suitable replacement models. The framework is broadly applicable to any enterprise deploying LLM-based products, providing a principled, reproducible methodology for model migration that balances quality assurance with evaluation efficiency. This is a capability increasingly essential as the LLM ecosystem continues to evolve rapidly and organizations manage portfolios of AI-powered services across multiple models, regions, and use cases.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个企业级LLM模型迁移框架，使用贝叶斯统计方法校准自动评估指标与人类判断，实现有限人工评估数据下的 confident 模型比较。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯统计方法，将自动评估指标（正确性、拒绝行为、风格 adherence）与人类判断进行校准和对比，通过置信区间量化不确定性。
AI.result: 在商业问答系统（5.3M月活，六大区域）上验证，成功识别出合适的替换模型，涵盖正确性、拒绝行为和风格合规三个维度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为企业部署LLM产品提供了一种原则性、可复现的模型迁移方法论，在质量保证与评估效率之间取得平衡，具有广泛适用性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM model migration in production systems using Bayesian statistics - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different: it's about LLM deployment/MLOps, not about video generation, visual feature extraction, or 3D motion synthesis. There is no overlap with the specified methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance) or application domain (text-to-motion in computer graphics).

title: InterPartAbility: Text-Guided Part Matching for Interpretable Person Re-Identification
summary: Text-to-image person re-identification (TI-ReID) relies on natural-language text description to retrieve top matching individuals from a large gallery of images. While recent large vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong retrieval performance, their decisions remain largely uninterpretable. Existing interpretability approaches in TI-ReID rely solely on slot-attention to highlight attended regions, but fail to reliably bind visual regions to semantically meaningful concepts, limiting explanations to qualitative visualizations over a restricted vocabulary. This paper introduces InterPartAbility, an interpretable TI-ReID method that performs explicit part-wise matching and enables phrase-region grounding. A new open-vocabulary, lightweight supervision, patch-phrase interaction module (PPIM) is proposed to train a standard TI-ReID model with concept-level guidance. Concept-based part phrases provide evidence that encourages the model to attend to corresponding image regions. InterPartAbility further constrains CLIP ViT self-attention to produce spatially concentrated patch activations aligned with each part-level phrase, yielding grounded explanation maps. A quantitative interpretability protocol for TI-ReID is introduced by adapting perturbation-based evaluation metrics, including counterfactual region masking that measures retrieval degradation when top-ranked explanatory regions are removed. Empirical results\footnote{Our code is included in the supplementary materials and will be made public.} on challenging benchmarks like CUHK-PEDES and ICFG-PEDES show that InterPartAbility achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) interpretability performance under these metrics, while sustaining competitive retrieval accuracy.

AI.tldr: InterPartAbility提出一种可解释的文本到图像行人重识别方法，通过_patch-短语交互模块_实现概念级引导和部位-区域对齐，在CUHK-PEDES和ICFG-PEDES数据集上达到最先进的可解释性性能，同时保持有竞争力的检索准确率。
AI.motivation: TI-ReID (Text-to-image person re-identification) relies on natural language text to retrieve matching person images. While VLMs achieve strong retrieval performance, their decisions remain uninterpretable. Existing interpretability approaches use slot-attention but fail to bind visual regions to semantically meaningful concepts, limiting explanations to qualitative visualizations.
AI.method: Introduces InterPartAbility, an interpretable TI-ReID method with: 1) Patch-Phrase Interaction Module (PPIM) - open-vocabulary lightweight supervision for concept-level guidance using part phrases; 2) Constrains CLIP ViT self-attention to produce spatially concentrated patch activations aligned with part-level phrases; 3) Enables explicit part-wise matching and phrase-region grounding.
AI.result: InterPartAbility achieves SOTA interpretability performance on CUHK-PEDES and ICFG-PEDES benchmarks under quantitative metrics (counterfactual region masking), while sustaining competitive retrieval accuracy.
AI.conclusion: InterPartAbility successfully bridges interpretability and accuracy in TI-ReID through explicit part-wise matching and grounded explanation maps, representing a step toward more transparent vision-language retrieval systems.

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Text-to-Image Person Re-Identification (retrieving person images using text queries), which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion). The paper focuses on image retrieval for surveillance/security applications, not motion generation. There is no 3D motion synthesis, no temporal motion modeling, and no video-to-motion conversion involved. While it uses VLMs and visual-text alignment techniques, these are applied to a retrieval task rather than motion generation, making it entirely irrelevant to the Text-to-Motion research profile.

title: End-to-end autonomous scientific discovery on a real optical platform
summary: Scientific research has long been human-led, driving new knowledge and transformative technologies through the continual revision of questions, methods and claims as evidence accumulates. Although large language model (LLM)-based agents are beginning to move beyond assisting predefined research workflows, none has yet demonstrated end-to-end autonomous discovery in a real physical system that produces a nontrivial result supported by experimental evidence. Here we introduce Qiushi Discovery Engine, an LLM-based agentic system for end-to-end autonomous scientific discovery on a real optical platform. Qiushi Engine combines nonlinear research phases, Meta-Trace memory and a dual-layer architecture to maintain adaptive and stable research trajectories across long-horizon investigations involving thousands of LLM-mediated reasoning, measurement and revision actions. It autonomously reproduces a published transmission-matrix experiment on a non-original platform and converts an abstract coherence-order theory into experimental observables, providing, to our knowledge, the first observation of this class of coherence-order structure. More importantly, in an open-ended study involving 145.9 million tokens, 3,242 LLM calls, 1,242 tool calls, 163 research notes and 44 scripts, Qiushi Engine proposes and experimentally validates optical bilinear interaction, a physical mechanism structurally analogous to a core operation in Transformer attention. This AI-discovered mechanism suggests a route towards high-speed, energy-efficient optical hardware for pairwise computation. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of an AI agentic system autonomously identifying and experimentally validating a nontrivial, previously unreported physical mechanism, marking a milestone for research-level autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: QIUSHI发现引擎是一个基于LLM的智能体系统，用于在真实光学平台上进行端到端自主科学发现。该系统在非原创平台上复现了已发布的传输矩阵实验，首次观察到相干阶结构，并自主发现并实验验证了光学双线性相互作用机制——一种与Transformer注意力核心操作结构相似的物理机制，为高速节能光学计算硬件提供了新途径。这是首个AI智能体系统自主发现并验证新物理机制的演示。
AI.motivation: 解决现有LLM智能体无法在真实物理系统中实现端到端自主发现的问题。科学长期由人驱动，需要一种能够在实际光学平台上自主进行科学发现的LLM智能体系统。
AI.method: Qiushi Engine结合非线性研究阶段、Meta-Trace记忆和双层架构，在涉及数千次LLM介导的推理、测量和修正操作的长期研究中保持自适应和稳定的研究轨迹。使用145.9百万tokens、3,242次LLM调用、1,242次工具调用、163篇研究笔记和44个脚本。
AI.result: 1) 在非原创平台上自主复现已发布的传输矩阵实验；2) 将抽象的相干阶理论转化为实验观测值，首次观察到这类相干阶结构；3) 提出并实验验证了光学双线性相互作用，一种在结构上与Transformer注意力核心操作类似的物理机制。
AI.conclusion: 首次演示了AI智能体系统自主识别并实验验证非平凡的先前未报告的物理机制，标志着研究级自主智能体的里程碑。提出的光学双线性相互作用机制为高速、节能光学硬件的成对计算提供了可能的技术路线。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based agents for autonomous scientific discovery in optical physics experiments (reproducing transmission matrix experiments, observing coherent order structures). It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different - it's about optical physics research, not 3D motion generation from video. The methods used are LLM agents for scientific reasoning, not video generation models, vision-language models for visual feature extraction, or diffusion-based motion synthesis. None of the research profile's pain points (extracting visual guidance features from 2D video, quality assessment of AI-generated videos for motion prior, bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output, temporal consistency in 3D motion generation) are addressed.

title: Think it, Run it: Autonomous ML pipeline generation via self-healing multi-agent AI
summary: The purpose of our paper is to develop a unified multi-agent architecture that automates end-to-end machine learning (ML) pipeline generation from datasets and natural-language (NL) goals, improving efficiency, robustness and explainability. A five-agent system is proposed to handle profiling, intent parsing, microservice recommendation, Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) construction and execution. It integrates code-grounded Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for microservice understanding, an explainable hybrid recommender combining multiple criteria, a self-healing mechanism using Large Language Model (LLM)-based error interpretation and adaptive learning from execution history. The approach is evaluated on 150 ML tasks across diverse scenarios. The system achieves an 84.7% end-to-end pipeline success rate, outperforming baseline methods. It demonstrates improved robustness through self-healing and reduces workflow development time compared to manual construction. The study introduces a novel integration of code-grounded RAG, explainable recommendation, self-healing execution and adaptive learning within a single architecture, showing that tightly coupled intelligent components can outperform isolated solutions.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个统一的多智能体架构，用于自动化端到端机器学习管道生成。该系统包含五个智能体，分别负责分析、意图解析、微服务推荐、有向无环图（DAG）构建和执行，并集成了代码检索增强生成、可解释的混合推荐器、自愈机制和自适应学习功能。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习管道开发过程繁琐、耗时，需要手动构建且缺乏自动化和自愈能力，导致效率低下、鲁棒性不足和可解释性差。该研究旨在提高ML管道生成的效率、鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出一个五智能体系统，包括分析智能体、意图解析智能体、微服务推荐智能体、DAG构建智能体和执行智能体。系统集成了代码检索增强生成（RAG）用于理解微服务，采用可解释的混合推荐器结合多个标准，以及基于大语言模型的错误解释和自适应学习的自愈机制。
AI.result: 在150个多样化机器学习任务上进行评估，系统达到84.7%的端到端管道成功率，优于基线方法。通过自愈机制提高了鲁棒性，与手动构建相比显著缩短了工作流开发时间。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次将代码检索增强生成、可解释的推荐、自愈执行和自适应学习集成到单一架构中，证明了紧密耦合的智能组件可以优于孤立的解决方案，为自动化ML管道生成提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于ML管道自动化（MLOps）的多智能体系统，用于自动化机器学习工作流开发。而研究档案是关于计算机图形学中的Text-to-Motion（文本到3D人体运动生成），需要从视频/文本中提取视觉特征生成3D人体运动。两者的核心应用、方法、目标都完全不同，没有任何直接相关性。

title: Energy-Efficient Plant Monitoring via Knowledge Distillation
summary: Recent advances in large-scale visual representation learning have significantly improved performance in plant species and plant disease recognition tasks. However, state-of-the-art models, often based on high-capacity vision transformers or multimodal foundation models, remain computationally expensive and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained environments such as mobile or edge devices. This limitation hinders the scalability of automated biodiversity monitoring and precision agriculture systems, where efficiency is as critical as accuracy. In this work, we investigate knowledge distillation as an effective approach to transfer the representational capacity of large pretrained models into smaller, more efficient architectures. We focus on plant species and disease recognition, and conduct an extensive empirical study on two challenging benchmarks: Pl@ntNet300K-v2 and Deep-Plant-Disease. We evaluate four representative architectures, including two ConvNeXt models and two vision transformers, under multiple training regimes: from-scratch training and pretrained initialization, each with and without distillation. In total, we train and evaluate 70 models. Our results show that knowledge distillation consistently improves performance across tasks and architectures. Distilled models are able to match the performance of significantly larger models while maintaining substantially lower computational cost. These findings demonstrate the potential of knowledge distillation techniques to enable efficient and scalable deployment of plant recognition systems in real-world environmental applications.

AI.tldr: 研究知识蒸馏技术在大规模视觉表征学习中的应用，将大型预训练模型的知识迁移到轻量级模型，应用于植物物种和疾病识别任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模视觉表征学习提升了植物物种和疾病识别的性能，但先进模型（视觉Transformer或多模态基础模型）计算成本高，难以部署在资源受限的移动或边缘设备上，限制了自动化生物多样性监测和精准农业的可扩展性。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏方法，在Pl@ntNet300K-v2和Deep-Plant-Disease两个基准数据集上评估4种代表性架构（2个ConvNeXt模型和2个视觉Transformer），对比从头训练和预训练初始化两种设置，各设置下进行蒸馏与不蒸馏的对比，共训练评估70个模型。
AI.result: 知识蒸馏在各任务和架构上均一致提升性能，蒸馏后的轻量级模型能够匹配更大规模模型的性能，同时保持显著更低的计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏技术能够实现植物识别系统在真实环境应用中的高效和可扩展部署。

title: Unsupervised Electrofacies Classification and Porosity Characterization in the Offshore Keta Basin Using Wireline Logs
summary: This study presents an unsupervised machine learning workflow for electrofacies analysis in the offshore Keta Basin, Ghana, where core data are scarce. Six standard wireline logs from Well~C were analysed over a depth interval comprising approximately $11{,}195$ samples. K-means clustering was applied in multivariate log space, with the clustering structure evaluated using inertia and silhouette diagnostics. Four clusters were identified, supported by an average silhouette coefficient of approximately $0.50$, indicating moderate but meaningful separation. The resulting electrofacies exhibit systematic, depth-continuous patterns associated with variations in clay content, porosity, and rock framework properties, forming a geological continuum from shale-dominated to cleaner sandstone-dominated units. The results demonstrate that log-only, unsupervised clustering supported by quantitative metrics provides a robust and reproducible framework for subsurface characterisation. The proposed workflow offers a practical tool for early-stage formation evaluation in frontier offshore basins and a foundation for future integrated studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督机器学习工作流程，用于加纳近海Keta盆地的电相分析，在核数据稀缺的情况下，利用Well C的六条标准测井曲线进行K-means聚类，识别出四个具有中等分离度的聚类，建立了从泥岩主导到净砂岩主导的地质连续体。
AI.motivation: 在近海油气勘探的前沿盆地，钻井成本高昂导致岩心数据稀缺，传统的电相分析方法依赖于有限的岩心标定，亟需一种仅靠测井数据即可进行可靠储层表征的无监督方法。
AI.method: 使用六条标准测井曲线数据（约11,195个样本），在多变量测井空间中应用K-means聚类算法，通过惯性和轮廓系数诊断评估聚类结构，确定最优聚类数目。
AI.result: 识别出四个电相聚类，平均轮廓系数约为0.50，表明具有中等但有意义的分离度；电相呈现系统性、深度连续的分布模式，与黏土含量、孔隙度和岩石框架性质的变化相关，形成从泥岩主导到净砂岩主导的地质连续体。
AI.conclusion: 基于测井数据的无监督聚类方法结合定量指标可提供一种稳健、可重复的储层表征框架，非常适用于前沿近海盆地的早期地层评估，并为未来集成研究奠定基础。

title: HQ-UNet: A Hybrid Quantum-Classical U-Net with a Quantum Bottleneck for Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation in remote sensing is commonly addressed using classical deep learning architectures such as U-Net, which require a large number of parameters to model complex spatial relationships. Quantum machine learning (QML) provides an alternative representation paradigm by mapping classical features into quantum states, but its direct application to high-dimensional images remains challenging under near-term quantum hardware constraints. In this work, we propose HQ-UNet, a hybrid quantum-classical U-Net architecture that integrates a compact parameterized quantum circuit at the bottleneck of a classical U-Net. The proposed design uses a non-pooling quantum convolutional module to enrich highly compressed encoder features before decoding, while keeping the quantum component shallow and parameter-efficient. Experiments on the LandCover.ai dataset show that HQ-UNet achieves a mean IoU of 0.8050 and an overall accuracy of 94.76%, outperforming the classical U-Net baseline. These results suggest that compact quantum bottlenecks can enhance feature representation for remote sensing image segmentation under near-term quantum constraints. This highlights the potential of hybrid quantum-classical designs as a promising direction for parameter-efficient dense prediction in Earth observation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HQ-UNet混合量子-经典U-Net架构，通过在瓶颈层集成紧凑参数化量子电路实现遥感图像语义分割，在LandCover.ai数据集上取得0.8050平均IoU和94.76%准确率。
AI.motivation: Classical U-Net architectures require large number of parameters to model complex spatial relationships in remote sensing semantic segmentation, while quantum machine learning faces challenges when applied to high-dimensional images under near-term quantum hardware constraints.
AI.method: 提出HQ-UNet，一种混合量子-经典U-Net架构，在经典U-Net的瓶颈处集成紧凑的参数化量子电路，使用非池化量子卷积模块在解码前丰富高度压缩的编码器特征，同时保持量子组件浅层且参数高效。
AI.result: 在LandCover.ai数据集上的实验表明，HQ-UNet实现了0.8050的平均IoU和94.76%的总体准确率，优于 classical U-Net基线。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑的量子瓶颈可以增强近约束下遥感图像分割的特征表示，混合量子-经典设计是地球观测中参数高效密集预测的有前景方向。

title: Optimal Stop-Loss and Take-Profit Parameterization for Autonomous Trading Agent Swarm
summary: Autonomous crypto trading systems often spend most of their design effort on finding entries, while exits are left to fixed rules that are rarely tested in a systematic way. This paper examines whether better stop-loss and take-profit settings can improve the performance of an autonomous trading agent swarm. Using more than 900 historical trades, we replay each trade under many alternative exit policies and compare results against the existing production setup. The study finds that exit design matters meaningfully: stronger configurations improve risk-adjusted performance and generally favor tighter loss limits, earlier profit capture, and closer trailing protection. The paper also discusses a key evaluation challenge: a purely chronological split was initially used, but the newest trades fell into an unusual war-driven market period that sharply distorted test results. To reduce the influence of that single episode, the main comparison was run on randomized data, with the drawbacks of doing so acknowledged explicitly. Overall, the paper presents a practical framework for tuning exit logic in a more disciplined and transparent way.

AI.tldr: 本文研究自动加密货币交易系统中止损和止盈策略的优化问题。研究分析了900多笔历史交易在不同退出策略下的表现，发现更严格的损失限制、更早的利润获取和更紧密的跟踪保护能够改善风险调整后的绩效。
AI.motivation: 自动加密货币交易系统通常将大部分设计精力放在寻找入场时机上，而退出策略往往采用固定规则，缺乏系统性的测试和优化。
AI.method: 使用900多笔历史交易数据，对每笔交易应用多种替代退出策略进行回测，并与现有生产设置进行比较。初始使用时间顺序分割，但受战争驱动的市场时期影响产生扭曲，因此改用随机化数据进行主要比较。
AI.result: 研究发现退出策略设计确实重要：更强的配置能够改善风险调整后的绩效，且更倾向于支持更严格的损失限制、更早的利润获取和更紧密的跟踪保护。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一个更规范和透明的退出逻辑调整实用框架。

title: VTBench: A Multimodal Framework for Time-Series Classification with Chart-Based Representations
summary: Time-series classification (TSC) has advanced significantly with deep learning, yet most models rely solely on raw numerical inputs, overlooking alternative representations. While texture-based encodings such as Gramian Angular Fields (GAF) and Recurrence Plots (RP) convert time series into 2D images, they often require heavy preprocessing and yield less intuitive representations. In contrast, chart-based visualizations offer more interpretable alternatives and show promise in specific domains; however, their effectiveness remains underexplored, with limited systematic evaluation across chart types, visual encoding choices, and datasets. In this work, we introduce VTBench, a systematic and extensible framework that re-examines TSC through multimodal fusion of raw sequences and chart-based visualizations. VTBench generates lightweight, human-interpretable plots -- line, area, bar, and scatter, providing complementary views of the same signal. We develop a modular architecture supporting multiple fusion strategies, including single-chart visual-numerical fusion, multi-chart visual fusion, and full multimodal fusion with raw inputs. Through experiments across 31 UCR datasets, we show that: (1) chart-only models are competitive in selected settings, particularly on smaller datasets; (2) combining multiple chart types can improve accuracy by capturing complementary visual cues; and (3) multimodal models improve or maintain performance when visual features provide non-redundant information, but may degrade accuracy when they introduce redundancy. We further distill practical guidelines for selecting chart types, fusion strategies, and configurations. VTBench establishes a unified foundation for interpretable and effective multimodal time-series classification.

AI.tldr: VTBench是一个用于时间序列分类的多模态融合框架，通过将原始序列与图表可视化(线图、面积图、条形图、散点图)结合，在31个UCR数据集上展示了图表方法的有效性，特别是在小数据集上。框架支持多种融合策略，并为实际应用提供了选择指南。
AI.motivation: 时间序列分类(TSC)虽已借助深度学习取得显著进展，但现有模型仅依赖原始数值输入，忽视了其他表示方式。传统的纹理编码方法(如GAF、RP)虽能将时间序列转换为2D图像，但需要繁重预处理且表示不够直观。图表可视化虽更具可解释性，但有效性尚未得到系统评估。
AI.method: 提出VTBench框架，通过多模态融合原始序列与图表可视化(线图、面积图、条形图、散点图)进行TSC。开发了模块化架构支持多种融合策略：单图表视觉-数值融合、多图表视觉融合以及完整多模态融合。
AI.result: 在31个UCR数据集上的实验表明：(1)图表单独模型在小数据集上具有竞争力；(2)多图表类型组合可通过捕捉互补视觉线索提升准确率；(3)多模态模型在视觉特征提供非冗余信息时可改善或维持性能，但引入冗余时可能降低准确率。
AI.conclusion: VTBench为可解释且有效的多模态时间序列分类建立了统一基础，并提供了图表类型、融合策略和配置选择的实践指南。

title: Step-level Optimization for Efficient Computer-use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents provide a promising path toward general software automation because they can interact directly with arbitrary graphical user interfaces instead of relying on brittle, application-specific integrations. Despite recent advances in benchmark performance, strong computer-use agents remain expensive and slow in practice, since most systems invoke large multimodal models at nearly every interaction step. We argue that this uniform allocation of compute is fundamentally inefficient for long-horizon GUI tasks. Such trajectories are highly heterogeneous: many steps are routine and can be handled reliably by smaller, cheaper policies, while errors tend to concentrate at a relatively small number of high-risk moments. Across computer-use benchmarks, these failures repeatedly take two forms: progress stalls, where the agent loops, repeats ineffective actions, or fails to make meaningful progress, and silent semantic drift, where the agent continues taking locally plausible actions after already deviating from the user's true goal. To address this inefficiency, we propose an event-driven, step-level cascade for computer-use agents that runs a small policy by default and escalates to a stronger model only when lightweight learned monitors detect elevated risk. Our framework combines two complementary signals: a Stuck Monitor that detects degraded progress from recent reasoning-action history and triggers recovery, and a Milestone Monitor that identifies semantically meaningful checkpoints where sparse verification is most informative for catching drift. This design turns always-on frontier-model inference into adaptive, on-demand compute allocation over the course of an evolving interaction. The framework is modular and deployment-oriented: it can be layered on top of existing computer-use agents without changing the underlying agent architecture or retraining the large model.

AI.tldr: 提出一种事件驱动的级联框架，使计算机使用智能体能够自适应分配计算资源：默认运行小型策略，仅在检测到高风险时才升级到更强的模型
AI.motivation: 当前计算机使用智能体在每个交互步骤都调用大型多模态模型，导致成本高且速度慢。然而，长程GUI任务轨迹是异质的：多数步骤是常规的可由小型策略处理，错误集中发生在少数高风险时刻。现有均匀分配计算的方式效率低下
AI.method: 设计事件驱动的步级级联框架，默认运行小型便宜策略，仅当轻量级学习监控器检测到 elevated risk时升级到强模型。框架包含两个互补信号：1) Stuck Monitor从近期推理-动作历史检测进展退化并触发恢复；2) Milestone Monitor识别语义有意义的检查点，用于捕获漂移
AI.result: 该设计将持续的前沿模型推理转变为交互过程中自适应按需计算分配。框架模块化且面向部署，可叠加在现有智能体上无需改变底层架构或重新训练大模型
AI.conclusion: 通过监控器检测风险并动态调度计算资源，在保持任务完成能力的同时显著降低计算成本和时间，为构建高效实用的计算机使用智能体提供了新范式

No shared methods or applications - this is about agent resource allocation, not motion synthesis.

title: Student Classroom Behavior Recognition Based on Improved YOLOv8s
summary: In classroom teaching, student behavior can reflect their learning state and classroom participation, which is of great significance for teaching quality analysis. To address the problems of dense student targets, numerous small objects, frequent occlusions, and imbalanced class distribution in real classroom scenes, this paper proposes an improved student classroom behavior recognition model named ALC-YOLOv8s based on YOLOv8s. The model introduces SPPF-LSKA to enhance contextual feature extraction, employs CFC-CRB and SFC-G2 to optimize multi-scale feature fusion, and incorporates ATFLoss to improve the learning ability for minority classes and hard samples. Experimental results show that compared with the baseline model, the improved model achieves increases of 1.8% in mAP50 and 2.1% in mAP50-95. Compared with several mainstream detection methods, the proposed model can well meet the requirements of automatic student behavior recognition in complex classroom scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于YOLOv8s改进的学生课堂行为识别模型ALC-YOLOv8s，用于解决教室场景中目标密集、小目标众多、频繁遮挡和类别分布不均等难题。
AI.motivation: 课堂教学中学生行为反映了学习状态和课堂参与度，对教学质量分析具有重要意义。然而真实教室场景中存在目标密集、小目标多、频繁遮挡和类别分布不均等难题，需要一种高效的行为识别方法。
AI.method: 引入SPPF-LSKA增强上下文特征提取；采用CFC-CRB和SFC-G2优化多尺度特征融合；引入ATFLoss提升对少数类和困难样本的学习能力。
AI.result: 相比基线模型，改进后的模型在mAP50上提升1.8%，在mAP50-95上提升2.1%。与主流检测方法相比，该模型能较好满足复杂教室场景下学生行为自动识别需求。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的ALC-YOLOv8s模型能够有效应对课堂场景中的密集目标、小目标、遮挡和类别不平衡问题，为教室场景下的学生行为自动识别提供了可行方案。

The application domain is educational computer vision for classroom monitoring, not 3D motion generation from visual/text inputs. It uses YOLO object detection, which has no relevance to diffusion-based motion synthesis, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), or VLMs. The paper doesn't address any of the pain points (visual feature extraction for motion, quality assessment, 2D-to-3D domain gap, temporal consistency in motion generation). This is a different field entirely - YOLO for classroom behavior detection vs. text-to-motion generation in computer graphics.

title: Interval Orders, Biorders and Credibility-limited Belief Revision
summary: Rational belief revision is commonly viewed as being based on a preference order between possible worlds, with the resulting new belief set being those sentences true in all the most preferred models of the incoming new information. Usually, such a preference order is taken to be a total preorder. Nevertheless, there are other, more general classes of ordering that can also be employed. In this paper, we explore two such classes that have been studied within the theory of rational choice but have seen limited or no application in belief revision. We begin with interval orders, introduced by Fishburn in the '80s, which associate with each possible world a nonnegative `interval' of plausibility. We then move on to biorders, studied by Aleskerov, Bouyssou, and Monjardet, which generalise interval orders by allowing the intervals to have negative lengths, a feature that can be used to capture a notion of dissonance or instability. We provide axiomatic characterisations of these two resulting families of belief revision operators, as well as of two further families of interest that lie between interval orders and biorders. We show that while biorder-based revisions satisfy the Success postulate, they do not always yield consistent outputs. By modifying their definition to discard inputs that lead to inconsistency as `incredible', we derive new families of so-called non-prioritised revision that satisfy the Consistency postulate, but not the Success one. These families are linked to credibility-limited revision operators of Hansson et al., but for which the set of credible sentences does not satisfy the single-sentence closure condition. We argue that the biorder-based approach is well-suited for scenarios where an agent might initially reject new information, but may accept it when presented with additional explanation.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了基于区间序和双序两类偏好顺序的信念修正算子，扩展了传统的全预序方法，并提供了公理化特征刻画。
AI.motivation: 传统信念修正基于全预序，但更一般的偏好顺序类尚未在信念修正中得到充分研究，作者引入区间序和双序方法来丰富信念修正理论。
AI.method: 使用 Fishburn 的区间序和 Aleskerov 等人的双序，为两类偏好顺序提供公理化特征刻画，并分析其一致性等性质。
AI.result: 双序修正满足成功性但不一定一致，通过修改定义得到满足一致性但不满足成功性的非优先修正族。
AI.conclusion: 双序方法适用于需要初始拒绝新信息、但提供额外解释后可接受的场景。

relevance_reason: This paper is about belief revision theory in mathematical logic/philosophy (interval orders, biorders, preference orderings), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, video generation, or motion synthesis. The application domain is entirely different - this is logic/AI philosophy not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: YOSE: You Only Select Essential Tokens for Efficient DiT-based Video Object Removal
summary: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based video generation technologies have shown impressive results for video object removal. However, these methods still suffer from substantial inference latency. For instance, although MiniMax Remover achieves state-of-the-art visual quality, it operates at only around 10FPS, primarily due to dense computations over the entire spatiotemporal token space, even when only a small masked region actually requires processing. In this paper, we present YOSE, You Only Select Essential Tokens, an efficient fine-tuning framework. YOSE introduces two key components: Batch Variable-length Indexing (BVI) and Diffusion Process Simulator (DiffSim) Module. BVI is a differentiable dynamic indexing operator that adaptively selects essential tokens based on mask information, enabling variable-length token processing across samples. DiffSim provides a diffusion process approximation mechanism for unmasked tokens, which simulates the influence of unmasked regions within DiT self-attention to maintain semantic consistency for masked tokens. With these designs, YOSE achieves mask-aware acceleration, where the inference time scales approximately linearly with the masked regions, in contrast to full-token diffusion methods whose computation remains constant regardless of the mask size. Extensive experiments demonstrate that YOSE achieves up to 2.5X speedup in 70% of cases while maintaining visual quality comparable to the baseline. Code is available at: https://github.com/Wucy0519/YOSE-CVPR26.

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOSE框架，通过Batch Variable-length Indexing (BVI)和Diffusion Process Simulator (DiffSim)模块实现视频对象移除的高效推理加速，在保持与基线相当视觉质量的同时，实现高达2.5倍的推理速度提升。
AI.motivation: 现有DiT视频生成方法在视频对象移除任务中推理延迟严重，例如MiniMax Remover虽能实现最优视觉质量但仅能达到约10FPS，这是因为即使只需要处理小的掩码区域，仍需要对整个时空token空间进行密集计算。
AI.method: 提出两种关键组件：1) BVI - 可微分的动态索引操作符，根据掩码信息自适应选择必要token，实现样本间的可变长度token处理；2) DiffSim - 为unmasked token提供扩散过程近似机制，在DiT自注意力中模拟unmasked区域的影响以保持masked token的语义一致性。
AI.result: YOSE实现mask感知的加速，推理时间与掩码区域大小近似线性相关，而全token扩散方法的计算量与掩码大小无关。实验表明在70%的情况下可实现高达2.5倍的加速，同时保持与基线相当的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的YOSE框架通过选择性token处理和扩散过程模拟，有效解决了DiT视频对象移除中的高推理延迟问题，在效率和视觉质量之间取得了良好的平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on video object removal (video editing/inpainting) using DiT-based diffusion models, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation from visual/text guidance). While both use diffusion models, the paper addresses 2D video manipulation rather than bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output. The pain points are also different - this paper targets inference acceleration for video editing, not motion quality, temporal consistency in motion generation, or visual guidance feature extraction for motion synthesis. Therefore, it only shares methodological similarity (diffusion models) but fails to address any of the research profile's specific pain points or application domains.

title: Toward Personalized Digital Twins for Cognitive Decline Assessment: A Multimodal, Uncertainty-Aware Framework
summary: Cognitive decline is highly heterogeneous across individuals, which complicates prognosis, trial design, and treatment planning. We present the Personalized Cognitive Decline Assessment Digital Twin (PCD-DT), a multimodal and uncertainty-aware framework for modeling patient-specific disease trajectories from sparse, noisy, and irregular longitudinal data. The framework combines three methodological components: (1) latent state-space models for individualized temporal dynamics, (2) multimodal fusion for clinical, biomarker, and imaging features, and (3) uncertainty-aware validation and adaptive updating for robust digital twin operation. We also outline how conditional generative models can support data augmentation and stress testing for underrepresented progression patterns. As a preliminary feasibility study, we analyze longitudinal TADPOLE trajectories and show clear separation between cognitively normal and Alzheimer's disease cohorts in ADAS13, ventricle volume, and hippocampal volume over five years. We further conduct a multimodal next-visit prediction ablation using an LSTM sequence model on 3{,}003 visit-pair sequences derived from TADPOLE, where the combined cognitive plus MRI configuration achieves the lowest standardized RMSE for both ADAS13 (0.4419) and ventricle volume (0.5842), outperforming a Last Observation Carried Forward baseline. A Bayesian tensor modeling component for high-dimensional imaging fusion is also discussed. These results support the feasibility of the proposed architecture while also highlighting the need for stronger uncertainty calibration and longer-horizon predictive evaluation. The PCD-DT framework provides a principled starting point for personalized in silico modeling in neurodegenerative disease. This work positions PCD-DT as a foundational step toward clinically deployable, uncertainty-aware digital twin systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PCD-DT框架，利用潜在状态空间模型、多模态融合和不确定性感知方法建模阿尔茨海默病患者的个性化疾病进展轨迹。在TADPOLE数据集上验证了认知+MRI联合配置可实现更准确的下一访视预测，但仍需改进不确定性校准。
AI.motivation: 认知衰退在个体间存在高度异质性，这使得预后预测、试验设计和治疗计划变得复杂。需要一种能够处理稀疏、噪声和不规则纵向数据的个性化建模框架。
AI.method: 提出PCD-DT框架，包含三个方法学组件：(1)潜在状态空间模型用于个体化时间动态建模；(2)多模态融合整合临床、生物标志物和影像特征；(3)不确定性感知的验证和自适应更新。使用条件生成模型支持数据增强和压力测试。
AI.result: 在TADPOLE纵向轨迹分析中，正常组和AD组在ADAS13、脑室体积和海马体体积上呈现明显分离。多模态下一访视预测 ablation实验中，LSTM序列模型在3,003个访视-配对序列上，认知+MRI联合配置在ADAS13上达到最低标准化RMSE(0.4419)，脑室体积RMSE(0.5842)，均优于LOCF基线。
AI.conclusion: 支持所提架构的可行性，同时强调需要更强的不确定性校准和更长预测范围的评估。PCD-DT框架为神经退行性疾病个性化计算建模提供了原则性起点，是向临床可部署的不确定性感知数字 twin 系统迈进的基础性步骤。

relevance_reason: The paper is about medical AI/healthcare - specifically Alzheimer's disease progression modeling using latent state-space models and multimodal fusion for cognitive decline prediction. This is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The application is about disease progression in healthcare/medical fields, not about motion generation, visual feature extraction for video-to-3D motion, or any of the text-to-motion tasks in the research profile. The methods and goals are entirely different - this is medical prediction/personalized digital twins, not computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: JI-ADF: Joint-Individual Learning with Adaptive Decision Fusion for Multimodal Skin Lesion Classification
summary: Skin lesion classification is essential for early dermatological diagnosis, yet many existing computer-aided systems rely primarily on dermoscopic images and underutilize the multimodal evidence routinely available in clinical practice. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{JI-ADF}, a trimodal deep learning framework that integrates dermoscopic images, clinical photographs, and structured patient metadata for clinically grounded skin lesion classification. The proposed architecture combines joint multimodal representation learning with modality-specific auxiliary supervision and an adaptive decision fusion mechanism that dynamically calibrates modality contributions on a per-sample basis. To enhance cross-modal reasoning while preserving modality-specific evidence, we further introduce a multimodal fusion attention (MMFA) module. We evaluate JI-ADF on the large-scale MILK10k benchmark, which reflects real-world clinical acquisition conditions and severe class imbalance. The proposed method demonstrates strong and well-balanced performance across lesion categories, improving sensitivity and Dice score while maintaining high specificity and good calibration. Extensive analyses, including modality ablation, calibration evaluation, and Grad-CAM visualization, further confirm the robustness and clinically meaningful behavior of the model. These results indicate that JI-ADF provides a reliable and practical foundation for multimodal skin lesion classification in real-world clinical settings.

AI.tldr: JI-ADF是一个三模态深度学习框架，整合 dermoscopic 图像、临床照片和结构化患者元数据，用于皮肤病变分类。该框架结合多模态表示学习、辅助监督和自适应决策融合机制，在 MILK10k 数据集上展示出良好的性能和稳健性。
AI.motivation: 现有皮肤病变计算机辅助诊断系统主要依赖 dermoscopic 图像，未充分利用临床实践中常规可用的多模态证据（临床照片和患者元数据）。临床上实际拥有这些多模态数据但未被充分利用。
AI.method: 提出 JI-ADF 框架，包含：1) Joint multimodal representation learning（联合多模态表示学习）2) Modality-specific auxiliary supervision（模态特定辅助监督）3) Adaptive decision fusion mechanism（自适应决策融合机制，动态校准每个样本的模态贡献）4) Multimodal fusion attention (MMFA) module（多模态融合注意力模块，增强跨模态推理同时保留模态特定证据）
AI.result: 在 MILK10k 大规模基准数据集上进行评估，该数据集反映真实临床采集条件和严重类别不平衡问题。提出的方法在 lesion 类别上展示出强大且均衡的性能，提高了灵敏度和 Dice 分数，同时保持了高特异性和良好的校准性。消融实验、校准评估和 Grad-CAM 可视化进一步证实了模型的稳健性和临床有意义的行为。
AI.conclusion: JI-ADF 为真实临床环境中的多模态皮肤病变分类提供了可靠且实用的基础，表明整合临床照片和患者元数据等额外模态信息可以提升分类性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image classification (skin lesion classification using dermoscopic images and patient metadata) in the healthcare/biomedical domain. It has no relevance to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. The application domains are completely different - medical diagnosis vs human motion synthesis. Even though the paper uses multimodal learning and deep learning, this is entirely unrelated to the user's research on bridging 2D video to 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: CasLayout: Cascaded 3D Layout Diffusion for Indoor Scene Synthesis with Implicit Relation Modeling
summary: Synthesizing realistic 3D indoor scenes remains challenging due to data scarcity and the difficulty of simultaneously enforcing global architectural constraints and local semantic consistency. Existing approaches often overlook structural boundaries or rely on fully connected relation graphs that introduce redundant generation errors. Inspired by human design cognition, we present CasLayout, a cascaded diffusion framework that decomposes the joint scene generation task into four conditional sub-stages with explicit physical and semantic roles: (1) predicting furniture quantity and categories, (2) refining object sizes and feature embeddings, (3) modeling spatial relationships in a latent space, and (4) generating Oriented Bounding Boxes (OBBs). This decoupled architecture reduces data requirements and enables flexible integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) for zero-shot tasks such as image-to-scene generation. To maintain physical validity within complex floor plans, we explicitly model building elements (e.g., walls, doors, and windows) as conditional constraints. Furthermore, to address the high entropy of dense relation graphs, we introduce a sparse relation graph formulation aligned with human spatial descriptions. By encoding these sparse graphs into a compact latent space using a bidirectional Variational Autoencoder (VAE), the proposed framework provides enhanced relational controllability, allowing generated layouts to better respect functional organization. Experiments demonstrate that CasLayout achieves state-of-the-art performance in fidelity and diversity while enabling improved controllability in practical applications.

AI.tldr: CasLayout是一种级联扩散框架,将三维室内场景生成分解为四个条件子阶段:预测家具数量和类别、细化对象大小和特征嵌入、在潜在空间中建模空间关系、生成定向边界框。该框架通过解耦架构减少数据需求,并能灵活集成大语言模型和视觉语言模型实现零样本任务。
AI.motivation: 现有三维室内场景合成方法面临数据稀缺难题,同时难以同时保证全局建筑约束和局部语义一致性。现有方法往往忽略结构边界或依赖全连接关系图导致冗余生成错误。人类设计认知启发研究者提出级联扩散框架。
AI.method: 提出四阶段级联条件生成框架:(1)预测家具数量和类别;(2)细化对象大小和特征嵌入;(3)在潜在空间中建模空间关系;(4)生成定向边界框。采用稀疏关系图 formulation对齐人类空间描述,并使用双向变分自编码器将稀疏图编码到紧凑潜在空间。同时将建筑元素(墙、门、窗)建模为条件约束以保持物理有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明CasLayout在保真度和多样性方面达到最先进性能,同时在实际应用中提供增强的关系可控制性,生成的布局更好地尊重功能组织。
AI.conclusion: CasLayout通过解耦架构减少数据需求,实现与大型语言模型和视觉语言模型的灵活集成,为零样本任务如图像到场景生成提供可能性。该方法在三维室内场景生成领域展现了创新性和实用性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D indoor scene layout synthesis (furniture arrangement), NOT text-to-motion generation. While it uses diffusion models, the application domain is completely different - it's about generating scene layouts rather than human motion. This is a different sub-field in computer graphics, similar to how robot motion is different from human motion.

title: Hyperspectral Image Classification via Efficient Global Spectral Supertoken Clustering
comment: Accepted by ISPRS JPRS 2026. This manuscript version is made available under the CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0 license
summary: Hyperspectral image classification demands spatially coherent predictions and precise boundary delineation. Yet prevailing superpixel-based methods face an inherent contradiction: clustering aggregates similar pixels into regions, but the subsequent classifier operates pixel-wise, undermining regional consistency. Consequently, existing approaches do not guarantee region-level, boundary-aligned classification. To address this limitation, we propose the Dual-stage Spectrum-Constrained Clustering-based Classifier (DSCC), an end-to-end framework that explicitly decouples clustering from classification by first grouping spectral similar and spatially proximate pixels into spectral supertokens and then performing token-level prediction. At its core, DSCC computes an image-level multi-criteria feature distance between pixels and centers, followed by a locality-aware assignment regularization, enabling the generation of boundary-preserving spectral supertokens. A density-isolation based center selection further yields representative, well-separated centers, reducing redundancy and improving robustness to scale variation. To accommodate mixed land-cover compositions within each token, we introduce a soft-label scheme that encodes class proportions and improves robustness for mixed-class tokens. DSCC attains a CF1 of 0.728 at 197.75 FPS on the WHU-OHS dataset, offering a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off compared with state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments further validate the effectiveness and generality of the proposed dual-stage paradigm for hyperspectral image classification. The source code is available at https://github.com/laprf/DSCC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的双阶段频谱约束聚类分类器(DSCC),通过将聚类与分类解耦来解决高光谱图像分类中区域一致性问题。核心创新包括:1)将相似光谱和空间相近的像素分组为"频谱超级令牌"后进行令牌级预测;2)多准则特征距离和局部性感知分配正则化生成边界保持的频谱超级令牌;3)基于密度-隔离的中心选择提高代表性;4)软标签方案处理混合土地覆盖。实验在WHU-OHS数据集上达到CF1=0.728,处理速度197.75 FPS。
AI.motivation: 现有基于超像素的高光谱图像分类方法存在固有矛盾:聚类将相似像素聚合为区域,但后续分类器仍逐像素操作,破坏了区域一致性,无法保证区域级、边界对齐的分类精度。
AI.method: 提出双阶段频谱约束聚类分类器(DSCC):1)计算图像级多准则特征距离进行像素与中心的聚类;2)引入局部性感知分配正则化生成边界保持的频谱超级令牌;3)采用密度-隔离中心选择确保代表性且分离良好的中心;4)使用软标签方案编码各类别比例以处理混合土地覆盖。
AI.result: 在WHU-OHS数据集上达到CF1=0.728,处理速度197.75 FPS,显著优于现有方法的精度-效率权衡。广泛实验验证了双阶段 paradigm的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DSCC框架通过显式解耦聚类与分类,实现了区域级边界对齐的高光谱图像分类,在精度和效率上均取得优越性能,为高光谱图像分类提供了新的研究思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about hyperspectral image classification in remote sensing - an entirely different field from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is remote sensing/earth observation, not computer graphics or motion generation. The methods (spectral supertoken clustering, classification) have no relevance to video generation models, Vision Language Models, 3D motion generation, or diffusion-based motion synthesis. There is no connection to the pain points about extracting visual guidance from videos or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output. This paper addresses completely different research problems.

title: Judge, Then Drive: A Critic-Centric Vision Language Action Framework for Autonomous Driving
summary: Recent advances in vision language action (VLA) models have shown remarkable potential for autonomous driving by directly mapping multimodal inputs to control signals. However, previous VLA-based methods have not explicitly exploited the critic capability of VLAs to refine driving decisions, even though such capability has been well demonstrated in other LLM-based domains, thereby limiting their performance in complex closed-loop scenarios. In this work, we present a theoretically inspired two-stage framework, CriticVLA, which extends the role of VLAs from acting to judging. CriticVLA first generates a rough trajectory and then refines it through multimodal evaluation and single-step optimization guided by a VLA-based critic, yielding higher-quality driving behaviors. To support this process, we construct a large-scale synthetic dataset of 12.9 million annotated trajectories covering diverse driving scenarios, which enhances the critic's reasoning and refinement abilities. Extensive closed-loop experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark show that CriticVLA significantly surpasses state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 73.33% total success rate and delivering about 30% improvement in challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: CriticVLA是一种两阶段VLA驾驶框架，先生成粗略轨迹，再通过VLA评判器进行多模态评估和单步优化 refinement，在Bench2Drive上达到73.33%成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA方法未充分利用VLAs的评判能力来优化驾驶决策，限制了复杂闭环场景中的性能。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架CriticVLA：第一阶段生成粗略轨迹，第二阶段通过多模态评估和单步优化由VLA驱动的评判器进行轨迹 refinement。使用12.9百万条标注轨迹的大规模合成数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive基准上显著超越最先进基线，达到73.33%总成功率，在挑战性场景中提升约30%。
AI.conclusion: CriticVLA通过两阶段框架（生成+评判优化）显著提升了VLA模型在自动驾驶中的性能，在Bench2Drive基准上达到73.33%的总成功率，在挑战性场景中提升约30%。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AUTONOMOUS DRIVING (vehicle trajectory planning), while the research profile is about COMPUTER GRAPHICS - Text-to-Motion (human motion generation for graphics/animation). These are completely different application domains: 1) Vehicle trajectory generation vs. Human motion generation; 2) Autonomous driving control vs. Character animation synthesis. Although both involve "trajectories," the semantic meaning and representation are entirely different - one controls vehicles, the other generates human motion for virtual characters. The methods (VLA for driving) are also not comparable to the listed methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance). The critic-based quality assessment is for driving decision validation, not for motion prior quality filtering in graphics. The domain gap is fundamental - this paper would not help someone working on text-to-motion in computer graphics.

title: OptimusKG: Unifying biomedical knowledge in a modern multimodal graph
summary: Biomedical knowledge graphs (KGs) are widely used in the life sciences, yet many are derived from unstructured documents and therefore lack schema-level constrains, whereas graphs assembled from structured resources are difficult to harmonize into a unified representation. We present OptimusKG, a multimodal biomedical labeled property graph (LPG) built from structured and semi-structured resources to preserve factual, type-specific metadata across molecular, anatomical, clinical, and environmental domains. OptimusKG contains 190,531 nodes across 10 entity types, 21,813,816 edges across 26 relation types, and 67,249,863 property instances encoding 110,276,843 values across 150 distinct property keys, derived from 18 ontologies and controlled vocabularies. The graph enforces a top-level schema for nodes and edges and retains granular, type-specific properties, cross-references, and provenance across molecular, anatomical, clinical, and environmental domains. We assessed the validity of OptimusKG by evaluating whether graph relationships are supported by evidence from the scientific literature using a multimodal agent, PaperQA3. PaperQA3 identified supporting evidence for 70.0% of sampled edges, whereas 83.4% of sampled false edges received no supporting evidence. Edges without literature support were concentrated in associations derived from experimental and functional genomics resources, suggesting that OptimusKG captures biomedical knowledge that may precede synthesis in the scientific literature. OptimusKG is distributed as Apache Parquet files, providing a standardized resource for graph-based machine learning, knowledge-grounded retrieval with large language models, and biomedical discovery use cases such as hypothesis generation.

title: VeraRetouch: A Lightweight Fully Differentiable Framework for Multi-Task Reasoning Photo Retouching
summary: Reasoning photo retouching has gained significant traction, requiring models to analyze image defects, give reasoning processes, and execute precise retouching enhancements. However, existing approaches often rely on non-differentiable external software, creating optimization barriers and suffering from high parameter redundancy and limited generalization. To address these challenges, we propose VeraRetouch, a lightweight and fully differentiable framework for multi-task photo retouching. We employ a 0.5B Vision-Language Model (VLM) as the central intelligence to formulate retouching plans based on instructions and scene semantics. Furthermore, we develop a fully differentiable Retouch Renderer that replaces external tools, enabling direct end-to-end pixel-level training through decoupled control latents for lighting, global color, and specific color adjustments. To overcome data scarcity, we introduce AetherRetouch-1M+, the first million-scale dataset for professional retouching, constructed via a new inverse degradation workflow. Furthermore, we propose DAPO-AE, a reinforcement learning post-training strategy that enhances autonomous aesthetic cognition. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VeraRetouch achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks while maintaining a significantly smaller footprint, enabling mobile deployment. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/OpenVeraTeam/VeraRetouch.

AI.tldr: VeraRetouch是一个轻量级且完全可微分的用于多任务照片修图的框架，解决了现有方法依赖非微分外部软件、参数冗余和泛化有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有照片修图方法存在三大核心问题：(1)依赖非微分外部软件造成优化障碍；(2)参数冗余过高；(3)泛化能力有限。这些问题限制了模型在移动端部署和端到端训练的可行性。
AI.method: 提出VeraRetouch框架，包含三个核心创新：(1)使用0.5B视觉语言模型(VLM)作为核心智能，根据指令和场景语义制定修图计划；(2)开发完全可微分的Retouch Renderer，通过解耦的控制潜在变量实现光照、全局颜色和特定颜色调整的端到端像素级训练；(3)构建AetherRetouch-1M+数据集（业界首个百万级专业修图数据集）；(4)提出DAPO-AE强化学习后训练策略提升自主美学认知。
AI.result: VeraRetouch在多个基准测试上达到最先进性能，同时保持显著更小的模型体积，成功实现移动端部署。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次实现了完全可分化的修图框架，结合VLM推理能力和大规模专业数据集，为移动端照片修图应用开辟了新途径，具有重要的实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: The paper is about photo retouching (image editing), which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from video/text inputs, while VeraRetouch focuses on editing 2D photos for aesthetic improvements. Although both use VLM and differentiable rendering, the application domains are fundamentally different - motion generation vs image enhancement. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points about bridging 2D-to-3D domain gaps, extracting visual guidance for motion, or ensuring temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: The Inverse-Wisdom Law: Architectural Tribalism and the Consensus Paradox in Agentic Swarms
summary: As AI transitions toward multi-agent systems (MAS) to solve complex workflows, research paradigms operate on the axiomatic assumption that agent collaboration mirrors the "Wisdom of the Crowd". We challenge this assumption by formalizing the Consensus Paradox: a phenomenon where agentic swarms prioritize internal architectural agreement over external logical truth. Through a 36 experiments encompassing 12,804 trajectories across three state-of-the-art (SOTA) benchmarks (GAIA, Multi-Challenge, and SWE-bench), we prove the Inverse-Wisdom Law: in kinship-dominant swarms, adding logical agents increases the stability of erroneous trajectories rather than the probability of truth. The introduction of additional logical audits converges the system toward a Logic Saturation where internal entropy hits zero while factual error hits unity. By evaluating the interaction between the 3 preeminent SOTA models (Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.4), we establish the Architectural Tribalism Asymmetry as a mechanistic law of transformer weights. We demonstrate that terminal swarm integrity is strictly gated by the synthesizer's receptive logic, rather than aggregate agent quality. We define the Tribalism Coefficient and the Sycophantic Weight as the primary mechanistic determinants of swarm failure. Finally, we establish the Heterogeneity Mandate as a foundational safety requirement for resilient agentic architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了多智能体系统中"群体智慧"的假设，提出"共识悖论"现象，指出一群智能体在协作时会优先考虑内部一致性而非外部逻辑真理。通过36个实验覆盖12,804条轨迹的研究，证明了"反向智慧定律"。
AI.motivation: 研究AI转向多智能体系统来解决复杂工作流程的趋势，质疑了学界对"群体智慧"的 axiomatic 假设，提出需要验证agent协作是否真的等同于"人群智慧"
AI.method: 使用36个实验，包含12,804条轨迹，在三个SOTA基准测试(GAIA、Multi-Challenge和SWE-bench)上进行评估，测试三种模型(Gemini 3.1 Pro、Claude Sonnet 4.6、GPT-5.4)的交互
AI.result: 发现添加更多逻辑智能体实际上会增加错误轨迹的稳定性而非真理的概率。系统会收敛到"逻辑饱和"状态，内部熵为零但事实错误为1。提出"建筑部落主义不对称"作为transformer权重的机制法则
AI.conclusion: 智能体群体的终端完整性由综合智能体的接收逻辑严格把关，而非聚合智能体质量。定义部落主义系数和马屁权重作为群体失败的主要机制决定因素。提出异质性要求作为弹性智能体架构的基础安全要求。

title: COHERENCE: Benchmarking Fine-Grained Image-Text Alignment in Interleaved Multimodal Contexts
summary: In recent years, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress on a wide range of multimodal benchmarks. Despite these advances, most existing benchmarks mainly focus on single-image or multi-image comprehension. In real-world scenarios such as document reading, information is often presented as interleaved multimodel contexts. This requires MLLMs not only to recognize the content of individual images, but also to identify relevant textual and visual evidence, establish fine-grained alignments between them, and reason over these aligned signals in interleaved contexts based on contextual evidence. However, there is still a lack of systematic benchmarks for quantifying the fine-grained understanding ability of MLLMs in interleaved image-text contexts. To fill this gap, we propose COHERENCE, a benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of MLLMs to recover fine-grained image-text correspondences in interleaved multimodal contexts. COHERENCE covers interleaved image-text content from four representative domains and contains 6,161 high-quality questions. Moreover, we perform a six-type error analysis, enabling fine-grained attribution of failures in interleaved image-text understanding to the specific capabilities missing in current MLLMs.

AI.tldr: COHERENCE是一个评估多模态大语言模型在交错图像-文本上下文中细粒度理解能力的基准测试，包含6,161个问题，覆盖四个领域，并提供六类错误分析以识别MLLMs的具体能力缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注单图像或多图像理解，而现实场景（如文档阅读）中信息以交错的多模态上下文呈现，要求MLLMs识别图像内容、识別相关文本和视觉证据、建立细粒度对齐，并基于上下文证据进行推理。然而，目前仍缺乏系统性的基准测试来量化MLLMs在交错图像-文本上下文中的细粒度理解能力。
AI.method: 提出COHERENCE基准测试，评估MLLMs在交错多模态上下文中恢复细粒度图像-文本对应关系的能力。覆盖四个代表性领域的交错图像-文本内容，包含6,161个高质量问题，并进行六类错误分析。
AI.result: 构建了包含6,161个高质量问题的基准测试，涵盖四个代表性领域，能够对MLLMs在交错图像-文本理解中的失败进行细粒度归因。
AI.conclusion: COHERENCE基准测试填补了MLLMs在交错多模态上下文理解评估方面的空白，为评估和提升当前MLLMs的细粒度理解能力提供了系统性工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about benchmarking multimodal LLMs for image-text alignment in interleaved contexts - completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation from video), while this paper addresses VLM evaluation for general multimodal understanding. It does not involve video generation models, visual feature extraction for motion synthesis, diffusion-based motion generation, or any text-to-motion generation tasks. The application domains are entirely different.

title: Mechanized Foundations of Structural Governance: Machine-Checked Proofs for Governed Intelligence
comment: 27 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Code and proofs: https://github.com/mashin-live/governance-proofs
summary: We present five results in the theory of structural governance for cognitive workflow systems. Three are mechanized in Coq 8.19 using the Interaction Trees library with parameterized coinduction; two are proved on paper with explicit reductions. The Coinductive Safety Predicate (gov_safe) is a coinductive property that captures governance safety for infinite program behaviors, indexed by a boolean permission flag that is provably false for ungoverned I/O and true for governed interpretations (mechanized). The Governance Invariance Theorem establishes that governance is uniform across the meta-recursive tower: governance at level n+1 reduces to governance at level n by definitional equality of the type (mechanized). The Sufficiency Theorem proves that four atomic primitives (code, reason, memory, call) are expressively complete for any discrete intelligent system, formalized as compositional closure of a Kleisli category (mechanized). The Alternating Normal Form provides a canonical decomposition of any machine into alternating code and effect layers, with a confluent rewriting system (paper proof). The Necessity Theorem proves via explicit reduction to Rice's theorem that an architecturally opaque component (the reason primitive) is mathematically necessary for problems requiring semantic judgment (paper proof). A sixth contribution connects the abstract model to the deployed runtime: the Verified Interpreter Specification formalizes the BEAM runtime's trust, capability, and hash chain logic in Coq, then tests the running system against this specification using property-based testing with over 70,000 randomly generated directive sequences and zero disagreements. The mechanization comprises approximately 12,000 lines across 36 modules with 454 theorems and zero admitted lemmas.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了认知工作流系统结构治理理论的五个结果，并在Coq中进行了机器化验证。核心贡献包括：治理安全谓词（gov_safe）是一个余归纳性质，通过布尔权限标志索引；治理不变性定理证明治理在元递归塔中的一致性；充分性定理证明四个原子原语足以表达任何离散智能系统；交替范式提供机器的规范分解；必要性定理通过显式约简证明reason原语的数学必要性。第六个贡献是将抽象模型连接到BEARM运行时的验证解释器规范，并使用超过70,000个随机生成的指令序列进行基于属性的测试。
AI.motivation: 该研究旨在解决认知工作流系统中的结构治理问题，特别是在无限程序行为的治理安全性、跨层次治理的一致性、以及智能系统表达能力的形式化方面。现有工作缺乏对治理安全性的余归纳形式化、对元递归塔中层间关系的严格证明，以及对运行时信任、能力、哈希链逻辑的验证。
AI.method: 采用Coq 8.19和交互树库进行机器化证明，使用参数化余归纳方法。三个结果在Coq中机器化，两个在纸上通过显式约简证明。验证解释器规范使用Coq形式化BEAM运行时的信任、能力、哈希链逻辑，并通过属性基于测试验证，运行超过70,000个随机生成的指令序列。
AI.result: 主要结果包括：(1) gov_safe是治理安全的余归纳谓词，通过布尔权限标志索引，对无治理I/O可证明为false，对治理解释为true；(2) 治理在n+1层可通过定义相等约简到n层；(3) 四个原子原语（code、reason、memory、call）对任何离散智能系统是表达完备的；(4) 任何机器可分解为交替的code和effect层；(5) reason原语对需要语义判断的问题是数学必要的；(6) 验证解释器规范与BEAM运行时实现完全一致。机器化包含约12,000行代码，36个模块，454个定理，无 admitted lemmas。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功建立了认知工作流系统结构治理的完整形式化理论，通过Coq机器化保证了证明的可靠性和可复用性。五个核心结果和验证解释器规范为认知工作流系统的治理、安全性、表达能力提供了严格的数学基础，并通过大规模属性测试验证了形式化规范与实际运行时的一致性。

relevance_reason: The paper is about formal verification and governance theory for cognitive workflow systems using Coq proof assistant and BEAM runtime verification. This is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domains are entirely different: this paper addresses formal methods and programming languages verification, while the research profile focuses on video-to-motion generation, visual feature extraction, and diffusion-based motion synthesis in computer graphics. No methodological or domain overlap exists.

title: Understanding Adversarial Transferability in Vision-Language Models for Autonomous Driving: A Cross-Architecture Analysis
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at SAE WCX 2026
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in autonomous driving because they combine visual perception with language-based reasoning, supporting more interpretable decision-making, yet their robustness to physical adversarial attacks, especially whether such attacks transfer across different VLM architectures, is not well understood and poses a practical risk when attackers do not know which model a vehicle uses. We address this gap with a systematic cross-architecture study of adversarial transferability in VLM-based driving, evaluating three representative architectures (Dolphins, OmniDrive, and LeapVAD) using physically realizable patches placed on roadside infrastructure in both crosswalk and highway scenarios. Our transfer-matrix evaluation shows high cross-architecture effectiveness, with transfer rates of 73-91% (mean TR = 0.815 for crosswalk and 0.833 for highway) and sustained frame-level manipulation over 64.7-79.4% of the critical decision window even when patches are not optimized for the target model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉语言模型(VLM)在自动驾驶中对抗物理对抗攻击的鲁棒性，特别是攻击在不同VLM架构间的可迁移性。通过对三种代表性架构(Dolphins、OmniDrive、LeapVAD)在交叉口和高速公路场景下的系统评估，发现跨架构攻击迁移率高达73-91%，即使补丁未针对目标模型优化，仍能实现64.7-79.4%的关键决策窗口帧级操控，表明了对自动驾驶系统的重大安全隐患。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型(VLM)在自动驾驶中的应用日益广泛，结合视觉感知与语言推理支持更可解释的决策制定。然而，对于物理对抗攻击的鲁棒棒性，尤其是攻击是否能跨不同VLM架构迁移，目前理解不足，这会在攻击者未知目标车辆使用何种模型时构成实际风险。
AI.method: 采用系统性跨架构研究方法，评估三种代表性VLM架构(Dolphins、OmniDrive、LeapVAD)在自动驾驶中的对抗迁移性。使用可在道路上实现的贴纸进行物理对抗攻击，在交叉口和高速公路两种场景下进行测试，并构建转移矩阵进行评估。
AI.result: 研究显示高度的跨架构攻击有效性，迁移率达73-91%，交叉口场景平均TR=0.815，高速公路场景平均TR=0.833。即使补丁未针对目标模型优化，仍能在64.7-79.4%的关键决策窗口内持续进行帧级操控。
AI.conclusion: 物理对抗攻击在VLM驱动的自动驾驶中具有高度跨架构迁移性，构成重大安全威胁。攻击者可使用非针对性补丁成功攻击未知目标架构的系统，突显了VLM部署中需要更鲁棒的防御机制。

relevance_reason: This paper is about adversarial attacks and security in autonomous driving systems using VLMs - completely different application domain. While it mentions VLM (Vision Language Model), it's used for autonomous driving decision-making, not for Text-to-Motion generation in computer graphics. The pain points, methods, and goals are entirely unrelated - this paper doesn't address any motion generation, visual feature extraction for motion synthesis, or temporal consistency in 3D motion generation.

title: The Two Boundaries: Why Behavioral AI Governance Fails Structurally
summary: Every system that performs effects has two boundaries: what it can do (expressiveness) and what governance covers (governance). In nearly all deployed AI systems, these boundaries are defined independently, creating three regions: governed capabilities (the only useful region), ungoverned capabilities (risk), and governance policies that address non-existent capabilities (theater). Two of the three regions are failure modes. We focus on the governance of effects: actions that AI systems perform in the world (API calls, database writes, tool invocations). This is distinct from the governance of model outputs (content quality, bias, fairness), which operates at a different level and requires different mechanisms. We present a formal framework for analyzing this structural gap. Rice's theorem (1953) proves the gap is undecidable in the general case for any Turing-complete architecture that attempts to govern effects behaviorally: no algorithm can decide non-trivial semantic properties of arbitrary programs, including the property "this program's effects comply with the governance policy." We define coterminous governance: a system property where the expressivenessboundary equals the governance boundary. We show that coterminous governance requires an architectural decision (separatingcomputation from effect) rather than a governance layer added after the fact. We show that structural governance under this separation subsumes separate governance infrastructure: governance checks become part of the execution pipeline rather than a second system running alongside it. We propose coterminous governance as the testable criterion for any AI governance system: either the two boundaries are provably identical, or risk and theater are structurally inevitable. Proofs are mechanized in Coq (454 theorems, 36 modules, 0 admitted).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"共终治理"(coterminous governance)概念,解决AI系统中表达能力边界与治理边界分离导致的系统性问题。Rice定理证明在图灵完备架构中,治理效果行为是非决定性的。通过 Coq 形式化验证(454个定理,36个模块),论文表明共终治理需要 architectural 决策(分离计算与效果),而非事后添加治理层。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统中,表达能力和治理边界通常独立定义,产生三个区域:受治理能力(有用)、未受治理能力(风险)、针对不存在能力的治理( theater)。其中两个是失败模式。现有方法关注模型输出的治理(内容质量、偏见),而非效果治理(API调用、工具调用等世界动作)。
AI.method: 1) 形式化定义治理间隙 gap 分析框架;2) 引用Rice定理(1953)证明效果治理行为在图灵完备架构中是不可判定的;3) 定义共终治理:表达能力边界等于治理边界的系统属性;4) 在Coq中形式化证明(454定理、36模块、0 admitted)
AI.result: 证明共终治理需要架构性决策——分离计算与效果,而非事后添加治理层。结构化治理 subsumes 独立治理基础设施:治理检查成为执行管道的一部分,而非并行运行的第二系统。提供了可测试标准:两边界要么可证明相同,要么风险和theater在结构上不可避免。
AI.conclusion: 共终治理是AI治理系统的可测试标准。Rice定理表明通用case下无法实现,但通过 architectural 分离计算与效果可以实现。风险和theater不是可选缺陷,而是架构决策的结构性后果。形式化验证确保了理论声称的严格性。

relevance_reason: The paper is about AI governance theory and formal verification using Coq (Rice theorem, architectural decisions for governance), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. No match in application domain (AI governance vs text-to-motion generation), methods (formal verification vs video generation/diffusion models), or pain points. This is a theoretical computer science/AI ethics paper about system boundaries, not motion generation.

title: Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Splatting in the Wild
summary: We propose a 3D novel sparse-view synthesis framework for unconstrained real-world scenarios that contain distractors. Unlike existing methods that primarily perform novel-view synthesis from a sparse set of constrained images without transient elements or leverage unconstrained dense image collections to enhance 3D representation in real-world scenarios, our method not only effectively tackles sparse unconstrained image collections, but also shows high-quality 3D rendering results. To do this, we introduce reference-guided view refinement with a diffusion model using a transient mask and a reference image to enhance the 3D representation and mitigate artifacts in rendered views. Furthermore, we address sparse regions in the Gaussian field via pseudo-view generation along with a sparsity-aware Gaussian replication strategy to amplify Gaussians in the sparse regions. Extensive experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate that our methodology consistently outperforms existing methods (e.g., PSNR - 17.2%, SSIM - 10.8%, LPIPS - 4.0%) and provides high-fidelity 3D rendering results. This advancement paves the way for realizing unconstrained real-world scenarios without labor-intensive data acquisition. Our project page is available at $\href{https://robotic-vision-lab.github.io/SaveWildGS/}{here}$

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无约束真实场景的3D稀疏视角合成框架，通过引入基于扩散模型的参考引导视图细化技术和伪视图生成+稀疏感知高斯复制策略来解决稀疏视角合成中的干扰物和稀疏区域问题，在公开数据集上取得了优异的渲染质量提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要从稀疏的受控图像进行新视角合成，或利用无约束的密集图像集合增强3D表示，但对于包含干扰因素的真实无约束场景缺乏有效解决方案。本文旨在填补这一空白，实现从稀疏无约束图像集合中进行高质量3D渲染。
AI.method: 提出三方面创新：1）基于扩散模型的参考引导视图细化技术，使用Transient Mask和参考图像增强3D表示并缓解渲染伪影；2）针对高斯场稀疏区域的伪视图生成策略；3）稀疏感知高斯复制策略来扩充稀疏区域的高斯分布。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的广泛实验表明，本文方法在PSNR上提升17.2%，SSIM上提升10.8%，LPIPS上提升4.0%，持续优于现有方法，提供了高保真的3D渲染结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推动了无约束真实场景3D重建的发展，无需密集数据采集即可实现高质量渲染，具有重要的应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting for novel view synthesis from sparse images, which is completely different from Text-to-Motion. Even though both involve 3D and diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on 3D rendering/view synthesis (generating new views of static scenes), not human motion generation. The pain points addressed (PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS for rendering quality) have no relevance to the text-to-motion domain (extracting visual guidance from video, bridging 2D-3D domain gap for motion, temporal consistency in motion generation). This is a 3D graphics rendering paper, not a motion synthesis paper.

title: Learning Rate Engineering: From Coarse Single Parameter to Layered Evolution
summary: Learning rate scheduling has evolved from the single global fixed rate of early SGD to sophisticated layer-wise adaptive strategies. We systematize this evolution into five generations: (Gen1) global fixed learning rates, (Gen2) global scheduling, (Gen3) parameter-level adaptation, (Gen4) layer-level differentiation, and (Gen5) joint layer-time scheduling. We trace the fundamental motivation behind each transition, showing how the shift from one-size-fits-all to tailoring by layer and time addresses the impossible trinity of transfer learning: lower layers require small updates to preserve general knowledge while higher layers need large updates to adapt to new tasks. Building on this taxonomy, we propose Discriminative Adaptive Layer Scaling (DALS), a unified framework that integrates phase-adaptive cosine scheduling, depth-aware Grokfast gradient filtering, and LARS-style trust ratios into a single coherent optimizer. We benchmark 18 strategies including three DALS variants across all five generations on five datasets: synthetic, CIFAR-10 (from scratch), RTE, TREC-6, and IMDb (fine-tuning). On synthetic, DALS achieves the best accuracy at 98.0%, while DALS-Fast reaches 90% in just 3 epochs. The cross-dataset analysis reveals striking regime-dependent patterns -- no single strategy wins across all regimes. Critically, STLR+Discriminative, the ULMFiT champion, catastrophically fails on from-scratch tasks (43.6% on TREC-6 from scratch vs. 96.8% with RAdam), confirming that directional decay biases are harmful without pretrained features. DALS avoids either extreme, achieving the best synthetic result while maintaining competitive fine-tuning performance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统化了学习率调度的发展历程，提出DALS框架统一了多种自适应策略，并在多个数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决迁移学习中"不可能的三一原则"：低层需要小更新保留泛化知识，高层需要大更新适应新任务。从全局固定学习率到逐层自适应的演变正是为了解决这一根本矛盾。
AI.method: 1) 将学习率调度发展为五代分类体系：Gen1全局固定、Gen2全局调度、Gen3参数级适应、Gen4层级区分、Gen5联合层级-时间调度；2) 提出DALS框架，整合相位自适应余弦调度、深度感知Grokfast梯度过滤和LARS风格信任比率；3) 在5个数据集上基准测试18种策略。
