AI.result: 在合成数据上DALS达到98.0%准确率，DALS-Fast在3个epoch达到90%。跨数据集分析显示没有单一策略在所有场景获胜。STLR+Discriminative在从头训练任务上灾难性失败（TREC-6仅43.6%vs RAdam的96.8%）。DALS在合成数据上表现最佳同时保持有竞争力的微调性能。
AI.conclusion: DALS通过统一多个自适应机制提供了一个灵活_framework，能够在不同训练制度间避免极端情况，在保持竞争力的同时适应多种任务需求。表明层级-时间联合调度是学习率调度的重要发展方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about learning rate scheduling and training optimization in neural networks, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is general ML training methodology, not video-to-motion, text-to-motion, or any computer graphics application. There is zero overlap with the research profile's pain points (visual feature extraction, 2D-to-3D domain gap, temporal consistency) or methods (video generation models, VLM, diffusion-based motion synthesis).

title: Softmax-GS: Generalized Gaussians Learning When to Blend or Bound
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D GS) is widely adopted for novel view synthesis due to its high training and rendering efficiency. However, its efficiency relies on the key assumption that Gaussians do not overlap in the 3D space, which leads to noticeable artifacts and view inconsistencies. In addition, the inherently diffuse boundaries of Gaussians hinder accurate reconstruction of sharp object edges. We propose Softmax-GS, a unified solution that addresses both the view-inconsistency and the diffuse-boundary problem by enforcing a softmax-based competition in overlapping regions between two Gaussians. With learnable parameters controlling the strength of the competition, it enables a continuous spectrum from smooth color blending to crisp, well-defined boundaries. Our formulation explicitly preserves order invariance for any two overlapping Gaussians and ensures that the output transmittance remains unchanged irrespective of the extent of overlapping, preventing undesirable discontinuities in the rendered output. Ablation experiments on simple geometries demonstrate the effectiveness of each component of Softmax-GS, and evaluations on real-world benchmarks show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving both reconstruction quality and parameter efficiency.

AI.tldr: Softmax-GS是一种统一解决方案,通过在重叠区域引入基于softmax的竞争机制来解决3D Gaussian Splatting中的视图不一致和边界模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D GS)在新颖视图合成中高效,但存在两个关键问题:1)高斯在3D空间中不重叠的关键假设导致明显的伪影和视图不一致;2)高斯固有的漫反射边界阻碍了清晰物体边缘的准确重建。
AI.method: 提出Softmax-GS方法,通过在两个高斯的重叠区域强制执行基于softmax的竞争来解决这些问题。该方法包含可学习参数控制竞争强度,实现从平滑颜色混合到清晰 crisp 边界的连续光谱。公式明确保持任意两个重叠高斯的顺序不变性和输出透射率不变,防止渲染输出中的不连续性。
AI.result: 在简单几何体上的消融实验验证了各组件的有效性,在真实世界基准测试上的评估表明该方法达到最先进性能,同时提高了重建质量和参数效率。
AI.conclusion: Softmax-GS成功解决了3D GS的两个核心问题,为新颖视图合成提供了一个统一而有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting for novel view synthesis in computer graphics, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion. While both are in computer graphics, 3D GS view synthesis focuses on rendering 3D scenes from different camera viewpoints, not generating human motion from text or video. The pain points are entirely different - this paper addresses view inconsistency and boundary blur in rendering, not extracting visual guidance for motion, bridging 2D-3D domains for motion generation, or ensuring temporal consistency in motion synthesis.

title: Context as Prior: Bayesian-Inspired Intent Inference for Non-Speaking Agents with a Household Cat Testbed
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2026 Animal Workshop
summary:
Many agents in real-world environments cannot reliably communicate their goals through language, including household pets, pre-verbal infants, and other non-speaking embodied agents. In such settings, intent must be inferred from incomplete behavioral observations in context-rich environments. This creates a core ambiguity: observable behavior is often noisy or underspecified, while context provides strong prior information but can also induce brittle shortcut predictions if used naively.
  We present CatSignal, a Bayesian-inspired probabilistic framework for multimodal intent inference that models spatial context as a prior-like constraint and behavioral observations as evidence. Rather than treating context as an ordinary input feature, our method uses a context-gated Product-of-Experts formulation to compute posterior-like intent distributions from context, pose dynamics, and acoustic cues. We instantiate this formulation in a household cat setting as a focused proof-of-concept for intent inference in non-speaking agents.
  Under Leave-One-Video-Out evaluation on a multimodal domestic cat dataset, the proposed prior-guided fusion achieves the best overall accuracy of 77.72%, outperforming feature concatenation (71.83%) and stronger late-fusion baselines. More importantly, it substantially reduces context-driven shortcut failures in ambiguous cases. While simpler fusion strategies remain competitive in Macro-F1 and selective prediction, the proposed model provides the strongest overall accuracy and the best suppression of context-based shortcut collapse.

AI.tldr: CatSignal是一个针对非言语智能体（如家猫）的多模态意图推理概率框架，通过上下文门控的Product-of-Experts融合空间上下文、姿态动态和声学线索，在家猫数据集上达到77.72%准确率，优于特征拼接和后融合方法，并有效减少上下文捷径失败。
AI.motivation: 许多智能体（如宠物、无言语能力的婴儿、其他非言语具身智能体）无法通过语言可靠地传达其目标，意图必须从上下文丰富的环境中的不完整行为观察中推断出来。这产生了一个核心歧义：可观察行为通常是有噪声或未指定的，而上下文虽然提供了强有力的先验信息，但如果使用不当也会导致脆弱的捷径预测。
AI.method: 提出CatSignal，一个贝叶斯启发的概率式多模态意图推理框架，使用上下文门控的Product-of-Experts公式，将空间上下文建模为先验约束，将行为观察建模为证据。该方法从上下文、姿态动态和声学线索计算后验式意图分布。
AI.result: 在多模态家猫数据集上进行留一视频出评估，提出的先验引导融合达到了77.72%的最佳总体准确率，优于特征拼接(71.83%)和更强的后融合基线。更重要的是，它显著减少了上下文驱动的捷径失败。简单融合在Macro-F1和选择性预测方面仍具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模型提供了最强的总体准确率和最佳的上下文捷径崩溃抑制效果。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on intent inference for non-speaking agents (household cats) using multimodal fusion with spatial context, pose dynamics, and acoustic cues. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion, which involves generating 3D human motion from text or video. While both deal with pose/sequential data, this paper addresses intent recognition/classification, not motion generation or synthesis. The methods and goals are orthogonal to the research profile's pain points about bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output and temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: METASYMBO: Multi-Agent Language-Guided Metamaterial Discovery via Symbolic Latent Evolution
summary: Metamaterial discovery seeks microstructured materials whose geometry induces targeted mechanical behavior. Existing inverse-design methods can efficiently generate candidates, but they typically require explicit numerical property targets and are less suitable for early-stage exploration, where researchers often begin with incomplete constraints and qualitative intents expressed in natural language. Large language models can interpret such intents, but they lack geometric awareness and physical property validity. To address this gap, we propose MetaSymbO, a multi-agent framework for language-guided Metamaterial discovery via Symbolic-driven latent evOlution. Specifically, MetaSymbO contains three agents: a Designer that interprets free-form design intents and retrieves a semantically consistent scaffold, a Generator that synthesizes candidate microstructures in a disentangled latent space, and a Supervisor that provides fast property-aware feedback for iterative refinement. To move beyond the limitations of reproducing known samples from literature and training data, we further introduce symbolic-driven latent evolution, which applies programmable operators over disentangled latent factors to compose, modify, and refine structures at inference time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that (i) MetaSymbO improves structural validity by up to 34% in symmetry and nearly 98% in periodicity compared to state-of-the-art baselines; (ii) MetaSymbO achieves about 6-7% higher language-guidance scores while maintaining superior structure novelty compared to advanced reasoning LLMs; (iii) qualitative analyses confirm the effectiveness of symbolic logic operators in enabling programmable semantic alignment; and (iv) realworld case studies on auxetic, high-stiffness metamaterial design further validate its practical capability.

AI.tldr: MetaSymbO是一个多智能体框架，通过语言引导实现元材料的可编程发现。该框架整合了Designer、Generator和Supervisor三个智能体，并创新性地引入符号驱动的潜在演化机制，使系统能够在推理阶段对解耦的潜在因素进行组合和优化，从而突破训练数据的限制。
AI.motivation: 现有逆设计方法需要明确的数值属性目标，不适合早期探索阶段。研究人员通常只有不完整的约束和自然语言表达的定性意图。大型语言模型虽能解释这些意图，但缺乏几何意识和物理属性验证能力。
AI.method: 提出MetaSymbO多智能体框架，包含三个协作智能体：(1) Designer智能体解释自由形式设计意图并检索语义一致的支架结构；(2) Generator智能体在解耦潜在空间中合成候选微结构；(3) Supervisor智能体提供快速的属性感知反馈支持迭代优化。核心创新是符号驱动的潜在演化，通过可编程操作符对解耦的潜在因素进行组合、修改和 refinement at inference time。
AI.result: 实验表明：(i) 结构有效性提升：对称性提高34%，周期性提高98%；(ii) 语言指导得分比先进推理LLM提高6-7%，同时保持更优的结构新颖性；(iii) 定性分析验证了符号逻辑操作符可实现可编程语义对齐；(iv) 辅助材料和高刚度材料的实际案例验证了实用能力。
AI.conclusion: MetaSymbO成功弥合了自然语言设计意图与物理有效微结构之间的鸿沟。符号驱动的潜在演化机制使系统能够超越训练数据进行推理和创造，多智能体协作确保了语言理解和物理有效性的统一。该工作为语言引导的元材料早期探索提供了有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about METAMATERIAL DISCOVERY (materials science/physics), which is COMPLETELY DIFFERENT from the research profile's field of Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (human motion generation). The application domains are entirely distinct: one deals with designing metamaterial microstructures for engineering applications, while the other deals with generating 3D human motion from text or video inputs. The methods used are also different - this paper uses multi-agent LLM frameworks with symbolic latent evolution for material design, whereas the research profile requires video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), VLM, visual feature extraction, and diffusion-based motion synthesis for human motion. None of the pain points (visual guidance feature extraction, quality assessment for motion prior, 2D-to-3D domain bridging, temporal consistency) are addressed. This is a materials science paper with no relevance to text-to-motion generation in computer graphics.

title: LA-Pose: Latent Action Pretraining Meets Pose Estimation
summary: This paper revisits camera pose estimation through the lens of self-supervised pretraining, focusing on inverse-dynamics pretraining as a scalable alternative to the current trend of fully supervised training with 3D annotations. Concretely, we employ inverse- and forward-dynamics models to learn latent action representations, similar to Genie from large-scale driving videos. Our idea is simple yet effective. Existing methods use latent actions in their original capacity, that is, as action conditioning of world-models or as proxies of robot action parameters in policy networks. Our method, dubbed LA-Pose, repurposes the latent action features as inputs to a camera pose estimator, finetuned on a limited set of high-quality 3D annotations. This formulation enables accurate and generalizable pose prediction while maintaining feed-forward efficiency. Extensive experiments on driving benchmarks show that LA-Pose achieves competitive and even superior performance to state-of-the-art methods while using orders of magnitude less labeled data. Concretely, on the Waymo and PandaSet benchmarks, LA-Pose achieves over 10% higher pose accuracy than recent feed-forward methods. To our knowledge, this work is the first to demonstrate the power of inverse-dynamics self-supervised learning for pose estimation.

AI.tldr: LA-Pose是一种利用逆动力学自监督学习进行相机姿态估计的方法，通过将潜在动作特征重新用于姿态预测，在仅使用少量标注数据的情况下实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前相机姿态估计方法依赖大量3D标注数据进行全监督训练，标注成本高昂且难以扩展。该研究探索使用逆动力学自监督预训练作为可扩展的替代方案，无需人工标注即可学习有效的动作表示。
AI.method: 本文方法LA-Pose采用逆动力学和前动力学模型从大规模驾驶视频中学习潜在动作表示，将这些潜在动作特征作为相机姿态估计器的输入，并在有限的3D标注数据上进行微调，实现了高效的前向传播姿态预测。
AI.result: 在Waymo和PandaSet驾驶基准数据集上，LA-Pose相比最新的前向方法实现了超过10%的姿态准确率提升，且仅使用极少量的标注数据，展现了卓越的准确率和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次证明了逆动力学自监督学习在姿态估计中的潜力。LA-Pose通过将潜在动作特征重新用于相机姿态估计器，在仅使用少量标注数据的情况下实现了卓越的 pose 预测准确率，为无需大量3D标注的相机姿态估计开辟了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about camera pose estimation for autonomous driving, NOT Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While it does use visual features from driving videos and latent action representations, the application domain is completely different - it's computer vision for autonomous vehicles, not 3D human motion generation. The goal is estimating camera position/orientation, not generating smooth 3D motion from text or video guidance. This is a fundamental application domain mismatch.

title: Investigating More Explainable and Partition-Free Compositionality Estimation for LLMs: A Rule-Generation Perspective
summary: Compositional generalization tests are often used to estimate the compositionality of LLMs. However, such tests have the following limitations: (1) they only focus on the output results without considering LLMs' understanding of sample compositionality, resulting in explainability defects; (2) they rely on dataset partition to form the test set with combinations unseen in the training set, suffering from combination leakage issues. In this work, we propose a novel rule-generation perspective for compositionality estimation for LLMs. It requires LLMs to generate a program as rules for dataset mapping and provides estimates of the compositionality of LLMs using complexity-based theory. The perspective addresses the limitations of compositional generalization tests and provides a new way to analyze the compositionality characterization of LLMs. We conduct experiments and analysis of existing advanced LLMs based on this perspective on a string-to-grid task, and find various compositionality characterizations and compositionality deficiencies exhibited by LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的规则生成视角来评估大型语言模型(LLM)的组合性。通过要求LLM生成程序作为数据集映射规则，使用复杂性理论估计组合性，解决传统组合性泛化测试的两个局限：仅关注输出结果缺乏可解释性，以及数据集分区导致的组合泄漏问题。在string-to-grid任务上实验分析现有先进LLM的组合性特征和缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有组合性泛化测试存在两大局限：(1)仅关注输出结果而忽略模型对样本组合性的理解，存在可解释性缺陷；(2)依赖数据集分区形成测试集，未见训练集的组合存在组合泄漏问题。需要一种新的评估视角来更准确估计LLM的组合性。
AI.method: 提出规则生成的评估视角，要求LLM生成程序作为规则来完成数据集映射，并利用复杂性理论提供组合性估计。在string-to-grid任务上对多个先进LLM进行实验和评估。
AI.result: 实验发现不同LLM展现出各种不同的组合性特征和组合性缺陷，为理解LLM的组合性表征提供了新的分析方式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统组合性泛化测试的局限性，提供了分析LLM组合性表征的新途径，对评估和改进LLM的组合能力具有重要意义。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating compositionality in Large Language Models (LLMs) using rule-generation perspective and string-to-grid tasks. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is NLP/AI research on LLM evaluation, not motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics application. There is no mention of video generation models, visual feature extraction, 3D motion generation, diffusion-based motion synthesis, or any of the methods/pain points in the research profile. This is a fundamental field mismatch.

title: Uni-HOI:A Unified framework for Learning the Joint distribution of Text and Human-Object Interaction
summary: Modeling 4D human-object interaction (HOI) is a compelling challenge in computer vision and an essential technology powering virtual and mixed-reality applications. While existing works have achieved promising results on specific HOI tasks-such as text-conditioned HOI generation and human motion generation from object motion, they typically rely on task-specific architectures and lack a unified framework capable of handling diverse conditional inputs. Building on this, we propose Uni-HOI, a unified framework that learns the joint distribution among text, human motion, and object motion. By leveraging large language models (LLMs) and two motion-specific vector quantized variational autoencoders (VQ-VAEs), we convert heterogeneous motion data into token sequences compatible with LLM inputs, enabling seamless integration and joint modeling of all three modalities. We introduce a two-stage training strategy: the first stage performs multi-task learning on a large-scale HOI dataset to capture the underlying correlations among the three modalities, while the second stage fine-tunes the model on specific tasks to further enhance performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Uni-HOI achieves remarkable performances on multiple HOI-related tasks including text-driven HOI generation, object motion-driven human motion generation (optionally with text) and human motion-driven object motion prediction within a unified framework.

AI.tldr: Uni-HOI是一个统一框架，利用大语言模型(LLM)和两个运动专用VQ-VAE来学习文本、人类运动和物体运动的联合分布，通过两阶段训练策略实现多种HOI相关任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的人-物体交互(HOI)方法通常依赖特定任务架构，缺乏统一框架处理不同条件输入的能力。需要一个能够处理多样化条件输入的统一框架来推动虚拟和混合现实应用。
AI.method: 1) 利用大语言模型(LLM)和两个运动专用VQ-VAE将异构运动数据转换为与LLM输入兼容的token序列；2) 两阶段训练策略：第一阶段在大规模HOI数据集上进行多任务学习捕捉三种模态的关联，第二阶段对特定任务进行微调。
AI.result: Uni-HOI在一个统一框架内实现对多个HOI相关任务的卓越性能，包括文本驱动的HOI生成、物体运动驱动的人类运动生成(可带文本)和人类运动驱动的物体运动预测。
AI.conclusion: Uni-HOI通过整合LLM和VQ-VAE技术，成功建立了一个统一的HOI框架，能够处理多种条件输入并在多个任务上达到优异性能，为虚拟和混合现实应用提供了有效技术支撑。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on text-to-motion for human-object interaction using LLM + VQ-VAE, which is a different approach from the research profile's emphasis on visual guidance from 2D video sequences, VLM-based visual feature extraction, and video generation models (Wanxiang,Seedance). The pain points specifically mention bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output, but Uni-HOI uses text as the primary input modality, not visual/video inputs. The application domain is text-to-motion but the methodology (LLM+VQ-VAE vs VLM+visual features from video) doesn't match the specific methods and pain points outlined.

title: Towards All-Day Perception for Off-Road Driving: A Large-Scale Multispectral Dataset and Comprehensive Benchmark
summary: Off-road nighttime autonomous driving suffers from unreliable visible-light perception, making infrared modality crucial for accurate freespace detection. However, progress remains limited due to the scarcity of annotated infrared off-road datasets and the inter-frame inconsistencies inherent to current single-frame methods. To address these gaps, we present the IRON dataset, which, to our knowledge, is the first large-scale infrared dataset for off-road temporal freespace detection under all-day conditions, with strong support for nighttime perception. The dataset comprises 24,314 densely annotated infrared images with synchronized RGB images in diverse scenes and different light conditions. Building upon this dataset, we propose IRONet, a novel flow-free framework for temporal freespace detection that addresses inter-frame inconsistencies by aggregating historical context via a memory-attention mechanism and a carefully designed mask decoder. On our IRON dataset, IRONet achieves state-of-the-art performance, reaching 82.93%(+1.19%) IoU and 90.66%(+0.71%) F1 score at real-time inference. Remarkably, IRONet also exhibits robust generalization to RGB modalities on ORFD and Rellis datasets. Overall, our work establishes a foundation for reliable all-day off-road autonomous driving and future research in infrared temporal perception. The code and IRON dataset are available at https://github.com/wsnbws/IRON.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRON数据集和IRONet模型，这是首个用于全天条件下越野可通行空间检测的大规模红外数据集和时序检测框架，解决夜间越野自动驾驶中可见光感知不可靠的问题。
AI.motivation: 越野夜间自动驾驶中可见光感知不可靠，红外模态对准确的可通行空间检测至关重要，但目前缺乏注释的红外越野数据集，且现有单帧方法存在帧间不一致性问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建IRON数据集，包含24,314张密集标注的红外图像及同步RGB图像，涵盖不同场景和光照条件；2) 提出IRONet框架，通过记忆注意力机制聚合历史上下文，配合精心设计的掩码解码器解决帧间不一致问题，无需光流即可实现时序检测。
AI.result: 在IRON数据集上达到82.93%的IoU和90.66%的F1分数，分别提升1.19%和0.71%，实现实时推理。并在ORFD和Rellis数据集上展现了对RGB模态的良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为可靠的全天越野自动驾驶和红外时序感知未来研究奠定了基础，IRON数据集和IRONet代码已开源。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses autonomous driving perception for off-road navigation (detecting traversable space), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While both deal with temporal sequences and video/image processing, the application domain is entirely different - one generates 3D human motion while the other is about vehicle perception for autonomous driving. No relevance to text-to-motion, visual guidance features extraction for motion, or 3D motion generation.

title: REVIVE 3D: Refinement via Encoded Voluminous Inflated prior for Volume Enhancement
summary: Recent generative models have shown strong performance in generating diverse 3D assets from 2D images, a fundamental research topic in computer vision and graphics. However, these models still struggle to generate voluminous 3D assets when the input is a flat image that provides limited 3D cues. We introduce REVIVE 3D, a two-stage, plug-and-play pipeline for generating voluminous 3D assets from flat images. In Stage 1, we construct an Inflated Prior by inflating the foreground silhouette to recover global volume and superimposing part-aware details to capture local structure. In Stage 2, 3D Latent Refinement injects Gaussian noise into the Inflated Prior's latent and then denoises it, using the prior's geometric cues to leverage the backbone's pretrained 3D knowledge. Furthermore, our framework supports image-conditioned 3D editing. To quantify volume and surface flatness, we propose Compactness and Normal Anisotropy. We validate Compactness and Normal Anisotropy through a user study, showing that these metrics align with human perception of volume and quality. We show that REVIVE 3D achieves state-of-the-art performance on a challenging flat image dataset, based on extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations.

AI.tldr: REVIVE 3D是一个从2D flatten images生成voluminous 3D assets的两阶段框架，包含Inflation Prior构建和3D Latent Refinement两个阶段，并提出Compactness和Normal Anisotropy指标进行评估。实验表明该方法在挑战性数据集上达到最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成模型在从2D图像生成多样化3D资产方面表现良好，但当输入是 flatten image（提供有限3D cues）时，这些模型仍然难以生成 voluminous 3D assets。这是一个基础性研究问题，存在于计算机视觉和图形学中。
AI.method: 提出REVIVE 3D，一个两阶段、即插即用的管道。Stage 1：构建Inflated Prior，通过充气前景轮廓恢复全局体积并叠加_part感知细节以捕获局部结构。Stage 2：3D Latent Refinement将高斯噪声注入 Inflated Prior 的潜在表示，然后进行去噪，利用先验的几何 cues 来利用backbone的预训练3D知识。此外，该框架支持图像条件3D编辑。为量化体积和表面平整度，提出了Compactness和Normal Anisotropy两个指标。
AI.result: 通过用户研究验证了Compactness和Normal Anisotropy与人类对体积和质量的感知一致。REVIVE 3D在具有挑战性的 flatten image 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，基于广泛的定性和定量评估。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了REVIVE 3D框架，能够从 flatten images生成体积感强的3D资产，并支持图像条件3D编辑，两个新指标与人类感知一致，在挑战性数据集上实现了SOTA性能。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D asset/object generation from 2D flattened images (volume enhancement), while the research profile is specifically about Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion). These are different application domains in computer graphics - object generation vs motion generation. Although both use diffusion-based methods, the target output is fundamentally different (static 3D assets vs temporal human motion sequences). The pain points don't align: the paper addresses geometric volume quality, not temporal consistency or motion smoothness.

title: Leveraging Verifier-Based Reinforcement Learning in Image Editing
summary: While Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has become a pivotal paradigm for text-to-image generation, its application to image editing remains largely unexplored. A key bottleneck is the lack of a robust general reward model for all editing tasks. Existing edit reward models usually give overall scores without detailed checks, ignoring different instruction requirements and causing biased rewards. To address this, we argue that the key is to move from a simple scorer to a reasoning verifier. We introduce Edit-R1, a framework that builds a chain-of-thought (CoT) verifier-based reasoning reward model (RRM) and then leverages it for downstream image editing. The Edit-RRM breaks instructions into distinct principles, evaluates the edited image against each principle, and aggregates these checks into an interpretable, fine-grained reward. To build such an RRM, we first apply supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as a ``cold-start'' to generate CoT reward trajectories. Then, we introduce Group Contrastive Preference Optimization (GCPO), a reinforcement learning algorithm that leverages human pairwise preference data to reinforce our pointwise RRM. After building the RRM, we use GRPO to train editing models with this non-differentiable yet powerful reward model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Edit-RRM surpasses powerful VLMs such as Seed-1.5-VL and Seed-1.6-VL as an editing-specific reward model, and we observe a clear scaling trend, with performance consistently improving from 3B to 7B parameters. Moreover, Edit-R1 delivers gains to editing models like FLUX.1-kontext, highlighting its effectiveness in enhancing image editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Edit-R1框架，首次将基于链式思考(CoT)的推理验证器应用于图像编辑任务。通过构建推理奖励模型(RRM)并将编辑指令分解为不同原则进行细粒度评估，解决了传统奖励模型缺乏细粒度和解释性的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前RLHF在文本到图像生成中取得成功，但在图像编辑领域应用较少。主要瓶颈在于缺乏针对所有编辑任务的通用 robust 奖励模型。现有的编辑奖励模型只给出整体分数，忽略了不同指令要求，导致奖励有偏差。
AI.method: 1. 首先使用监督微调(SFT)作为"冷启动"生成CoT奖励轨迹；2. 引入组对比偏好优化(GCPO)，利用人类成对偏好数据来强化点wise RRM；3. 使用GRPO训练编辑模型，结合这个不可微但强大的奖励模型。
AI.result: 实验表明Edit-RRM超越了强大的VLM模型(Seed-1.5-VL和Seed-1.6-VL)作为编辑专用奖励模型，并且呈现明显的扩展趋势，性能从3B到7B参数持续提升。Edit-R1也为FLUX.1-kontext等编辑模型带来提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出了基于CoT推理验证器的图像编辑奖励模型框架，通过将简单评分器升级为推理验证器，实现了可解释的细粒度奖励评估。实验验证了方法的有效性和扩展性，为RLHF在图像编辑领域的应用开辟了新方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about IMAGE EDITING using RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback), which is a completely DIFFERENT application domain from Text-to-Motion in Computer Graphics. While it mentions VLM and Seedance, these are used as a REWARD MODEL to evaluate image editing quality - not for extracting visual features from 2D video to generate 3D human motion. The pain points in the research profile are about bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output and ensuring temporal consistency in motion generation, whereas this paper addresses reward modeling for image-to-image editing tasks. The application domains are entirely different (computer vision image editing vs. computer graphics motion generation).

title: Adjoint Inversion Reveals Holographic Superposition and Destructive Interference in CNN Classifiers
summary:
A foundational assumption in CNN interpretability -- that deep encoders suppress background pixels while classifiers merely select from a cleaned feature pool (the Spatial Funnel Hypothesis) -- remains untested due to spatial hallucinations in existing visualization tools. We address this by introducing a hallucination-free inversion framework built on magnitude-phase decoupling and Local Adjoint Correctors. Our method mathematically guarantees that the spatial gradient support of every reconstruction stems strictly from genuinely active channels.
  Using this framework as a geometric probe, we uncover the first pixel-level evidence of strong superposition in vision encoders. We show that per-channel inversions are uniformly holographic: positive and negative weight reconstructions are visually and energetically indistinguishable. However, their algebraic sum sharply concentrates on the foreground. This proves classification operates via destructive interference -- classifier weights cancel a shared background direction in pixel space and constructively assemble class-discriminative residuals, directly falsifying the Spatial Funnel Hypothesis.
  This interference model identifies the volume of the admissible interference subspace as the geometric quantity governing channel requirements. We prove this volume is dual to the GAP covariance determinant, yielding a covariance-volume channel selection algorithm with a $(1-1/e)$ approximation guarantee. This algorithm mathematically reveals out-of-distribution (OOD) failure as a measurable collapse of the covariance volume essential for interference-based classification. Our framework extends seamlessly to attention-based heads without retraining.

AI.tldr: 提出无幻觉反演框架验证CNN的Spatial Funnel Hypothesis，发现视觉编码器中存在强叠加现象，分类器通过 destructive interference 取消共享背景方向并构建类区分性残差，提出基于协方差体积的通道选择算法。
AI.motivation: CNN可解释性的基础假设（Spatial Funnel Hypothesis）——深度编码器抑制背景像素而分类器从清洁特征池中选择——因现有可视化工具的spatial hallucinations而未经测试。
AI.method: 引入基于 magnitude-phase decoupling 和 Local Additive Correctors 的无幻觉反演框架，数学上保证每条重构的spatial gradient support仅来自真正活跃的通道。用此框架作为geometric probe进行像素级分析。
AI.result: 发现per-channel inversions是均匀holographic的：正负权重重构在视觉和能量上不可区分，但代数和在像素空间上sharp concentration于前景。分类通过destructive interference操作：分类器权重取消共享背景方向并构建类区分性残差，直接证伪了Spatial Funnel Hypothesis。识别admissible interference subspace的体积为几何量，提出dual to GAP covariance determinant的covariance-volume通道选择算法，有(1-1/e)近似保证。算法揭示OOD失败是covariance volume的可测量崩溃。框架可无缝扩展到attention-based heads。
AI.conclusion: 研究提出了验证CNN可解释性假设的工具，发现了视觉编码器中的叠加现象和分类机制，提出了基于协方差体积的通道选择算法并解释了OOD失败，为CNN可解释性提供了新框架。

relevance_reason: The paper is about CNN interpretability/explainability for image classification (testing Spatial Funnel Hypothesis), completely unrelated to Text-to-Motion generation. Although both fields involve neural networks, this paper addresses how CNN classifiers work internally and their spatial encoding properties - not motion generation, video understanding, or any computer graphics application. The pain points (visual feature extraction from video, 2D-3D domain gap, temporal consistency in motion) are never addressed. This is fundamental research in machine learning interpretability, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Measurement Risk in Supervised Financial NLP: Rubric and Metric Sensitivity on JF-ICR
comment: 16 Pages, Submitted to IEEE Computational Intelligence in Financial Engineering and Economics (CIFEr) 2026, Tokyo, JP
summary: As LLMs become credible readers of earnings calls, investor-relations Q\&A, guidance, and disclosure language, supervised financial NLP benchmarks increasingly function as decision evidence for model selection and deployment. A hidden assumption is that gold labels make such evidence objective. This assumption breaks down when the benchmark ruler itself is sensitive to rubric wording, metric choice, or aggregation policy. We study this measurement risk on Japanese Financial Implicit-Commitment Recognition (JF-ICR; a pinned 253-item test split x 4 frontier LLMs x 5 rubrics x 3 temperatures x 5 ordinal metrics). Three findings follow. First, rubric wording materially changes model-assigned labels: R2--R3 agreement ranges from 70.0% to 83.4%, with the dominant movement near the +1 / 0 implicit-commitment boundary. This pattern is consistent with a pragmatic-boundary interpretation, but is not a validated linguistic-causality claim because the present rubric variants confound semantics, examples, and verbosity. Second, not every metric remains informative under the JF-ICR class distribution. Within-one accuracy is too easy because near misses receive credit and the majority class dominates; worst-class accuracy is too noisy because the rarest class has only two examples. Exact accuracy, macro-F1, and weighted \k{appa} are therefore the identifiable metrics under our operational rule. Third, ranking claims become more defensible only after this metric-identifiability audit: Bradley--Terry, Borda, and Ranked Pairs agree on the identifiable metric subset, while the full five-metric sweep produces disagreement on the closest pair. The contribution is not a new leaderboard, but a reporting discipline for supervised financial benchmarks whose gold labels exist and whose evaluation ruler still requires governance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在金融NLP基准测试中，"金标准"标签是否存在客观性问题。作者通过JF-ICR（日语金融隐含承诺识别）数据集，系统分析了评分标准措辞、指标选择和聚合策略对模型排名的影响，发现基准测试的"测量风险"可能导致不可靠的评估结论。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被广泛应用于财报问答、投资者关系等金融场景，监督学习基准测试成为模型选择和部署的关键决策依据。但一个隐含假设——金标准标签使评估客观可靠——实际上存在问题。作者试图验证这一假设是否成立。
AI.method: 作者设计了253项JF-ICR测试集，组合4个前沿LLM、5种评分标准、3种温度设置和5种序数指标，通过改变评分标准措辞、测试不同指标、比较多种排名方法来系统研究测量风险。
AI.result: 三个关键发现：1)评分标准措辞显著影响模型标签分配，R2-R3一致性在70.0%-83.4%之间波动，变化主要集中在隐含承诺的+1/0边界；2)并非所有指标都保持信息性——类内准确率过于简单，最差类准确率过于噪声，精确准确率、宏F1和加权κappa是可识别指标；3)仅在度量可识别性审计后排名主张才更可辩护，三种排名方法在可识别指标子集上达成一致。
AI.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献不是新的排行榜，而是一种监督金融基准测试的报告规范——即使金标准标签存在，评估标尺仍需治理。研究强调了基准测试的测量风险不可忽视，呼吁对评估方法本身进行更严格的审计和报告。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Financial NLP and LLM evaluation metrics for Japanese Financial Implied Commitment Recognition. Completely unrelated application domain - it focuses on text classification in financial documents, not Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, 3D motion generation, video generation, or any visual/motion synthesis tasks. The field, methods, and application are entirely different from the research profile.

title: Self-Supervised Learning of Plant Image Representations
summary: Automated plant recognition plays a crucial role in biodiversity monitoring and conservation, yet current approaches rely heavily on supervised learning, which is limited by the availability of expert-labeled data. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers a scalable alternative, but existing methods and training protocols are largely designed for coarse-grained visual tasks and may not transfer well to fine-grained domains such as plant species recognition. In this work, we investigate SSL for plant image representation learning. We show that commonly used augmentations in SSL pipelines - such as Gaussian blur, grayscale conversion, and solarization - are detrimental in the context of plant images, as they remove subtle discriminative cues essential for fine-grained recognition. We instead identify alternative transformations, including affine and posterization, that are better suited to this domain. We further demonstrate that training SimDINOv2 on the iNaturalist 2021 Plantae subset yields significantly stronger representations than training on ImageNet-1K, highlighting the importance of domain-specific data for SSL. Our findings are consistent across both ViT-Base and ViT-Large architectures. Moreover, our models achieve competitive performance and sometimes outperform strong supervised baselines Pl@ntCLEF and BioCLIP on downstream plant recognition tasks in few-shot settings. Overall, our results highlight the critical importance of domain-adapted augmentation strategies and dataset selection in self-supervised learning, and provide practical guidelines for building scalable models for biodiversity monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了自监督学习(SSL)在植物图像表示学习中的应用。研究发现常用的SSL图像增强方法对植物识别有害，并确定了更适合的域适应性变换（仿射和海报化）。同时发现领域特定数据（iNaturalist 2021 Plantae）对SSL性能至关重要，模型在少样本任务中可与甚至超越监督方法竞争。
AI.motivation: 现有的植物识别方法依赖于监督学习，受限于专家标注数据的可用性。自监督学习(SSL)提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，但现有的SSL方法和训练协议主要针对粗粒度视觉任务，可能不适用于植物物种识别等细粒度领域。
AI.method: 研究了SSL在植物图像表示学习中的应用。发现常用的SSL增强方法（如高斯模糊、灰度转换和太阳化）对植物图像有害，因为它们去除了细粒度识别所必需的细微区分性线索。转而确定了更好的域适应性变换，包括仿射和海报化。还证明了在大规模植物数据集iNaturalist 2021 Plantae子集上训练SimDINOv2比在ImageNet-1K上训练能产生更强的表示。
AI.result: 研究结果在ViT-Base和ViT-Large架构中保持一致。模型在少样本设置下的下游植物识别任务中表现出竞争力，有时甚至优于监督基线Pl@ntCLEF和BioCLIP。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了域适应性增强策略和数据集选择在自监督学习中的关键重要性，并为构建生物多样性监测的可扩展模型提供了实践指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about self-supervised learning for plant species image classification/recognition, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - plant identification vs 3D human motion synthesis. It does not address any of the pain points (visual feature extraction for motion, quality assessment for motion priors, bridging 2D-3D domain gap, temporal consistency in motion generation). Despite mentioning visual representations and transformers, the method is applied to botanical image classification, not motion generation.

title: Robust Learning on Heterogeneous Graphs with Heterophily: A Graph Structure Learning Approach
summary: Heterogeneous graphs with heterophily have emerged as a powerful abstraction for modeling complex real-world systems, where nodes of different types and labels interact in diverse and often non-homophilous ways. Despite recent advances, robust representation learning for such graphs remains largely unexplored, particularly in the presence of noisy or misleading connectivity. In this work, we investigate this problem and identify structural noise as a critical challenge that significantly degrades model performance. To address this issue, we propose a unified framework, Heterogeneous Graph Unified Learning (HGUL), which jointly handles heterophily and noisy graph structures. The framework consists of three complementary modules: a kNN-based graph construction module that recovers reliable local neighborhoods, a graph structure learning module that adaptively refines the adjacency by filtering noisy edges, and a heterogeneous affinity learning module that captures class-level relationships via an extended affinity matrix derived from a polynomial graph kernel. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that HGUL consistently outperforms existing methods on clean graphs and maintains strong robustness under varying levels of structural noise. The results further underscore the importance of jointly modeling heterophily and noise in heterogeneous graph learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出异构图统一学习(HGUL)框架，用于在存在结构噪声的情况下学习异构图表示。框架包含三个模块：基于kNN的图构建模块、图结构学习模块和异质亲和力学习模块。实验表明该方法在干净图和噪声图上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 异构图中的异质性使得节点间存在不同类型和标签的交互，而结构噪声会显著降低模型性能。现有方法未能很好地同时处理异质性和结构噪声问题。
AI.method: 提出HGUL框架，包含三个互补模块：(1)基于kNN的图构建模块，恢复可靠的局部邻域；(2)图结构学习模块，通过自适应细化邻接矩阵过滤噪声边；(3)异质亲和力学习模块，利用多项式图核导出的扩展亲和矩阵捕获类级关系。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的广泛实验表明，HGUL在干净图上始终优于现有方法，并在不同水平的结构噪声下保持较强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了在异构图学习中同时建模异质性和结构噪声的重要性，为鲁棒的异构图表示学习提供了新的有效框架。

relevance_reason: The paper is about graph machine learning (heterogeneous graphs, graph structure learning) which has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. This deals with node classification in graph neural networks, completely different from visual guidance extraction, 2D-to-3D motion synthesis, or diffusion-based human motion generation. The application domain and methods are entirely incompatible with the research profile.

title: Residual Gaussian Splatting for Ultra Sparse-View CBCT Reconstruction
summary: While 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) offers explicit and efficient scene representations for cone-beam computed tomography reconstruction, conventional photometric optimization inherently suffers from spectral bias under ultra sparse-view conditions, leading to over-smoothing and a loss of high-frequency anatomical details. Since wavelet transforms provide rich high-frequency information and have been widely utilized to enhance sparse reconstruction, this work integrates wavelet multi-resolution analysis with 3DGS. To circumvent the mathematical mismatch between the strict non-negativity of physical X-ray attenuation and the bipolar nature of high-frequency wavelet coefficients, we propose Residual Gaussian Splatting (RGS). Methodologically, we introduce a spectrally-decoupled Gaussian representation that stratifies the volumetric field into a geometric base component and a residual detail component. This decomposition systematically transforms explicit high-frequency fitting into a physically consistent, implicit residual compensation task. Furthermore, we devise a spectral-spatial collaborative optimization strategy to coordinate the interplay between geometric anchoring and texture refinement, effectively preventing spectral crosstalk. Extensive experiments on clinical datasets demonstrate that RGS enables the reconstructed images to capture highly refined geometric textures. It successfully resolves the trade-off between artifact suppression and detail preservation, yielding superior visual fidelity in complex trabecular and vascular structures compared to existing neural rendering baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出残差高斯溅射(RGS)方法，将小波多分辨率分析与3D高斯溅射相结合，通过频谱解耦表示和残差补偿机制解决超稀疏视角CT重建中的频谱偏差问题，实现artifact抑制与高频细节保留的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统3DGS在超稀疏视角条件下存在固有频谱偏差，导致重建图像过度平滑并丢失高频解剖细节，而小波变换虽能提供丰富高频信息但与X射线衰减的非负性物理约束存在数学不匹配问题。
AI.method: 该方法提出三大核心创新：1) 频谱解耦的高斯表示，将体积分解为基础几何分量和残差细节分量；2) 残差高斯溅射机制，将显式高频拟合转化为隐式残差补偿；3) 频空协作优化策略，协调几何锚定与纹理细化间的相互作用，防止频谱串扰。
AI.result: 在临床数据集上的广泛实验表明，RGS能够捕获精细的几何纹理，成功解决了artifact抑制与细节保留之间的权衡问题，在复杂松质骨和血管结构的视觉保真度方面显著优于现有神经渲染基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种创新性的残差高斯溅射(RGS)框架，通过结合小波多分辨率分析，有效解决了超稀疏视角条件下CT重建的频谱偏差问题，在保持非负性物理约束的同时成功恢复了高频率解剖细节。

relevance_reason: The paper is about CBCT (Cone Beam CT) medical imaging reconstruction using 3D Gaussian Splatting, which is entirely different from Text-to-Motion. The application domain is medical tomography, not motion synthesis or human motion generation. Even though both involve "3D Gaussian Splatting", this is used for tomographic reconstruction while the research profile needs diffusion-based motion synthesis. The pain points are completely unrelated - this paper addresses spectral bias in sparse CT views, not extracting visual features from videos for motion generation or bridging 2D-3D domain for animation.

title: Leading Across the Spectrum of Human-AI Relationships: A Conceptual Framework for Increasingly Heterogeneous Teams
summary:
What shapes a consequential decision when human and artificial intelligence work on it together? The answer is becoming harder to see. A decision may look human-led after AI has set the frame, or appear automated while human judgment still carries decisive force. This paper offers a leadership-facing spectrum to see those relationships within a bounded mandate: Pure Human, Centaur (human-dominant, with AI in the loop), Co-equal, Minotaur (AI-dominant, with humans in the loop), and Pure AI.
  The spectrum asks where leadership work occurs: who frames the problem, who redirects the work, and who can answer for what follows. The five positions are landmarks that help leaders recognize configurations as they layer, drift, or change in a single decision. The central risk is misrecognition: leaders may keep a human-centered story in place after decision-shaping authority has shifted elsewhere. They may believe oversight remains meaningful when it has become ceremonial, or keep humans in the loop when their involvement could make the decision worse. The framework introduces co-adaptability, the capacity of a configuration to improve as human and non-human participants adjust together, and places it within heterogeneous teaming, where participants may vary by number, substrate, model architecture, capability, speed, memory, and form of participation.
  The aim is practical: to help strategic leaders and those designing or deploying AI systems recognize the configuration at work, notice when it shifts, and judge whether it fits the decision before them. These configurations will shape how power, responsibility, and trust are distributed in organizational life. Whether the futures they help create remain governable and worth inhabiting will depend on leaders who can see, early enough, where and how consequential decisions are actually being shaped.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个人机协作决策的光谱框架，包含五种配置：纯人类、赛托神（人主导）、平等协作、牛头怪（AI主导）和纯AI。该框架帮助领导者识别决策中的权力配置、谁定义问题、谁重新定向工作、谁承担责任 central risk在于误认：领导者可能保持人类中心的故事而决策权力已转移。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在组织决策中的作用增强，决策的外观与实际权力配置之间的差距越来越大。领导者难以识别真正的决策塑造者是谁，也难以判断人机协作的配置是否适合特定决策。现有研究缺乏帮助领导者理解和可视化这些配置的工具。
AI.method: 本文采用概念框架分析方法，整合了人机协作、异质团队、适应性和分布式决策等多领域理论，提出了"可共同适应性"（co-adaptability）概念，并设计了从纯人类到纯AI的五位置光谱。
AI.result: 该框架识别了五种决策配置位置及其关键问题：谁框架问题、谁重新定向工作、谁为后果负责central risk是"误认"——领导者保持人类中心叙事而权力已转移、 oversight变成仪式性、或人类参与反而使决策变差。
AI.conclusion: 领导者需要能够识别决策配置如何随时间演变、漂移或改变，判断配置是否适合特定决策。这将塑造组织生活中权力、责任和信任的分配方式，最终影响我们创造的未来是否可治理和值得居住。

relevance_reason: This paper is about human-AI collaboration in organizational decision-making and leadership frameworks, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The paper deals with management theory, organizational behavior, and human-AI team dynamics, not computer graphics, video generation, or 3D motion synthesis. There is no match whatsoever in application domain, methods, or research goals.

title: Revealing the Impact of Visual Text Style on Attribute-based Descriptions Produced by Large Visual Language Models
comment: Accepted by ICMR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/XiaomengWang-AI/The-Impact-of-Visual-Text-style-on-Attribute-based-Descriptions-Produced-by-LVLMs
summary: When the visual style of text is considered, a wide variety can be observed in font, color, and size. However, when a word is read, its meaning is independent of the style in which it has been written or rendered. In this paper, we investigate whether, and how, the style in which a word is visualized in an image impacts the description that a Large Visual Language Model (LVLM) provides for the concept to which that word refers. Specifically, we investigate how functional text styles (readability-oriented, e.g., black sans-serif) versus decorative styles (display-oriented, e.g., colored cursive/script) affect LVLMs' descriptions of a concept in terms of the attributes of that concept. Our experiments study the situation in which the LVLM is able to correctly identify the concept referred to by a visual text, i.e., by a word or words rendered as an image, and in which the visual text style should not influence the attribute-based description that the LVLM produces. Our experimental results reveal that even when the concept is correctly identified, text style influences the model's attribute-based descriptions of the concept. Our findings demonstrate non-trivial style leakage from text style into semantic inference and motivate style-aware evaluation and mitigation for LVLM-based multimedia systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉文本样式（如字体、颜色等）如何影响大型视觉语言模型对概念的语义描述。实验发现即使LVLM正确识别概念，文本样式仍会泄露到属性描述中，存在非平凡的样式泄露问题。
AI.motivation: 研究背景在于文字的视觉样式多样（字体、颜色、大小等），但文字含义应与样式无关。研究动机是探究视觉文本样式是否影响以及如何影响LVLM对概念属性的描述。
AI.method: 实验比较功能文本样式（ readability-oriented，如黑色无衬线字体）与装饰样式（ display-oriented，如彩色手写体）对LVLM概念属性描述的影响。在LVLM能正确识别视觉文本所指概念的条件下进行研究。
AI.result: 实验结果揭示即使概念被正确识别，文本样式仍然影响模型的属性描述，说明存在从文本样式到语义推理的非平凡样式泄露。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现视觉文本样式会影响LVLM的语义推断，存在样式泄露问题。这提示需要针对LVLM-based多媒体系统进行样式感知的评估和缓解。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses visual text style analysis for Large Visual Language Models (LVLMs) - specifically how fonts, colors affect attribute descriptions. This is completely outside the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion domain. The paper is about text semantics understanding, not 3D motion generation, video-to-motion, or any computer graphics motion synthesis. While it mentions "Large Visual Language Models," these are used for text attribute analysis, not for extracting visual guidance features for motion generation. The application domain is entirely different (text/visual language understanding vs text-to-motion), none of the pain points are addressed, and no motion generation methods are involved.

title: RIHA: Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment for Radiology Report Generation
comment: Accepted by Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI)
summary: Radiology report generation (RRG) has emerged as a promising approach to alleviate radiologists' workload and reduce human errors by automatically generating diagnostic reports from medical images. A key challenge in RRG is achieving fine-grained alignment between complex visual features and the hierarchical structure of long-form radiology reports. Although recent methods have improved image-text representation learning, they often treat reports as flat sequences, overlooking their structured sections and semantic hierarchies. This simplification hinders precise cross-modal alignment and weakens RRG accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose RIHA (Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment Transformer), a novel end-to-end framework that performs multi-level alignment between radiological images and their corresponding reports across paragraph, sentence, and word levels. This hierarchical alignment enables more precise cross-modal mapping, essential for capturing the nuanced semantics embedded in clinical narratives. Specifically, RIHA introduces a Visual Feature Pyramid (VFP) to extract multi-scale visual features and a Text Feature Pyramid (TFP) to represent multi-granularity textual structures. These components are integrated through a Cross-modal Hierarchical Alignment (CHA) module, leveraging optimal transport to effectively align visual and textual features across various levels. Furthermore, we incorporate Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) into the decoder to model spatial and semantic relationships among tokens, enhancing the token-level alignment between visual features and generated text. Extensive experiments on two benchmark chest X-ray datasets, IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR, demonstrate that RIHA outperforms existing state-of-the-art models in both natural language generation and clinical efficacy metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RIHA框架，通过视觉特征金字塔(VFP)和文本特征金字塔(TFP)实现多层级（段落、句子、单词）对齐，利用最优传输进行跨模态对齐，在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前放射学报告生成方法将报告视为扁平序列，忽略了报告的结构化段落和语义层次，阻碍了跨模态精确对齐，影响了报告生成的准确性。
AI.method: 提出RIHA框架，包含：1)视觉特征金字塔(VFP)提取多尺度视觉特征；2)文本特征金字塔(TFP)表示多粒度文本结构；3)跨模态层级对齐(CHA)模块，利用最优传输进行多层级对齐；4)在解码器中引入相对位置编码(RPE)增强token级对齐。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR两个基准胸部X光数据集上，RIHA在自然语言生成和临床效能指标方面均优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过层级对齐策略有效解决了放射学报告生成中视觉特征与文本层级结构对齐的问题，提升了生成报告的准确性和临床效能。

relevance_reason: The paper is about radiology report generation from chest X-ray images (medical domain), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While both fields use visual feature extraction, the application domains are entirely different - one generates text reports from medical images, the other generates 3D human motion from video/text. The methods (visual/text feature pyramids, optimal transport) are also specific to medical imaging and not applicable to motion generation tasks like diffusion-based motion synthesis or video-to-motion conversion.

title: PRTS: A Primitive Reasoning and Tasking System via Contrastive Representations
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models advance robotic control via strong visual-linguistic priors. However, existing VLAs predominantly frame pretraining as supervised behavior cloning, overlooking the fundamental nature of robot learning as a goal-reaching process that requires understanding temporal task progress. We present \textbf{PRTS} (\textbf{P}rimitive \textbf{R}easoning and \textbf{T}asking \textbf{S}ystem), a VLA foundation model that reformulates pretraining through Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning. By treating language instructions as goals and employing contrastive reinforcement learning, PRTS learns a unified embedding space where the inner product of state-action and goal embeddings approximates the log-discounted goal occupancy, the probability of reaching the language-specified goal from the current state-action, quantitatively assessing physical feasibility beyond static semantic matching. PRTS draws this dense goal-reachability supervision directly from offline trajectories without reward annotations, and folds it into the VLM backbone via a role-aware causal mask, incurring negligible overhead over vanilla behavior cloning. This paradigm endows the high-level reasoning system with intrinsic goal reachability awareness, bridging semantic reasoning and temporal task progress, and further benefits goal-conditioned action prediction. Pretrained on 167B tokens of diverse manipulation and embodied-reasoning data, PRTS reaches state-of-the-art performance on LIBERO, LIBERO-Pro, LIBERO-Plus, SimplerEnv, and a real-world suite of 14 complex tasks, with particularly substantial gains on long-horizon, contact-rich, and zero-shot novel-instruction settings, confirming that injecting goal-reachability awareness significantly improves both execution success and long-horizon planning of general-purpose robotic foundation policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRTS，一个基于目标条件强化学习的VLA基础模型，通过对比强化学习将语言指令作为目标，学习统一嵌入空间，近似对数折扣目标占 occupancy，评估物理可行性。预训练167B token数据，在多个基准上取得最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型将预训练视为监督行为克隆，忽略机器人学习的本质是目标达成过程，需要理解时间任务进展。现有方法缺乏对目标可达性的内在理解。
AI.method: 将语言指令作为目标，采用对比强化学习，学习统一嵌入空间，使状态-动作和目标嵌入的内积近似对数折扣目标占 mobility。从离线轨迹中直接获取密集的目标可达性监督，通过角色感知因果掩码注入VLM主干。
AI.result: 在LIBERO、LIBERO-Pro、LIBERO-Plus、SimplerEnv和14个真实世界复杂任务上达到最先进性能。特别在长 horizon、接触丰富和零样本新指令设置下有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 注入目标可达性意识显著提高了通用机器人基础政策的执行成功率和长 horizon规划能力，弥合了语义推理和时间任务进展之间的差距。

relevance_reason: This paper is about robot manipulation and control (robotics), not human motion generation for computer graphics. The application domain is ROBOTICS, not Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While both fields may use Vision Language Models, the goals are completely different: the paper focuses on goal-conditioned reinforcement learning for robot task execution (manipulation), whereas the research profile is about generating human motion from text/video for graphics/animations. Robot motion is NOT the same as human motion generation - these are distinct application domains.

title: World2Minecraft: Occupancy-Driven Simulated Scenes Construction
summary: Embodied intelligence requires high-fidelity simulation environments to support perception and decision-making, yet existing platforms often suffer from data contamination and limited flexibility. To mitigate this, we propose World2Minecraft to convert real-world scenes into structured Minecraft environments based on 3D semantic occupancy prediction. In the reconstructed scenes, we can effortlessly perform downstream tasks such as Vision-Language Navigation(VLN). However, we observe that reconstruction quality heavily depends on accurate occupancy prediction, which remains limited by data scarcity and poor generalization in existing models. We introduce a low-cost, automated, and scalable data acquisition pipeline for creating customized occupancy datasets, and demonstrate its effectiveness through MinecraftOcc, a large-scale dataset featuring 100,165 images from 156 richly detailed indoor scenes. Extensive experiments show that our dataset provides a critical complement to existing datasets and poses a significant challenge to current SOTA methods. These findings contribute to improving occupancy prediction and highlight the value of World2Minecraft in providing a customizable and editable platform for personalized embodied AI research. Project page:https://world2minecraft.github.io/.

AI.tldr: World2Minecraft是一个将真实世界场景转换为结构化Minecraft环境的系统,基于3D语义占用预测。该研究针对现有嵌入式智能模拟平台存在数据污染和灵活性不足的问题,提出构建可定制、可编辑的Minecraft环境用于感知和决策任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的嵌入式智能模拟平台存在数据污染和灵活性受限的问题,而高质量的模拟环境对于支持感知和决策至关重要。更重要的是,重建质量高度依赖于准确的占用预测,但现有模型受限于数据稀缺和泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出三个核心贡献:(1)World2Minecraft系统 - 将真实世界场景基于3D语义占用预测转换为结构化Minecraft环境;(2)低成本、自动化的可扩展数据采集 pipeline - 用于创建自定义占用数据集;(3)MinecraftOcc大规模数据集 - 包含156个室内场景的100,165张图像。
AI.result: 实验表明数据集为现有数据集提供了关键补充,并对当前SOTA方法提出了重大挑战。该研究改善了占用预测,并突出了World2Minecraft作为可定制和可编辑平台在个性化嵌入式AI研究中的价值。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功构建了World2Minecraft系统和一个大规模占用预测数据集MinecraftOcc,通过自动化数据采集pipeline解决了数据稀缺问题。该工作为嵌入式智能研究提供了新的可定制平台,并在视觉语言导航(VLN)等下游任务中展示了应用潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D semantic occupancy prediction for constructing Minecraft environments, which is completely unrelated to the Text-to-Motion field. The application domain is entirely different - it's about scene reconstruction and simulation environment building, not about generating 3D human motion from text or video. The methods (occupancy prediction) and goals (creating customizable Minecraft environments) have no connection to the pain points of text-to-motion generation such as extracting visual guidance features, bridging 2D-3D domain gap, or ensuring temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: Belief-Guided Inference Control for Large Language Model Services via Verifiable Observations
summary: In black-box large language model (LLM) services, response reliability is often only partially observable at decision time, while stronger inference pathways incur substantial computational cost, inducing a budgeted sequential decision problem: for each request, the system should decide whether the default low-cost response is sufficiently reliable or whether additional computation should be allocated to improve response quality. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Ver}ifiable \textbf{O}bservations for Risk-aware \textbf{I}nference \textbf{C}ontrol (\textsc{Veroic}), a framework for adaptive inference control in black-box LLM settings, which formulates request-time control as a \textit{partially observable Markov decision process} to capture partial observability and sequential budget coupling. It constructs a lightweight verifiable observation channel from the input-output pair by aggregating heterogeneous quality signals into a belief state over latent response reliability, which is then used by a budget-aware policy to decide whether to return the default output or trigger a higher-cost inference pathway. Experiments on diverse tasks show that \textsc{Veroic} achieves improved quality-cost trade-offs, stronger risk estimation and calibration, and more robust long-horizon inference control than competitive baselines.

AI.tldr: 在黑盒LLM服务中，VEROIC框架通过将请求时控制建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程(POMDP)，利用从输入输出对聚合的质量信号构建可信观察通道，用于在低成本默认响应和高成本推理路径之间进行自适应决策。
AI.motivation: 黑盒LLM服务的响应可靠性仅部分可观察，更强的推理路径伴随高昂计算成本，导致需要在响应质量和成本之间进行预算顺序决策权衡。
AI.method: 提出VEROIC框架，将请求时控制建模为POMDP以捕捉部分可观测性和顺序预算耦合。该框架从输入输出对聚合异构质量信号构建轻量级可信观察通道，形成对潜在响应可靠性的信念状态，然后由预算感知策略决定返回默认输出或触发更高成本推理路径。
AI.result: 在多种任务上的实验表明，VEROIC实现了更好的质量-成本权衡、更强的风险估计和校准精度，以及比竞争基线更稳健的长视域推理控制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为黑盒LLM服务的自适应推理控制提供了一种有效的POMDP框架，通过可信观察机制实现质量与成本的灵活平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM inference control and cost-quality tradeoff in black-box LLM services using POMDP modeling. It has no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, video generation, motion generation, visual feature extraction, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is completely different - this is about LLM services, not graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Assessing Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma Vascular Invasion: the PDACVI Benchmark
summary: Surgical resection remains the only potentially curative treatment for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), and eligibility depends on accurate assessment of vascular invasion (VI), i.e., tumor extension into adjacent critical vessels. Despite its importance for preoperative staging and surgical planning, computational VI assessment remains underexplored. Two major challenges are the lack of public datasets and the diagnostic ambiguity at the tumor-vessel interface, which leads to substantial inter-rater variability even among expert radiologists. To address these limitations, we introduce the CURVAS-PDACVI Dataset and Challenge, an open benchmark for uncertainty-aware AI in PDAC staging based on a densely annotated dataset with five independent expert annotations per scan. We also propose a multi-metric evaluation framework that extends beyond spatial overlap to include probabilistic calibration and VI assessment. Evaluation of six state-of-the-art methods shows that strong global volumetric overlap does not necessarily translate into reliable performance at clinically critical tumor-vessel interfaces. In particular, methods optimized for binary segmentation perform competitively on average overlap metrics, but often degrade in high-complexity cases with low expert consensus, either collapsing in volume or overextending at uncertain boundaries. In contrast, methods that model inter-rater disagreement produce better calibrated probabilistic maps and show greater robustness in these ambiguous cases. The benchmark highlights the limitations of volumetric accuracy as a proxy for localized surgical utility, motivating uncertainty-aware probabilistic models for preoperative decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出了CURVAS-PDAT数据集和挑战赛，这是一个基于密集标注数据集的PDAC分期不确定性感知AI开放基准，包含5位独立专家注释。评估显示全局体积重叠不能代表局部手术适用性，不确定性感知概率模型对术前决策更有价值。
AI.motivation: 手术切除是胰腺导管腺癌(PDAC)唯一潜在治愈方法，但 eligibility取决于准确评估血管侵袭(VI)。尽管VI对术前分期和手术计划很重要，但计算VI评估仍未得到充分探索。主要挑战包括缺乏公共数据集，以及肿瘤-血管界面处的诊断模糊性，即使在专家放射科医生之间也存在显著的观察者间变异性。
AI.method: 1) 构建了带有5位独立专家注释的密集标注数据集CURVAS-PDACVI；2) 提出了超越空间重叠的多指标评估框架，包括概率校准和血管侵袭评估；3) 对六种最先进方法进行了系统评估
AI.result: 六种最先进方法的评估显示，强大的全局体积重叠不一定能转化为肿瘤-血管界面处的可靠性能。针对二分类分割优化的方法在平均重叠指标上具有竞争力，但在低专家共识的高复杂度病例中往往会崩溃或过度扩展。相比之下，建模观察者间分歧的方法产生更好校准的概率图，在模糊情况下表现出更大的稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了CURVAS-PDACVI数据集和挑战赛，为PDAC术前分期中的不确定性感知AI提供了开放基准。六种最先进方法的评估表明，全局体积重叠性能良好的方法在临床关键肿瘤-血管界面上表现不佳，特别是在专家共识度低的复杂疑难病例中会出现体积崩溃或过度扩展。建模专家间分歧的方法能产生更好校准的概率图，在模糊情况下表现更稳健。基准测试强调了体积准确性作为局部手术实用性的局限性，激励了用于术前决策制定的不确定性感知概率模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging for pancreatic cancer diagnosis (PDACVI Benchmark), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While both may use deep learning/diffusion methods, the application domains are entirely different: medical image analysis for cancer staging vs 3D human motion generation from text/video. The paper addresses vascular invasion assessment in CT scans, not motion generation, visual guidance feature extraction, or temporal consistency in motion synthesis.

title: In-Context Examples Suppress Scientific Knowledge Recall in LLMs
summary: Scientific reasoning rarely stops at what is directly observable; it often requires uncovering hidden structure from data. From estimating reaction constants in chemistry to inferring demand elasticities in economics, this latent structure recovery is what distinguishes scientific reasoning from curve fitting. Large language models (LLMs) can often recall and apply relevant scientific formulas, but we show that this ability is surprisingly easy to suppress. We show that adding in-context examples makes models rely less on pretrained domain knowledge, even when those examples are generated by the very same formula. Rather than reinforcing knowledge-driven derivation, examples shift computation toward empirical pattern fitting. We document this knowledge displacement on 60 latent structure recovery tasks across five scientific domains, 6,000 trials, and four models. This displacement is consistent across domains, but its accuracy consequences depend on how the displaced strategy compares to the one that replaces it: the same shift can lower accuracy, leave it unchanged, or appear to improve it. In all cases, however, the model shifts away from knowledge-driven reasoning. For practitioners deploying LLMs on scientific tasks, the message is cautionary: in-context examples may displace, rather than reinforce, the knowledge they are intended to support.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了大型语言模型(LLM)在科学任务中从不直接可观测数据恢复潜在结构的能力，发现添加上下文示例反而会抑制模型使用预训练领域知识，导致从知识驱动推导转向经验模式拟合。
AI.motivation: 科学推理需要从数据中揭示隐藏结构(如化学中的反应常数、经济学中的需求弹性)，这与简单曲线拟合不同。LLM虽能回忆和应用科学公式，但这种能力 surprisingly容易被抑制。
AI.method: 在5个科学领域设计60个潜在结构恢复任务，进行6000次试验，测试4种模型，评估添加上下文示例对模型行为的影响。
AI.result: 添加上下文示例使模型较少依赖预训练领域知识，转向经验模式拟合。知识位移效应在各领域一致，但准确率影响因领域而异：可能降低、准确率不变或看似提升。
AI.conclusion: 对于在科学任务中部署LLM的实践者而言：上下文示例可能反而取代而非强化其本应支持的知识，使用时需谨慎。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM knowledge recall in scientific tasks - it studies how in-context examples affect large language models' ability to use pretrained knowledge. The application domain is NLP/AI research, NOT Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. None of the methods (video generation, VLM, visual feature extraction, diffusion-based motion synthesis) are addressed. The paper doesn't involve any visual guidance features, 2D-to-3D motion bridging, or temporal motion consistency - these are the core pain points of the research profile.

title: Fake3DGS: A Benchmark for 3D Manipulation Detection in Neural Rendering
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2026. Code and data: https://github.com/iot-unimore/Fake3DGS
summary: Recent advances in 3D reconstruction and neural rendering,particularly 3D Gaussian Splatting, make it feasible and simple to edit 3D scenes and re-render them as highly realistic images. Therefore, security concerns arise regarding the authenticity of 3D content. Despite this threat, 3D fake detection remains largely unexplored in the literature, and most existing work is limited to 2D space. Therefore, in this paper, we formalize the concept of 3D fake detection and introduce Fake3DGS, a dataset of 3D Gaussian splatting scenes and corresponding rendered views, where fake images are produced by controlled manipulations of geometry, appearance, and spatial layout, while preserving high visual realism. Using this benchmark, we demonstrate that current state-of-the-art 2D detectors struggle to distinguish between original and 3D manipulated images. To bridge this gap, we introduce a 3D-aware detection method that leverages multi-view coherence and features derived from the Gaussian splatting representation. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial improvement in recognizing modified 3D content, underscoring the validity of the new dataset and the necessity for authenticity assessment techniques that extend beyond 2D evidence. Code and data are publicly released for future investigations.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次提出3D Gaussian Splatting假内容检测问题，构建Fake3DGS基准数据集，并提出利用多视图一致性的3D感知检测方法，验证了现有2D检测器的局限性以及3D感知方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 3D重建和神经渲染技术（尤其是3D Gaussian Splatting）的发展使得编辑3D场景并生成高度逼真的图像变得简单可行，这引发了对3D内容真实性的安全担忧。3D假内容检测在文献中基本上未被探索，现有工作仅限于2D空间。
AI.method: 提出Fake3DGS数据集，包含3D Gaussian Splatting场景和相应的渲染视图，假图像通过对几何、外观和空间布局进行受控操作同时保持高视觉真实性生成。采用多视图一致性和Gaussian Splatting表示的特征构建3D感知检测方法。
AI.result: 当前最先进的2D检测器难以区分原始图像和3D操纵图像，提出的3D感知方法在识别修改后的3D内容方面显示出实质性改进。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集有效证明了3D假内容检测的必要性和可行性，超出2D证据的真实性质评估技术是必要的。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D manipulation detection/fake content detection in Neural Rendering (Fake3DGS), which is completely different from Text-to-Motion. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs, while this paper focuses on detecting manipulated/synthetic 3D Gaussian Splatting content. The application domains are entirely different - motion generation vs. content authenticity verification. While both touch on 3D graphics, they address fundamentally different problems with no overlap in methods or objectives.

title: SpatialGrammar: A Domain-Specific Language for LLM-Based 3D Indoor Scene Generation
summary: Automatically generating interactive 3D indoor scenes from natural language is crucial for virtual reality, gaming, and embodied AI. However, existing LLM-based approaches often suffer from spatial errors and collisions, in part because common scene representations-raw coordinates or verbose code-are difficult for models to reason about 3D spatial relationships and physical constraints. We propose SpatialGrammar, a domain-specific language that represents gravity-aligned indoor layouts as BEV grid placements with deterministic compilation to valid 3D geometry, enabling verifiable constraint checking. Building on this representation, we develop (1) SG-Agent, a closed-loop system that uses compiler feedback to iteratively refine scenes and enforce collision constraints, and (2) SG-Mini, a 104M-parameter model trained entirely on compiler-validated synthetic data. Across 159 test scenes spanning five scenarios of different complexity, SG-Agent improves spatial fidelity and physical plausibility over prior methods, while SG-Mini performs competitively against larger LLM-based baselines on single-shot generation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 论文提出SpatialGrammar领域特定语言，将室内布局表示为BEV网格 placements，通过确定性编译生成有效3D几何并支持约束检查。基于此语言开发了SG-Agent闭环系统和SG-Mini 104M参数模型。实验表明SG-Agent在空间保真度和物理合理性上优于先验方法，SG-Mini与大型LLM基线模型相当。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM方法在生成交互式3D室内场景时存在空间错误和碰撞问题，原因在于常见的场景表示（原始坐标或冗长代码）难以让模型推理3D空间关系和物理约束。
AI.method: 提出SpatialGrammar领域特定语言，将重力对齐的室内布局表示为BEV网格放置，可确定性编译为有效3D几何。在此基础上开发了：(1) SG-Agent闭环系统，使用编译器反馈迭代优化场景并强制执行碰撞约束；(2) SG-Mini 104M参数模型，完全在编译器验证的合成数据上训练。
AI.result: 在159个测试场景（涵盖5个不同复杂度场景）中，SG-Agent相比先验方法提高了空间保真度和物理合理性；SG-Mini在单次生成场景中与更大的LLM基线模型表现相当。
AI.conclusion: SpatialGrammar通过领域特定语言实现可验证的约束检查，闭环反馈机制有效减少了空间错误和碰撞，小规模模型也能达到 competitive 性能。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D Indoor Scene Generation (static scene layouts), which is entirely different from Text-to-Motion (human motion generation). The application domains are completely mismatched: this paper generates static 3D room layouts with objects, while the research profile needs to generate temporal 3D motion sequences (human motion) from video/text inputs. Methods also differ: the paper uses LLM + domain-specific language, while the profile needs video generation models, VLM, and diffusion-based motion synthesis. The pain points are unrelated - this paper addresses spatial errors in scene layouts, not temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: ClipTBP: Clip-Pair based Temporal Boundary Prediction with Boundary-Aware Learning for Moment Retrieval
summary: Video moment retrieval is the task of retrieving specific segments of a video corresponding to a given text query. Recent studies have been conducted to improve multimodal alignment performance through visual-linguistic similarity learning at the snippet-level and transformer-based temporal boundary regression. However, existing models do not calculate similarity by considering the relationships between multiple answer segments that match the query. Therefore, existing models are easily influenced by visually similar segments in the surrounding context. Existing models calculate similarity at the snippet-level and ignore the relationships between multiple answer segments corresponding to a single query. Therefore, they struggle to exclude segments irrelevant to the query. To address this issues, we propose ClipTBP, a clip-pair temporal boundary prediction framework based on boundary-aware learning. ClipTBP introduces a clip-level alignment loss for explicitly learning the semantic relationship between answer segments. ClipTBP also predicts accurate temporal boundaries by applying both main boundary loss and auxiliary boundary loss. ClipTBP consistently improves performance when applied to various existing models and demonstrates more robust boundary prediction performance even in ambiguous query scenarios.

AI.tldr: ClipTBP是一种基于边界感知学习的片段对时序边界预测框架，通过引入片段级对齐损失学习答案片段间的语义关系，并采用主辅边界损失提高边界预测精度，有效解决了现有模型忽略多答案片段关系的问题，在模糊查询场景下表现更稳健。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频时刻检索模型在处理多答案片段关系时存在不足。它们仅在片段级别计算相似度，忽略了与同一查询匹配的多个答案片段之间的关系。这导致模型容易受到周围视觉相似片段的干扰，在模糊查询场景下难以准确排除不相关片段。
AI.method: 提出ClipTBP框架，包含两个核心创新：1) 引入片段级对齐损失（clip-level alignment loss），用于显式学习答案片段之间的语义关系；2) 应用主边界损失和辅助边界损失来预测精确的时间边界。
AI.result: ClipTBP在各种现有模型上均能持续提升性能，即使在模糊查询场景下也表现出更稳健的边界预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过引入考虑多答案片段关系的clip-level对齐损失，有效解决了传统方法忽略片段间关系的问题。框架的通用性使其可以作为插件应用于多种现有模型，具有较强的实用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video moment retrieval (finding temporal boundaries in videos based on text queries), which is a video understanding/localization task, NOT a Text-to-Motion generation task. The research profile deals with Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from visual/text inputs), while this paper deals with retrieving/finding moments in existing videos. The application domains are fundamentally different - motion generation vs. video semantic understanding. Although the paper uses some visual feature extraction concepts, it does not address any of the pain points: bridging 2D-to-3D domain gap, generating 3D motion, or ensuring temporal consistency in motion output.

title: Trace-Level Analysis of Information Contamination in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Reasoning over heterogeneous artifacts (PDFs, spreadsheets, slide decks, etc.) increasingly occurs within structured agent workflows that iteratively extract, transform, and reference external information. In these workflows, uncertainty is not merely an input-quality issue: it can redirect decomposition and routing decisions, reshape intermediate state, and produce qualitatively different execution trajectories. We study this phenomenon by treating uncertainty as a controlled variable: we inject structured perturbations into artifact-derived representations, execute fixed workflows under comprehensive logging, and quantify contamination via trace divergence in plans, tool invocations, and intermediate state. Across 614 paired runs on 32 GAIA tasks with three different language models, we find a decoupling: workflows may diverge substantially yet recover correct answers, or remain structurally similar while producing incorrect outputs. We characterize three manifestation types: silent semantic corruption, behavioral detours with recovery, and combined structural disruption and their control-flow signatures (rerouting, extended execution, early termination). We measure operational costs and characterize why commonly used verification guardrails fail to intercept contamination. We contribute (i) a formal taxonomy of contamination manifestations in structured workflows, (ii) a trace-based measurement framework for detecting and localizing contamination across agent interactions, and (iii) empirical evidence with implications for targeted verification, defensive design, and cost control.

AI.tldr: 研究在结构化Agent工作流中处理异构文档（PDF、电子表格、幻灯片等）时，不确定性如何影响工作流的执行轨迹和输出结果。通过注入受控的不确定性扰动，在614次配对运行中分析污染的显现类型、控制签名和运营成本。
AI.motivation: 当前不确定性不仅仅是输入质量问题，它能够重定向分解和路由决策、重塑中间状态，并产生定性不同的执行轨迹。这一现象在异构文档处理的结构化Agent工作流中越来越普遍，但目前缺乏系统性的研究。
AI.method: 将不确定性视为受控变量：向文档衍生的表示中注入结构化扰动，在综合日志记录下执行固定工作流，通过计划、工具调用和中间状态的轨迹差异来量化污染程度。在32个GAIA任务上使用三种不同语言模型进行了614次配对运行。
AI.result: 发现了一种解耦现象：工作流可能大幅偏离但仍能恢复正确答案，或保持结构相似却产生错误输出。识别了三种污染显现类型：静默语义腐败、带恢复的行为绕道、以及组合的结构性中断，并表征了它们的控制流签名（重路由、扩展执行、早期终止）。测量了运营成本，并解释了常用验证 Guardrails 为何无法拦截污染。
AI.conclusion: 贡献了三个方面：(i) 结构化工作流中污染显现的正式分类体系；(ii) 用于在Agent交互中检测和定位污染的基于轨迹的测量框架；(iii) 具有针对性验证、防御性设计和成本控制影响的实证证据。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent systems handling heterogeneous documents (PDFs, spreadsheets) and analyzing how uncertainty affects workflow execution. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), visual feature extraction, 3D motion generation, or diffusion-based motion synthesis. The application domain is completely different - it's about AI agents and document processing, not generating 3D human motion from text or video inputs.

title: SECOS: Semantic Capture for Rigorous Classification in Open-World Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: In open-world semi-supervised learning (OWSSL), a model learns from labeled data and unlabeled data containing both known and novel classes. In practical OWSSL applications, models are expected to perform rigorous classification by directly selecting the most semantically relevant label from a candidate set for each sample. Existing OWSSL methods fail to achieve this because novel samples are trained without explicit supervision, and these methods lack mechanisms to extract latent semantic information, resulting in predicted labels that have no semantic correspondence to candidate textual labels. To address this, we introduce SEmantic Capture for Open-world Semi-supervised learning (SECOS), which directly predicts textual labels from the candidate set without post-processing, meeting the requirements of practical OWSSL applications. SECOS leverages external knowledge to extract and align semantic representations across modalities for both known and novel classes, providing explicit supervisory signals for training novel classes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that even when existing OWSSL methods are evaluated under the more lenient post-hoc matching setting, SECOS still surpasses them by up to 5.4\% without such assistance, highlighting its superior effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/ganchi-huanggua/OSSL-Classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SECOS方法，解决开放世界半监督学习中如何直接从不含语义信息的候选标签集中为样本选择最相关的文本标签的问题，通过外部知识提取和跨模态语义对齐来为已知和未知类别提供监督信号。
AI.motivation: 现有OWSSL方法存在两个关键缺陷：(1) 未知类别样本训练缺乏显式监督信号；(2) 无法提取潜在语义信息，导致预测标签与候选文本标签之间缺乏语义对应关系。这使得现有方法无法满足实际应用中需要直接从候选集选择最相关标签的严格分类要求。
AI.method: SECOS利用外部知识（可能为知识图谱或预训练语言模型）提取并对齐跨模态语义表示，同时为已知类别和未知类别提供显式的监督信号进行训练，使模型能够直接从不含语义的候选标签集合中预测最相关的文本标签。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使在更宽松的post-hoc匹配设置下评估现有OWSSL方法，SECOS仍能超越它们最高达5.4%，且无需任何辅助处理，证明了其卓越的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SECOS成功实现了开放世界半监督学习的严格分类要求，通过外部知识提取语义信息并与候选标签对齐，为未知类别提供监督信号。这一方法不仅满足了实际应用需求，而且在性能上也显著优于现有方法，验证了语义对齐在OWSSL任务中的重要性。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Open-World Semi-Supervised Learning (OWSSL) for classification, which is completely different from the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion field. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs, while this paper focuses on classification tasks using external knowledge and cross-modal semantic alignment. None of the pain points in the profile (visual feature extraction for motion, quality assessment, bridging 2D-3D domain gap, temporal consistency) are addressed. The application domain is entirely different - classification vs motion generation.

title: Decoding Scientific Experimental Images: The SPUR Benchmark for Perception, Understanding, and Reasoning
summary: We introduce SPUR, a comprehensive benchmark for scientific experimental image perception, understanding, and reasoning, comprising 4,264 question-answering (QA) pairs derived from 1,084 expert-curated images. SPUR features three key innovations: (1) Panel-Level Fine-Grained Perception: evaluating the visual perception of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) across three dimensions (numerical, morphological, and information localization) on six fine-grained panel types; (2) Cross-Panel Relation Understanding: utilizing complex images with an average of 14.3 panels per sample to evaluate MLLMs' ability to decipher intricate cross-panel relations; (3) Expert-Level Reasoning: assessment of qualitative and quantitative reasoning across five experimental paradigms to determine if models can infer conclusions from evidence as human experts do. Comprehensive evaluation of 20 MLLMs and four multimodal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT) methods reveals that current models fall significantly short of the expert-level requirements for scientific image interpretation, underscoring a critical bottleneck in AI for Science (AI4S) research.

AI.tldr: SPUR是一个综合性的科学实验图像感知、理解与推理基准测试，包含4,264个问答对和1,084个专家精选图像，从三个维度评估多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在科学图像解释方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在科学实验图像理解方面存在关键瓶颈，缺乏专门的评估基准来衡量模型是否具备专家级别的科学图像解释能力，这严重阻碍了AI4S（AI for Science）研究的发展。
AI.method: 构建了包含三种创新评估维度的基准测试：(1)面板级细粒度感知：从数值、形态和信息定位三个维度评估MLLMs在六种细粒度面板类型上的视觉感知能力；(2)跨面板关系理解：使用平均每样本14.3个面板的复杂图像评估模型解析跨面板关系的能力；(3)专家级推理：评估模型在五种实验范式中的定性和定量推理能力，能否像人类专家一样从证据推断结论。对20个MLLMs和4个多模态思维链(MCoT)方法进行了综合评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前模型在科学图像解释方面显著落后于专家级别要求，暴露出AI4S研究中的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: SPUR基准测试揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在科学实验图像理解方面的重大不足，为AI4S研究提供了重要的评估框架和未来改进方向。

relevance_reason: The paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. The SPUR benchmark focuses on scientific experimental image understanding and evaluation for AI4S (AI for Science), analyzing graphs, charts, and experiment panels. This is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion, which involves extracting visual features from 2D videos to generate 3D human motion. Even though both may use Vision Language Models, the application domains are completely different - scientific image interpretation vs. text-to-motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points: extracting visual guidance for motion, quality assessment for motion priors, bridging 2D-to-3D domain for motion, or temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: WaferSAGE: Large Language Model-Powered Wafer Defect Analysis via Synthetic Data Generation and Rubric-Guided Reinforcement Learning
summary:
We present WaferSAGE, a framework for wafer defect visual question answering using small vision-language models. To address data scarcity in semiconductor manufacturing, we propose a three-stage synthesis pipeline incorporating structured rubric generation for precise evaluation. Starting from limited labeled wafer maps, we employ clustering-based cleaning to filter label noise, then generate comprehensive defect descriptions using vision-language models, which are converted into structured evaluation rubrics criteria. These rubrics guide the synthesis of VQA pairs, ensuring coverage across defect type identification, spatial distribution, morphology, and root cause analysis.
  Our dual assessment framework aligns rule-based metrics with LLM-Judge scores via Bayesian optimization, enabling reliable automated evaluation.
