Through curriculum-based reinforcement learning with Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) and rubric-aligned rewards, our 4B-parameter Qwen3-VL model achieves a 6.493 LLM-Judge score, closely approaching Gemini-3-Flash (7.149) while enabling complete on-premise deployment. We demonstrate that small models with domain-specific training can surpass proprietary large models in specialized industrial visual understanding, offering a viable path for privacy-preserving, cost-effective deployment in semiconductor manufacturing.

AI.tldr: WaferSAGE是一个用于晶圆缺陷视觉问答的小型视觉语言模型框架，通过三阶段合成管道和课程强化学习，在4B参数规模下实现了与Gemini-3-Flash相当的性能，为半导体制造提供了可本地部署、成本效益高的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 半导体制造中存在晶圆缺陷数据稀缺的问题，同时现有的大规模视觉语言模型需要云端部署，存在隐私和成本方面的挑战。研究者希望探索小型领域专用模型是否能在专业工业视觉理解任务中超越大型专有模型。
AI.method: 1）聚类清洗过滤标签噪声；2）使用视觉语言模型生成缺陷描述并转换为结构化评估标准；3）基于课程强化学习与群体序列策略优化（GSPO）和评估标准对齐的奖励进行训练；4）通过贝叶斯优化对齐规则指标与LLM-Judge评分。
AI.result: 4B参数的Qwen3-VL模型达到了6.493的LLM-Judge分数，接近Gemini-3-Flash的7.149分数，成功实现了完全本地部署，在晶圆缺陷类型识别、空间分布、形态学和根因分析等任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 小型领域专用视觉语言模型通过针对性的训练可以超越大型专有模型，为隐私保护且成本敏感的半导体制造行业提供了可行且高效的工业视觉理解部署方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about semiconductor wafer defect analysis - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. While it uses Vision Language Models (VLM), the method is applied to industrial quality inspection in semiconductor manufacturing, not to 3D human motion generation from video. This has no relevance to bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output, temporal consistency in motion generation, or any of the text-to-motion pain points in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different (industrial defect detection vs. computer graphics motion synthesis).

title: SpaAct: Spatially-Activated Transition Learning with Curriculum Adaptation for Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) aims to enable an embodied agent to follow natural-language instructions and navigate to a target location in unseen 3D environments. We argue that adapting VLMs to VLN requires endowing them with two complementary capabilities for acquiring such awareness, namely backward action reasoning (why) and forward transition prediction~(how). Based on this insight, we propose SpaAct, a simple yet effective training framework that activates the dynamic spatial awareness in VLMs. Specifically, SpaAct introduces two spatial activation tasks: Action Retrospection, which asks the model to infer the executed action sequence from visual transitions, and Future Frame Selection, which forces the model to predict the visual transitions conditioned on history and action. These two objectives provide lightweight supervision on both backward action reasoning and forward transition prediction, encouraging the model to build dynamic spatial awareness in a VLM-friendly way. To further stabilize adaptation, we design TriPA, a Tri-factor Progressive Adaptive curriculum learning method that organizes training samples from easy to hard, allowing the model to gradually acquire navigation skills from basic locomotion to long-horizon reasoning. Experiments on standard VLN-CE benchmarks show that SpaAct consistently improves VLM-based navigation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. We will release the code and models to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpaAct框架，通过两个空间激活任务（动作回顾和未来帧选择）激活视觉语言模型的空间感知能力，用于视觉-语言导航任务。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型(VLM)应用于视觉-语言导航(VLN)时缺乏动态空间感知能力，需要同时具备反向动作推理（理解为什么执行某动作）和正向转换预测（理解动作如何导致视觉变化）两种能力。
AI.method: 提出SpaAct框架，包含两个空间激活任务：1)动作回顾(Action Retrospection)：根据视觉转换推断执行的动作序列；2)未来帧选择(Future Frame Selection)：根据历史和动作预测视觉转换。同时设计TriPA三因素渐进式自适应课程学习，按从易到难组织训练样本。
AI.result: 在VLN-CE标准基准上实验表明，SpaAct持续提升基于VLM的导航性能，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过轻量级监督同时增强反向推理和正向预测能力，VLM可以建立动态空间感知能力，渐进式课程学习进一步稳定模型适配，最终在VLN任务上取得SOTA性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) for robot/agent navigation, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion. Although both use VLMs, the application domains are entirely different: Text-to-Motion focuses on generating 3D human motion from video/text for graphics/animation, while this paper focuses on navigation decisions for agents. The pain points (bridging 2D visual to 3D motion, temporal consistency in motion generation, quality assessment for motion prior) are not addressed at all.

title: Generative structure search for efficient and diverse discovery of molecular and crystal structures
summary: Predicting stable and metastable structures is central to molecular and materials discovery, but remains limited by the cost of searching high-dimensional energy landscapes. Deep generative models offer efficient structure sampling, yet their outputs remain shaped by training data and can underexplore minima that are rare but physically relevant. We introduce generative structure search (GSS), a unified framework that formulates diffusion-based generation and random structure search (RSS) as limiting regimes of a common sampling process driven by learned score fields and physical forces. Coupling these drivers lets GSS use data priors to accelerate sampling while retaining energy-guided exploration of local minima. Across molecular and crystalline systems, GSS recovers diverse metastable structures with more than tenfold lower sampling cost than RSS for broad coverage and remains effective for compositions outside the training distribution. The results establish a physically grounded generative search strategy for discovering structures beyond the reach of data-driven sampling alone.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为生成式结构搜索(GSS)的新框架，将扩散生成模型与随机结构搜索(RSS)相结合，通过学习到的 Score 场和物理力驱动采样过程，在分子和晶体系统中以低于传统方法10倍以上的采样成本发现多样化的亚稳态结构。
AI.motivation: 预测稳定和亚稳态结构是分子和材料发现的核心任务，但高维能量景观的搜索成本很高。深度生成模型虽然采样效率高，但受限于训练数据，容易忽略物理上重要但稀有的能量极小值。如何在利用数据先验加速采样的同时，保持能量引导的局部极小值探索能力，是当前面临的核心挑战。
AI.method: 将扩散-based 生成和随机结构搜索(RSS)统一为由学习到的 Score 场和物理力驱动的共同采样过程的两个极限状态。通过耦合这两种驱动方式，GSS 既能利用数据先验加速采样，又能通过能量引导探索局部极小值。具体采用扩散模型学习训练数据的分布作为先验，结合物理力场进行能量优化.
AI.result: 在分子和晶体系统中，GSS 以低于传统 RSS 方法10倍以上的采样成本实现了对亚稳态结构的广泛覆盖，并且对训练分布之外的组成成分仍然有效。实验表明该方法能够发现比纯数据驱动采样更丰富的物理相关极小值结构。
AI.conclusion: GSS 建立了一种物理驱动的生成式搜索策略，为发现超越数据驱动采样能力的结构提供了新思路，有望加速分子和材料发现过程。该框架的成功证明了结合机器学习先验与物理约束的有效性.

relevance_reason: This paper is about molecular and crystal structure discovery using diffusion models in materials science/computational chemistry. While it uses diffusion-based generation (similar method), the application domain is COMPLETELY different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The research profile is about generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs for computer graphics, while this paper focuses on generating molecular structures for materials discovery. This is a clear case of method similarity but wrong application domain - using diffusion in materials science vs using diffusion for human motion generation in computer graphics are entirely different research fields.

title: Optimization before Evaluation: Evaluation with Unoptimised Prompts Can be Misleading
comment: Proceedings of the 63rd Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 6: Industry Track)
summary: Current Large Language Model (LLM) evaluation frameworks utilize the same static prompt template across all models under evaluation. This differs from the common industry practice of using prompt optimization (PO) techniques to optimize the prompt for each model to maximize application performance. In this paper, we investigate the effect of PO towards LLM evaluations. Our results on public academic and internal industry benchmarks show that PO greatly affects the final ranking of models. This highlights the importance of practitioners performing PO per model when conducting evaluations to choose the best model for a given task.

AI.tldr: 本文研究提示优化(PO)对大型语言模型(LLM)评估的影响，发现PO技术会显著改变模型排名。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评估框架使用静态统一提示模板，但行业实践中会对每个模型进行提示优化以提升性能。这种评估方法与实际应用场景的差异可能导致评估结果不能准确反映模型在实际应用中的表现。
AI.method: 在公开学术基准测试和内部行业基准测试上，对多个LLM模型应用提示优化技术，比较优化前后的模型排名变化。
AI.result: 提示优化(PO)显著影响LLM的最终评估排名，说明对不同模型进行针对性提示优化的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调实践者在进行模型评估选择最佳模型时，应为每个模型单独执行提示优化操作。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM evaluation and prompt optimization techniques - a completely different field from Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. There is no application domain match: the research profile concerns generating 3D human motion from text/video, while this paper deals with optimizing prompts for evaluating large language models. The methods are also unrelated - this paper focuses on LLM prompt engineering rather than video generation, visual feature extraction, or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: MSR:Hybrid Field Modeling for CT-MRI Rigid-Deformable Registration of the Cervical Spine with an Annotated Dataset
summary: Accurate CT-MRI registration of the cervical spine is essential for preoperative planning because this region is anatomically complex,highly variable,and vulnerable to injury of the vertebral arteries and spinal cord. However,cervical CT-MRI registration remains underexplored,particularly for rigid-deformable hybrid modeling,and the lack of high-quality annotated multimodal data further limits progress. To address these challenges, we construct and release a comprehensively annotated CT-MRI dataset, R-D-Reg, and propose MSR, a rigid-deformable hybrid registration framework for complex joint structures. Specifically, MSR includes a rigid registration module for independent local rigid alignment of individual vertebrae and a deformable registration module with an MSL block that combines Mamba-based global modeling and Swin Transformer-based local modeling through adaptive gating. The rigid and deformable deformation fields are then fused to generate a hybrid field that better preserves local anatomical consistency. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/ssc1230609-spec/MSR-registration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于颈椎CT-MRI图像配准的刚性-可变形混合配准框架MSR，并发布了配套的R-D-Reg数据集。
AI.motivation: 颈椎CT-MRI精确配准对术前规划至关重要，但该区域解剖结构复杂、血管和脊髓易受损伤，目前刚性-可变形混合建模方法研究不足，且缺乏高质量标注的多模态数据。
AI.method: 构建并发布了R-D-Reg综合标注CT-MRI数据集；提出MSR刚性- deformable混合配准框架，包含刚性配准模块（独立局部刚性对齐椎体）和可变形配准模块（MSL块结合Mamba全局建模与Swin Transformer局部建模，通过自适应门控融合）。
AI.result: 混合场更好地保留局部解剖一致性一致性。
AI.conclusion: 代码和数据集已公开。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image registration (CT-MRI) for cervical spine in the healthcare domain, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. Even though both might use similar technical components like Transformers or deformable modeling, the application domain is entirely different - this is medical imaging, not motion generation for computer graphics. The paper addresses CT-MRI registration for surgical planning, not converting 2D visual inputs to 3D human motion.

title: EviMem: Evidence-Gap-Driven Iterative Retrieval for Long-Term Conversational Memory
summary: Long-term conversational memory requires retrieving evidence scattered across multiple sessions, yet single-pass retrieval fails on temporal and multi-hop questions. Existing iterative methods refine queries via generated content or document-level signals, but none explicitly diagnoses the evidence gap, namely what is missing from the accumulated retrieval set, leaving query refinement untargeted. We present EviMem, combining IRIS (Iterative Retrieval via Insufficiency Signals), a closed-loop framework that detects evidence gaps through sufficiency evaluation, diagnoses what is missing, and drives targeted query refinement, with LaceMem (Layered Architecture for Conversational Evidence Memory), a coarse-to-fine memory hierarchy supporting fine-grained gap diagnosis. On LoCoMo, EviMem improves Judge Accuracy over MIRIX on temporal (73.3% to 81.6%) and multi-hop (65.9% to 85.2%) questions at 4.5x lower latency. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/EviMem.

AI.tldr: EviMem是一种长对话记忆检索框架，通过显式诊断证据缺口来驱动目标性查询优化，结合IRIS（基于不足信号的迭代检索）和LaceMem（分层对话证据记忆）实现粗到细的记忆层次结构，在LoCoMo数据集上显著提升了时序和多跳问题的检索准确率。
AI.motivation: 长对话记忆需要在多个会话中检索分散的证据，但单次检索在处理时序和多跳问题上失败。现有迭代方法通过生成内容或文档级信号优化查询，但未能显式诊断证据缺口（即累积检索集中缺少什么），导致查询优化缺乏针对性。
AI.method: 提出EviMem框架，包含两个核心组件：1) IRIS（基于不足信号的迭代检索）：通过充分性评估检测证据缺口，诊断缺失内容，驱动目标性查询优化；2) LaceMem（分层对话证据记忆）：支持细粒度缺口诊断的粗到细记忆层次结构。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo数据集上，EviMem相比MIRIX在时序问题（73.3%→81.6%）和多跳问题（65.9%→85.2%）的判断准确率均有显著提升，延迟降低4.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 显式诊断证据缺口并驱动目标性查询优化是提升长对话记忆检索效果的有效方法，EviMem为解决时序和多跳问题提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about long-term conversational memory retrieval in dialogue systems (NLP/Information Retrieval), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from text/video). Although EviMem uses iterative retrieval methods, this is for dialogue systems, not motion generation. The application domain and research goals are entirely different - this is NLP vs Computer Graphics.

title: Deep Learning-Based Segmentation of Peritoneal Cancer Index Regions from CT Imaging
comment: Accepted for presentation at Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery (CARS) 2026
summary: Peritoneal metastases are currently assessed using diagnostic laparoscopy to determine Sugarbaker's Peritoneal Cancer Index (sPCI), which works by dividing the abdomen into 13 regions and scoring each region based on tumor size. A recent consensus study defined 3D regions to facilitate a radiological PCI (rPCI), providing standardized anatomical regions for imaging-based assessment. Despite its clinical value, sPCI is invasive and lacks a standardized imaging counterpart. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based approach to automatically segment the rPCI regions on CT. We evaluate nnU-Net and Swin UNETR on 62 CT scans with rPCI regions manually annotated by three clinical researchers and validated by two expert radiologists. Performance was assessed using five-fold cross-validation with the Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice), 95th percentile Hausdorff distance and Average Surface Distance. nnU-Net achieved an overall Dice of 0.82, approaching interobserver agreement (0.88) and outperforming Swin UNETR (0.76), with remaining challenges primarily in right flank and small-bowel regions. These results demonstrate feasibility of automated rPCI segmentation, laying the foundation for non-invasive, imaging-based assessment.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出使用深度学习方法(nnU-Net和Swin UNETR)自动分割CT上的放射学腹膜癌指数(rPCI)区域，旨在实现非侵入性影像学评估替代有创的诊断性腹腔镜检查。
AI.motivation: 目前腹膜转移的评估依赖诊断性腹腔镜检查Sugarbaker腹膜癌指数(sPCI)，该方法具有侵入性且缺乏标准化的影像学对应方案。
AI.method: 使用62例CT扫描，由3名临床研究员手动标注rPCI区域并经2名放射科专家验证，采用五折交叉验证评估nnU-Net和Swin UNETR两种深度学习模型的分割性能，使用Dice相似性系数、95th百分位Hausdorff距离和平均表面距离作为评价指标。
AI.result: nnU-Net总体Dice系数达0.82，接近观察者间一致性(0.88)，优于Swin UNETR(0.76)；主要挑战在于右侧胁部和小型肠道区域。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果证实了自动化rPCI分割的可行性，为非侵入性影像学评估奠定基础，有望替代部分侵入性腹腔镜检查。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about medical image segmentation (CT scans for peritoneal cancer detection) using deep learning methods (nnU-Net, Swin UNETR). The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text inputs). While both use deep learning, they are in entirely different domains: medical imaging vs computer graphics/motion synthesis. The application targets are completely unrelated - cancer diagnosis vs human motion generation.

title: RayFormer: Modeling Inter- and Intra-Ray Similarity for NeRF-Based Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging
summary: Video snapshot compressive imaging (SCI) enables the reconstruction of dynamic scenes from a single snapshot measurement. Recently, NeRF-based methods have shown promising reconstruction performance. However, such methods typically adopt random ray sampling strategies and fail to capture content structural similarities, resulting in limited reconstruction quality. To address these issues, we first propose a patch-level ray sampling strategy to enable the modeling of content structure. Then, we propose an Inter- and Intra-Ray Transformer (RayFormer) to capture the structural similarities, modeling both inter-ray similarities among spatially neighboring points at the same depth and intra-ray correlations between adjacent points along the viewing ray. Finally, benefiting from the patch-level sampling strategy, the total variation prior is incorporated into the objective function to enhance spatial smoothness and suppress artifacts. Experiments in both simulated and real-world scenes demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) reconstruction performance.

AI.tldr: 视频快照压缩成像(SCI)方法，结合NeRF框架、补丁级光线采样策略、Inter-和Intra-Ray Transformer (RayFormer)以及全变分先验，实现高质量动态场景重建。
AI.motivation: 视频SCI能从单次快照测量中重建动态场景，但现有NeRF方法采用随机光线采样策略，未能捕捉内容结构相似性，导致重建质量有限。
AI.method: 提出补丁级光线采样策略以建模内容结构；提出RayFormer捕捉结构相似性，包括同深度空间邻域点间的inter-ray相似性和沿视线相邻点间的intra-ray相关性；将全变分先验纳入目标函数以增强空间平滑性并抑制伪影。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实场景实验中的结果表明，该方法实现了最优重建性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提RayFormer结合补丁级采样和TV先验显著提升了视频SCI的重建质量，达到先进水平。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging (SCI) using NeRF for reconstructing dynamic scenes from compressive measurements. This is completely different from the research profile's Text-to-Motion domain. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs (e.g., Wanxiang, Seedance video generation models, VLM-based motion generation), while this paper addresses computational imaging and scene reconstruction. The application domains are entirely different: motion generation vs. video reconstruction. The methods (NeRF, RayFormer, compressive sensing) are also not relevant to text-to-motion generation (diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual feature extraction for motion priors).

title: When Agents Evolve, Institutions Follow
summary: Across millennia, complex societies have faced the same coordination problem of how to organize collective action among cognitively bounded and informationally incomplete individuals. Different civilizations developed different political institutions to answer the same basic questions of who proposes, who reviews, who executes, and how errors are corrected. We argue that multi-agent systems built on large language models face the same challenge. Their central problem is not only individual intelligence, but collective organization. Historical institutions therefore provide a structured design space for multi-agent architectures, making key trade-offs between efficiency and error correction, centralization and distribution, and specialization and redundancy empirically testable. We translate seven historical political institutions, spanning four canonical governance patterns, into executable multi-agent architectures and evaluate them under identical conditions across three large language models and two benchmarks. We find that governance topology strongly shapes collective performance. Within a single model, the gap between the best and worst institution exceeds 57 percentage points, while the optimal architecture shifts systematically with model capability and task characteristics. These results suggest that collective intelligence will not advance through a single optimal organizational form, but through governance mechanisms that can be reselected and reconfigured as tasks and capabilities evolve. More broadly, this points to a transition from \textbf{self-evolving agents} to the \textbf{self-evolving multi-agent system}. The code is available on \href{https://github.com/cf3i/SocialSystemArena}{GitHub}.

AI.tldr: 研究将古代七种政治治理制度（四种模式）转化为多智能体系统架构，通过三种大语言模型和两个基准测试发现：治理拓扑结构显著影响集体智能表现，最优架构依赖于模型能力和任务特性。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统面临与历史上复杂社会相同的协调问题：如何在认知有限和信息不完全的个体之间组织集体行动。传统上不同文明发展了不同的政治制度来解决问题，而现代大语言模型构建的多智能体系统也面临同样的集体组织挑战。
AI.method: 将七种历史政治制度（跨越四种典型治理模式）转化为可执行的多智能体架构，在相同条件下对三种大语言模型和两个基准进行评估。
AI.result: 治理拓扑结构强烈影响集体性能。在单一模型中，最佳与最差制度之间的差距超过57个百分点；最优架构随模型能力和任务特性系统性地变化。
AI.conclusion: 集体智能不会通过单一最优组织形式提升，而需要能够根据任务和能力演变进行重新选择和重新配置的治理机制。研究指向从"自进化智能体"向"自进化多智能体系统"的转变。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent systems and governance/topology structure in political science, using LLMs to simulate ancient political institutions. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different: this is about organizational design and multi-agent coordination, not 3D human motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or diffusion-based motion synthesis. The methods (LLMs for governance) are entirely unrelated to the required methods (Video generation models, VLM, visual feature extraction, diffusion-based motion synthesis).

title: A generalised pre-training strategy for deep learning networks in semantic segmentation of remotely sensed images
summary: In the segmentation of remotely sensed images, deep learning models are typically pre-trained using large image databases like ImageNet before fine-tuned on domain-specific datasets. However, the performance of these fine-tuned models is often hindered by the large domain gaps (i.e., differences in scenes and modalities) between ImageNet's images and remotely sensed images being processed. Therefore, many researchers have undertaken efforts to establish large-scale domain-specific image datasets for pre-training, aiming to enhance model performance. However, establishing such datasets is often challenging, requiring significant effort, and these datasets often exhibit limited generaliza-bility to other application scenarios. To address these issues, this study introduces a novel yet simple pre-training strategy designed to guide a model away from learning domain-specific features in a pre-training dataset during pre-training, thereby improving the generalisation ability of the pre-trained model. To evaluate the strategy's effectiveness, deep learning models are pre-trained on ImageNet and subsequently fine-tuned on four semantic segmentation datasets with diverse scenes and modalities, including iSAID, MFNet, PST900 and Potsdam. Experimental results show that the proposed pre-training strategy led to state-of-the-art accuracies on all four datasets, namely 67.4% mIoU for iSAID, 56.9% mIoU for MFNet, 84.22% mIoU for PST900, 91.88% mF1 for Potsdam. This research lays the groundwork for developing a unified foundation model applicable to both computer vision and remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单但新颖的预训练策略，通过引导模型避免学习预训练数据集中的领域特定特征来提高模型的泛化能力。在ImageNet上预训练后，在四个遥感语义分割数据集（iSAID、MFNet、PST900、Potsdam）上进行微调，取得了最先进的精度。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像分割中，传统深度学习模型在ImageNet上预训练后到遥感数据集的域差距问题，以及建立大规模领域特定数据集的困难和泛化能力有限的问题。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的预训练策略，引导模型在预训练阶段避免学习领域特定特征，从而提高预训练模型的泛化能力。在ImageNet上预训练，然后在四个语义分割数据集上进行微调评估。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上取得了最先进的精度：iSAID达到67.4% mIoU，MFNet达到56.9% mIoU，PST900达到84.22% mIoU，Potsdam达到91.88% mF1。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的预训练策略是有效的，为开发适用于计算机视觉和遥感应用的统一基础模型奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing image semantic segmentation, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion field. The application domains are entirely different: the paper deals with satellite/aerial image segmentation for land cover classification, while the research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs. The pain points (domain adaptation from ImageNet to remote sensing) have no overlap with text-to-motion pain points (2D-3D bridging, temporal consistency in motion generation). The methods used (pre-training strategies for segmentation CNNs) are completely different from video generation models, VLMs, and diffusion-based motion synthesis. This is a fundamental field mismatch with zero relevance to text-to-motion research.

title: Bridging Values and Behavior: A Hierarchical Framework for Proactive Embodied Agents
summary: Current embodied agents are often limited to passive instruction-following or reactive need-satisfaction, lacking a stable, high-order value framework essential for long-term, self-directed behavior and resolving motivational conflicts. We introduce \textit{ValuePlanner}, a hierarchical cognitive architecture that decouples high-level value scheduling from low-level action execution. \textit{ValuePlanner} employs an LLM-based cognitive module to generate symbolic subgoals by reasoning through abstract value trade-offs, which are then translated into executable action plans by a classical PDDL planner. This process is refined via a closed-loop feedback mechanism. Evaluating such autonomy requires methods beyond task-success rates, and we therefore propose a value-centric evaluation suite measuring cumulative value gain, preference alignment, and behavioral diversity. Experiments in the TongSim household environment demonstrate that \textit{ValuePlanner} arbitrates competing values to generate coherent, long-horizon, self-directed behavior absent from instruction-following and needs-driven baselines. Our work offers a structured approach to bridging intrinsic values and grounded behavior for autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: ValuePlanner是一个分层认知架构，通过解耦高层价值调度和低层动作执行，使具身智能体能够进行长期自我导向行为。
AI.motivation: 当前具身智能体局限于被动指令跟随或反应性需求满足，缺乏稳定的、高阶价值框架来处理长期自我导向行为和解决动机冲突。
AI.method: 使用基于LLM的认知模块通过抽象价值权衡推理生成符号子目标，然后通过经典PDDL planner将子目标翻译为可执行动作计划，并通过闭环反馈机制进行 refinement。还提出了value-centric评估套件。
AI.result: ValuePlanner在TongSim家庭环境中展示了能够调解竞争性价值并生成连贯的长期自我导向行为，优于指令跟随和需求驱动基线。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为将内在价值与具身行为相融合提供了一个结构化方法，使智能体能够进行长期自我导向行为。

relevance_reason: This paper is about embodied AI agents and cognitive planning architectures (using LLMs and PDDL planners for decision-making in simulation environments), NOT about Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion. The application domains are completely different - Text-to-Motion focuses on generating 3D skeletal animation/motion for characters, while this paper addresses autonomous agent behavior planning in robotics. The methods (LLM-based cognitive modules, value-centric reasoning) are also unrelated to diffusion-based motion synthesis or visual feature extraction for 3D motion generation.

title: Linguistically Informed Multimodal Fusion for Vietnamese Scene-Text Image Captioning: Dataset, Graph Framework, and Phonological Attention
summary: Scene-text image captioning requires fusing three information streams -- visual features, OCR-detected text, and linguistic knowledge -- to generate descriptions that faithfully integrate text visible in images. Existing fusion approaches treat text as language-agnostic, which fails for Vietnamese: a tonal language where diacritics alter word meaning, OCR errors are pervasive, and word boundaries are ambiguous. We argue that Vietnamese scene-text captioning demands \textit{linguistically informed multimodal fusion}, where language-specific structural knowledge is explicitly incorporated into the fusion mechanism. Motivated from these insights, we propose \textbf{HSTFG} (Heterogeneous Scene-Text Fusion Graph), a general-purpose graph fusion framework with learned spatial attention bias, and show through topology analysis that cross-modal graph edges are harmful for scene-text fusion. Building on this finding, we design \textbf{PhonoSTFG} (Phonological Scene-Text Fusion Graph) which specializes graph-level fusion for Vietnamese linguistic reasoning. To support evaluation, we introduce \textbf{ViTextCaps}, the first large-scale Vietnamese scene-text captioning dataset (\textbf{15{,}729} images with \textbf{74{,}970} captions), with comprehensive linguistic analysis showing that 52.8\% of the vocabulary is at risk of diacritic collision.

AI.tldr: 本文针对越南语场景-文本标题生成任务，提出了融合语言特异性知识的PhonoSTFG框架和首个大规模越南语数据集ViTextCaps。越南语的特殊性使得需要语言信息感知的多模态融合方法来处理音调符号和OCR错误问题。
AI.motivation: 越南语是一种声调语言，其中音调符号会改变词义，OCR错误普遍存在，词边界不明确。现有的融合方法将文本视为与语言无关的，无法处理越南语场景文本标题生成任务。因此需要语言信息感知的多模态融合方法。
AI.method: 提出了HSTFG（异构场景-文本融合图）框架，具有学习的空间注意力偏差；通过拓扑分析发现跨模态图边缘对场景-文本融合有害；基于此设计了专门用于越南语语言推理的PhonoSTFG（音韵场景-文本融合图）；构建了ViTextCaps数据集（15,729张图像，74,970个标题）。
AI.result: 提出了第一个大规模越南语场景-文本标题数据集ViTextCaps，词汇表中52.8%存在音调符号冲突风险。
AI.conclusion: 通过拓扑分析证明跨模态图边缘对场景-文本融合有害，为越南语场景-文本标题生成提供了新的研究方向和语言特异性融合框架。

The application domains are entirely unrelated - one deals with text recognition in visual scenes for Vietnamese language, while the other deals with generating 3D human motion for computer graphics. No relevant methods or techniques are applicable to the Text-to-Motion domain.

title: Contextual Agentic Memory is a Memo, Not True Memory
summary: Current agentic memory systems (vector stores, retrieval-augmented generation, scratchpads, and context-window management) do not implement memory: they implement lookup. We argue that treating lookup as memory is a category error with provable consequences for agent capability, long-term learning, and security. Retrieval generalizes by similarity to stored cases; weight-based memory generalizes by applying abstract rules to inputs never seen before. Conflating the two produces agents that accumulate notes indefinitely without developing expertise, face a provable generalization ceiling on compositionally novel tasks that no increase in context size or retrieval quality can overcome, and are structurally vulnerable to persistent memory poisoning as injected content propagates across all future sessions. Drawing on Complementary Learning Systems theory from neuroscience, we show that biological intelligence solved this problem by pairing fast hippocampal exemplar storage with slow neocortical weight consolidation, and that current AI agents implement only the first half. We formalize these limitations, address four alternative views, and close with a co-existence proposal and a call to action for system builders, benchmark designers, and the memory community.

AI.tldr: 本文论证当前AI智能体中的"记忆系统"实际上只实现了查找功能而非真正的记忆，这是人工智能的基础性概念错误。作者基于神经科学中的互补学习系统(CLS)理论，指出真正的智能需要将快速海马体示例存储与慢速皮层权重整合相结合，当前智能体仅实现了前者的一半。
AI.motivation: 当前AI智能体的记忆系统存在根本性缺陷：无法实现真正的学习和泛化，而是持续积累信息而不形成专业知识，同时面临可证明的泛化上限和记忆中毒的脆弱性。作者认为这是类别错误(category error)，需要从概念层面重新定义智能体的记忆架构。
AI.method: 作者采用理论分析方法，通过形式化数学论证揭示lookup与memory的区别。具体方法包括：1)证明检索式记忆vs权重式记忆的泛化差异；2)引用神经科学CLS理论框架；3)分析记忆中毒的传播机制；4)回应四种替代观点。
AI.result: 本文建立了三个可证明的局限性：1)累积笔记但不发展专业知识的困境；2)组合新颖任务的泛化上限（无论上下文或检索质量如何提升都无法克服）；3)持久性记忆中毒的结构性漏洞——注入内容会跨会话传播。最后提出与现行系统共存的架构建议。
AI.conclusion: 本文呼吁智能体系统构建者、基准设计者和记忆研究社区重新审视"记忆"的定义，将互补学习系统的神经科学原理融入AI架构，实现真正的学习而非仅做信息存储。

It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different - this is in the field of AI agents and cognitive science, not computer graphics, video generation, or 3D motion generation. title: Improving Calibration in Test-Time Prompt Tuning for Vision-Language Models via Data-Free Flatness-Aware Prompt Pretraining
summary: Test-time prompt tuning (TPT) has emerged as a promising technique for enhancing the adaptability of vision-language models by optimizing textual prompts using unlabeled test data. However, prior studies have observed that TPT often produces poorly calibrated models, raising concerns about the reliability of their predictions. Recent works address this issue by incorporating additional regularization terms that constrain model outputs, which improve calibration but often degrade performance. In this work, we reveal that these regularization strategies implicitly encourage optimization toward flatter minima, and that the sharpness of the loss landscape around adapted prompts is a key factor governing calibration quality. Motivated by this observation, we introduce Flatness-aware Prompt Pretraining (FPP), a simple yet effective pretraining framework for TPT that initializes prompts within flatter regions of the loss landscape prior to adaptation. We show that simply replacing the initialization in existing TPT pipelines--without modifying any other components--is sufficient to improve both calibration and performance. Notably, FPP requires no labeled data and incurs no additional computational costs during test-time tuning, making it highly practical for real-world deployment. The code is available at: https://github.com/YonseiML/fpp.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flatness-aware Prompt Pretraining (FPP)框架,通过在测试时提示调整(TPT)前初始化提示到损失景观的平坦区域,解决TPT模型校准差的问题,且无需标记数据和额外计算成本。
AI.motivation: TPT技术虽能增强视觉语言模型的适应性,但常产生校准不良的模型。现有的正则化方法虽改善校准却导致性能下降,且其背后的机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 揭示正则化策略隐式地鼓励向更平坦的极小值优化,损失景观的平坦度是影响校准质量的关键因素。据此提出FPP框架,在TPT适应前将提示初始化到损失景观的平坦区域。
AI.result: 仅替换现有TPT流程中的初始化即可同时改善校准和性能,FPP无需标记数据且在测试时调优时不产生额外计算成本。
AI.conclusion: FPP是一个简单而有效的TPT预训练框架,通过利用损失景观平坦度信息解决了TPT校准问题,为实际部署提供了高实用性的解决方案。

title: Knowledge Graph Representations for LLM-Based Policy Compliance Reasoning
summary: The risks posed by AI features are increasing as they are rapidly integrated into software applications. In response, regulations and standards for safe and secure AI have been proposed. In this paper, we present an agentic framework that constructs knowledge graphs (KGs) from AI policy documents and retrieves policy-relevant information to answer questions. We build KGs from three AI risk-related polices under two ontology schemas, and then evaluate five LLMs on 42 policy QA tasks spanning six reasoning types, from entity lookup to cross-policy inference, using both heuristic scoring and an LLM-as-judge. KG augmentation improves scores for all five models, and an open, LLM-discovered schema matches or exceeds the formal ontology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个agentic框架，利用知识图谱增强LLM对AI风险政策的理解和问答能力。通过构建三个AI风险政策的知识图谱并评估五种LLM模型，结果表明知识图谱增强能显著提升所有模型的性能，且LLM自动发现的模式可与正式本体论相媲美。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术快速集成到软件应用中，AI功能带来的风险不断增加，因此需要安全和可靠的AI法规和标准。为了帮助理解和检索AI政策文件中的相关信息，需要一种有效的方法来构建和分析这些政策文档。
AI.method: 提出了一个agentic框架，从AI政策文档中构建知识图谱(KG)，并检索政策相关信息来回答问题。该框架从三个AI风险相关政策中构建知识图谱，使用两种本体论模式，然后对五个LLM在42个政策问答任务上进行评估，这些任务涵盖六种推理类型（从实体查找到跨政策推理），同时使用启发式评分和LLM作为评判者。
AI.result: 知识图谱增强提升了所有五个模型的分数。此外，开放的LLM发现的模式与或超过正式本体论。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱增强是提高LLM理解和检索AI政策信息的有效方法。开放的、由LLM自动发现的模式可以匹配或超越正式定义的本体论，表明在政策分析任务中可能不需要严格的手动本体设计。

title: Auditing Frontier Vision-Language Models for Trustworthy Medical VQA: Grounding Failures, Format Collapse, and Domain Adaptation
summary: Deploying vision-language models (VLMs) in clinical settings demands auditable behavior under realistic failure conditions, yet the failure landscape of frontier VLMs on specialized medical inputs is poorly characterized. We audit five recent frontier and grounding-aware VLMs (Gemini~2.5~Pro, GPT-5, o3, GLM-4.5V, Qwen~2.5~VL) on Medical VQA along two trust-relevant axes. Perception: all models localize anatomical and pathological targets poorly -- the best model reaches only 0.23 mean IoU and 19.1% Acc@0.5 -- and exhibit clinically dangerous laterality confusion. Pipeline integration: a self-grounding pipeline, where the same model localizes then answers, degrades VQA accuracy for every model -- driven by both inaccurate localization and format-compliance failures under the two-step prompt (parse failure rises to 70%--99% for Gemini and GPT-5 on VQA-RAD). Replacing predicted boxes with ground-truth annotations recovers and improves VQA accuracy, consistent with the failure residing in the perception module rather than in the decomposition itself. These observational findings identify grounding quality as a primary trustworthiness bottleneck in our SLAKE bounding-box setting. As a complementary fine-tuning follow-up, supervised fine-tuning of Qwen~2.5~VL on combined Med-VQA training data attains the highest reported SLAKE open-ended recall (85.5%) among comparable methods, suggesting that the VQA-level gap is tractable with domain adaptation; whether this also closes the perception/trustworthiness bottleneck is left to future work.

AI.tldr: 研究审计了5种前沿视觉语言模型(VLM)在医学视觉问答任务上的表现，发现模型在定位 anatomical和pathological targets方面表现不佳，最高仅达到0.23 mean IoU和19.1% Acc@0.5。自 grounding pipeline反而降低准确率，替换为真实标注可恢复性能，表明感知模块是主要瓶颈。微调后的Qwen2.5VL达到85.5% recall。
AI.motivation: 在临床环境中部署视觉语言模型需要可审计的行为，但前沿 VLMs 在专业医学输入下的失败情况尚未被很好表征。这激发了对这些模型进行信任相关维度审计的需求。
AI.method: 审计了5种前沿 grounding-aware VLMs (Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT-5, o3, GLM-4.5, Qwen 2.5VL) 在 Medical VQA 数据集上的表现，从两个信任相关轴进行评估：感知(定位)和管道集成(自 grounding 流程)。同时对 Qwen 2.5VL 进行了监督微调实验。
AI.result: 感知方面：所有模型定位 anatomical 和 pathological targets 表现差，最好的模型仅达到0.23 mean IoU 和19.1% Acc@0.5，且存在危险的 laterality 混淆。管道集成：自 grounding pipeline 反而降低每个模型的 VQA 准确率，解析失败率高达70-99%。用真实标注替换预测框可恢复并提升 VQA 准确率。微调后的 Qwen 2.5VL 在 SLAKE open-ended recall 达到85.5%。
AI.conclusion: Grounding quality 是信任的主要瓶颈。感知模块的失败是准确率下降的主要原因，而非问题分解本身。领域适应可缩小 VQA 级别的差距，但感知/信任瓶颈是否能够完全解决仍需进一步研究。

The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from visual/text inputs, while this paper focuses on answering questions about medical images using VLMs. Although both use Vision-Language Models superficially, the application domains are fundamentally different - medical image analysis vs motion generation. title: Iterative Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Medical Question Answering
summary: Medical retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems typically operate on text chunks extracted from biomedical literature, discarding the rich visual content (tables, figures, structured layouts) of original document pages. We propose MED-VRAG, an iterative multimodal RAG framework that retrieves and reasons over PMC document page images instead of OCR'd text. The system pairs ColQwen2.5 patch-level page embeddings with a sharded MapReduce LLM filter, scaling to ~350K pages while keeping Stage-1 retrieval under 30 ms via an offline coarse-to-fine index (C=8 centroids per page, ANN over centroids, exact two-way scoring on the top-R shortlist). A vision-language model (VLM) then iteratively refines its query and accumulates evidence in a memory bank across up to 3 reasoning rounds, with a single iteration costing ~15.9 s and the full three-round pipeline ~47.8 s on 4xA100. Across four medical QA benchmarks (MedQA, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, MMLU-Med), MEDVRAG reaches 78.6% average accuracy. Under controlled comparison with the same Qwen2.5-VL-32B backbone, retrieval contributes a +5.8 point gain over the no-retrieval baseline; we also note a +1.8 point edge over MedRAG + GPT-4 (76.8%), with the caveat that this is a cross-paper rather than head-to-head comparison. Ablations isolate +1.0 from page-image vs text-chunk retrieval, +1.5 from iteration, and +1.0 from the memory bank.

AI.tldr: MED-VRAG是一种多模态医学RAG系统，通过检索和推理 PMC 文档页面图像（而非 OCR 文本）来利用丰富的视觉内容，在四个医学 QA 基准上达到 78.6% 平均准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学 RAG 系统通常处理从生物医学文献中提取的文本块，丢弃了原始文档页面的丰富视觉内容（表格、图形、结构化布局）。
AI.method: 提出 MED-VRAG，一种迭代多模态 RAG 框架，配有 ColQwen2.5 patch-level 页面嵌入和分片 MapReduce LLM 过滤器，通过离线粗到精索引（C=8 个质心/页，ANN over 质心，top-R 候选的精确双向评分）实现 ~350K 页规模下 Stage-1 检索 <30 ms。VLM 在最多 3 轮推理中迭代优化查询并在记忆库中累积证据。
AI.result: 在四个医学 QA 基准（MedQA、MedMCQA、PubMedQA、MMLU-Med）上达到 78.6% 平均准确率。相比无检索基线提升 +5.8 点，相比 MedRAG + GPT-4 提升 +1.8 点。消融实验：页面图像 vs 文本块检索 +1.0，迭代 +1.5，记忆库 +1.0。
AI.conclusion: MED-VRAG 是一种有效的多模态医学 RAG 系统，通过利用文档页面的视觉内容实现了医学 QA 最先进性能。

The only partial similarity is the use of VLM (ColQwen2.5), but the application domain is entirely different (medical vs computer graphics).

title: Consumer Attitudes Towards AI in Digital Health: A Mixed-Methods Survey in Australia
summary: AI applications are increasingly being introduced into digital health. While technical performance has advanced rapidly, successful deployment mainly depends on consumer attitudes, especially to patient-facing applications. However, most existing research examines consumer attitudes towards healthcare AI at an abstract level rather than in response to concrete artefacts. We report a mixed-methods survey study in Australia (N=275) examining consumer readiness, acceptance, trust, and risk perceptions of healthcare AI, combined with a scenario-based evaluation of an AI-generated versus clinician-written consultation summary. Participants expressed moderate optimism and strong perceived usefulness and ease of use, but also substantial concerns about accuracy, safety, and data use. In the scenario task, the AI-generated summary was strongly preferred for quality, empathy, and overall usefulness, yet identification of the AI summary was near chance. Findings show that consumers judge AI through concrete communication quality and visible human governance, underscoring the need for clinically supervised deployment frameworks beyond technical performance alone.

title: Taming Noise-Induced Prototype Degradation for Privacy-Preserving Personalized Federated Fine-Tuning
summary: Prototype-based Personalized Federated Learning (ProtoPFL) enables efficient multi-domain adaptation by communicating compact class prototypes, but directly sharing them poses privacy risks. A common defense involves per-example $\ell_2$ clipping before prototype computation to bound sensitivity, followed by isotropic Gaussian noise to enforce Local Differential Privacy (LDP). However, Isotropic Gaussian Prototype Perturbation (IGPP) typically over-perturbs discriminative dimensions and struggles to balance the clipping threshold with representation fidelity. In this paper, we propose VPDR, a client-side privacy plug-in that seamlessly integrates into existing ProtoPFLs. Motivated by the observation that dimension-wise class variance reflects discriminability, we introduce Variance-adaptive Prototype Perturbation (VPP), which allocates less noise to discriminative subspaces, preserving semantic separability while ensuring privacy. We further develop Distillation-guided Clipping Regularization (DCR), which enables feature norms to adaptively concentrate near the predefined clipping threshold while maintaining prediction consistency. Theoretical analysis shows that our groupwise mechanism provides privacy guarantees no weaker than the isotropic baseline under the same privacy constraints. Extensive experiments on multi-domain benchmarks demonstrate that VPDR achieves a superior privacy-utility trade-off, outperforming IGPP in personalized federated fine-tuning without sacrificing robustness against realistic attacks.

AI.tldr: 提出VPDR框架，通过方差自适应原型扰动(VPP)和蒸馏引导的裁剪正则化(DCR)解决现有联邦学习方法中过度扰动和隐私权衡不佳的问题，在保持隐私的同时更好地保留语义可分离性。
AI.motivation: 现有Isotropic Gaussian Prototype Perturbation (IGPP)方法存在两个关键问题：1) isotropic噪声会过度扰动判别性维度，损害语义可分离性；2) 裁剪阈值与表示保真度之间的平衡难以把握。需要一种能根据维度重要性自适应分配噪声的方案。
AI.method: 1. 方差自适应原型扰动(VPP)：基于维度级别的类方差反映判别性，将较少噪声分配给判别性子空间，保留语义可分离性；2. 蒸馏引导的裁剪正则化(DCR)：使特征范数自适应集中在预设裁剪阈值附近，同时保持预测一致性；3. 理论分析证明分组机制提供不弱于 isotropic baseline 的隐私保证。
AI.result: 在多域基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，VPDR实现了更优的隐私-效用权衡，在个性化联邦微调中优于IGPP，且不牺牲对现实攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VPDR框架通过创新的方差自适应扰动和蒸馏引导裁剪策略，有效解决了原型联邦学习中的隐私保护与效用权衡问题，为客户端隐私保护提供了有效的即插即用解决方案。

There is zero application domain match - federated learning for privacy preservation has no connection to text-to-motion generation, visual feature extraction, or 3D motion synthesis. title: Post-Optimization Adaptive Rank Allocation for LoRA
summary: Exponential growth in the scale of modern foundation models has led to the widespread adoption of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) as a parameter-efficient fine-tuning technique. However, standard LoRA implementations disregard the varying intrinsic dimensionality of model layers and enforce a uniform rank, leading to parameter redundancy. We propose Post-Optimization Adaptive Rank Allocation (PARA), a data-free compression method for LoRA that integrates seamlessly into existing fine-tuning pipelines. PARA leverages Singular Value Decomposition to prune LoRA ranks using a global threshold over singular values across all layers. This results in non-uniform rank allocation based on layer-wise spectral importance. As a post-hoc method, PARA circumvents the training modifications and resulting instabilities that dynamic architectures typically incur. We empirically demonstrate that PARA reduces parameter count by 75-90\% while preserving the predictive performance of the original, uncompressed LoRA across multiple vision and language benchmarks. Code will be published upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: PARA是一种数据无关的LoRA压缩方法，通过奇异值分解对LoRA秩进行全局阈值剪枝，实现基于层谱重要性的非均匀秩分配，在视觉和语言任务上可将参数减少75-90%同时保持性能。
AI.motivation: 现代基础模型规模呈指数级增长，导致低秩自适应（LoRA）作为参数高效微调技术被广泛采用。然而，标准LoRA实现忽略了模型层不同的内在维度，并强制使用统一秩，导致参数冗余。
AI.method: PARA利用奇异值分解，通过对所有层的奇异值使用全局阈值来剪枝LoRA秩。这实现了基于层谱重要性的非均匀秩分配。作为后处理方法，PARA可以无缝集成到现有微调管线中。
AI.result: PARA在保持原始未压缩LoRA预测性能的同时，能够将参数数量减少75-90%，并在多个视觉和语言基准测试中验证了这一效果。
AI.conclusion: PARA作为后验方法，避免了动态架构通常带来的训练修改和不稳定性问题，为LoRA压缩提供了一种无需数据的有效解决方案。

The application domains are entirely different: this paper deals with model compression for vision/language tasks, while the research profile focuses on text-to-motion generation (3D human motion from video). Although it mentions "visual" tasks, this refers to image recognition tasks, not motion generation. There is no overlap in methods for the intended application.

title: HiMix: Hierarchical Artifact-aware Mixup for Generalized Synthetic Image Detection
summary: The rapid evolution of generative models has enabled the creation of highly realistic and diverse synthetic images, posing significant challenges to reliable and generalizable Synthetic Image Detection (SID). However, existing detectors are typically trained on limited and biased datasets, resulting in poor generalization to unseen generators. To address this issue, we propose HiMix, a unified framework that enhances generalization by expanding the training distribution and promoting artifact-aware representations. Specifically, the Mixup-driven Distributional Augmentation (MDA) module constructs continuous transitional samples between real and fake images, improving coverage of low-confidence regions and exposing the model to more challenging samples, while the pixel-wise mixup operation smoothly perturbs semantics to enhance sensitivity to low-level artifacts. Moreover, the Hierarchical Artifact-aware Representation (HAR) module aggregates artifact information from both global and local levels through cross-layer integration and coarse-to-fine feature fusion, enabling the extraction of discriminative forgery representations under diverse distributions. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that HiMix achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing well-separated logits for improved generalization to unseen forgeries.

AI.tldr: 提出了HiMix框架，通过混合数据增强和分层 artifact 表示学习来提升合成图像检测的泛化能力，解决对未见生成器的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 现有合成图像检测器在有限且有偏的训练数据上训练，导致对未见生成器的泛化能力较差，难以可靠检测新型AI生成的图像。
AI.method: 提出HiMix统一框架，包含两个核心模块：1) MDA模块通过mixup技术生成real-fake图像间的连续过渡样本，扩大训练分布并暴露模型处理低置信度区域；2) HAR模块通过跨层集成和粗细特征融合从全局和局部层面聚合artifact信息。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，建立了良好分离的logits以提升对未见伪造的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: HiMix通过分布增强和artifact感知表示学习有效解决了SID的泛化问题，为检测未知生成器产生的合成图像提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The paper is about Synthetic Image Detection (computer vision/image forensics), not Text-to-Motion generation (computer graphics). Even though some technical terms might overlap, the goal is completely different - detecting AI-generated images vs generating 3D human motion. This paper provides no solution to any of the research profile's pain points regarding motion generation from visual/text inputs.

title: Focus Session: Autonomous Systems Dependability in the era of AI: Design Challenges in Safety, Security, Reliability and Certification
summary: The design of embedded safety-critical systems such as those used in next-generation automotive and autonomous platforms, is increasingly challenged by escalating system complexity, hardware-software heterogeneity, and the integration of intelligent, data-driven components. Ensuring dependability in such systems requires a holistic approach that spans multiple abstraction layers and encompasses both design- and run-time assurance. Traditional methods for reliability, safety, and security management often fall short in addressing the dynamic and uncertain behaviors introduced by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) components, especially under stringent real-time, power, and safety constraints. While AI and ML offer powerful predictive, adaptive, and self-optimizing capabilities that can enhance system dependability, their inherent non-determinism, data-dependence, and lack of formal guarantees introduce new challenges for verification, validation, and certification. This paper explores emerging methodologies, architectures, and frameworks for designing dependable autonomous and embedded systems in the era of AI. It highlight advances in reliability modeling, secure system design, and certification approaches that account for imperfect, learning-enabled components, aiming to bridge the gap between AI innovation and certifiable system-level dependability.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何将AI/ML组件集成到嵌入式安全关键系统中，同时满足严格的实时、功耗和安全约束。AI/ML虽然能增强系统可靠性，但其非确定性和缺乏正式保证带来了新的验证挑战。文章探讨了可靠性建模、安全设计 和认证框架方面的进展。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式安全关键系统（如下一代汽车和自动驾驶平台）的设计面临系统复杂性增加、硬件-软件异构性及AI/ML组件集成的挑战。传统可靠性/安全/安全管理方法难以处理AI组件的动态不确定行为，且缺乏正式验证保证
AI.method: 探讨新兴方法论、架构和框架，包括可靠性建模、安全系统设计和认证方法的进展
AI.result: 提出旨在弥合AI创新与可认证系统级可靠性之间差距的方法，解决不完美的学习启用组件的问题
AI.conclusion: 为AI时代设计可认证的可靠自治和嵌入式系统提供方法论指导

The application domain is entirely different (safety engineering vs. motion generation), and none of the methods or pain points align with the research profile's focus on video-to-motion conversion, visual feature extraction, or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: Generate Your Talking Avatar from Video Reference
summary: Existing talking avatar methods typically adopt an image-to-video pipeline conditioned on a static reference image within the same scene as the target generation. This restricted, single-view perspective lacks sufficient temporal and expression cues, limiting the ability to synthesize high-fidelity talking avatars in customized backgrounds. To this end, we introduce Talking Avatar generation from Video Reference (TAVR), a novel framework that shifts the paradigm by leveraging cross-scene video inputs. To effectively process these extended temporal contexts and bridge cross-scene domain gaps, TAVR integrates a token selection module alongside a comprehensive three-stage training scheme. Specifically, same-scene video pretraining establishes foundational appearance copying, which is subsequently expanded by cross-scene reference fine-tuning for robust cross-scene adaptation. Finally, task-specific reinforcement learning aligns the generated outputs with identity-based rewards to maximize identity similarity. To systematically evaluate cross-scene robustness, we construct a new benchmark comprising 158 carefully curated cross-scene video pairs. Extensive experiments show that TAVR benefits from flexible inference-time video referencing and consistently surpasses existing baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively. This work has been deployed to production. For more related research, please visit \href{https://www.heygen.com/research}{HeyGen Research} and \href{https://www.heygen.com/research/avatar-v-model}{HeyGen Avatar-V}.

AI.tldr: TAVR（Talking Avatar from Video Reference）是一个利用跨场景视频输入生成说话头像的新框架，通过token选择模块和三阶段训练方案解决了传统方法受限于单一视角和静态图像的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有说话头像方法通常采用图像到视频管道，受限于相同场景中的静态参考图像，这种单一视角缺乏足够的时间 和表达线索，无法在自定义背景下合成高保真说话头像。
AI.method: TAVR框架集成token选择模块，采用三阶段训练：1）同场景视频预训练建立基础外观复制；2）跨场景参考微调实现鲁棒的跨场景适应；3）特定任务强化学习通过身份奖励对齐生成输出以最大化身份相似度。
AI.result: 构建了包含158个精心策划的跨场景视频对的新benchmark，实验表明TAVR受益于灵活的推理时视频引用，在定量和定性指标上均一致超越现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TAVR成功实现跨场景高保真说话头像生成，已部署到生产环境，代表了说话头像生成技术的显著进步。

relevance_reason: This paper is about "talking avatar" video generation (2D visual content), not 3D motion generation. The research profile specifically targets Text-to-Motion in Computer Graphics - generating 3D human motion data. Talking avatar focuses on facial animation/lip-sync for video output, which is fundamentally different from motion synthesis. While both use video understanding, this paper generates 2D video content rather than bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output. The pain points are completely different - one deals with identity preservation in video generation, the other with extracting visual guidance for 3D motion and ensuring temporal consistency in motion data.

title: Training-Free Tunnel Defect Inspection and Engineering Interpretation via Visual Recalibration and Entity Reconstruction
summary: Tunnel inspection requires outputs that can support defect localization, measurement, severity grading, and engineering documentation. Existing training-free foundation-model pipelines usually stop at coarse open-vocabulary proposals, which are difficult to use directly in interference-heavy tunnel scenes. We propose a training-free framework TunnelMIND. Specifically, language-guided defect proposals are not treated as final outputs; instead, their spatial support is recalibrated at inference time through dense visual consistency, so that coarse semantic anchors can be transformed into more reliable prompts under tunnel-specific hard negatives. The resulting masks are further reconstructed into structured defect entities with category, location, geometry, severity, and context attributes, which are then mapped to retrieval-grounded explanation and engineering-readable report generation under expert knowledge constraints. On visible, GPR, and road defect tasks, TunnelMIND achieves F1 scores of 0.68, 0.78, and 0.72, respectively. Overall, TunnelMIND shows that training-free tunnel inspection can move beyond coarse localization toward structured defect evidence for engineering assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的隧道检测框架TunnelMIND，通过密集视觉一致性重新校准语言引导的缺陷提议，将粗粒度语义锚点转换为更可靠的提示，生成包含类别、位置、几何形状、严重程度和上下文属性的结构化缺陷实体，用于工程评估和报告生成。在可见光、GPR和道路缺陷任务上分别达到0.68、0.78和0.72的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 隧道检测需要支持缺陷定位、测量、严重程度分级和工程文档编写的输出。现有无需训练的Foundation Model管道通常只生成粗粒度的开放词汇提案，难以在干扰严重的隧道场景中直接使用。
AI.method: 提出无需训练的框架TunnelMIND。核心思想：1）语言引导的缺陷提议不作为最终输出，而是通过密集视觉一致性在推理时重新校准其空间支持；2）将粗粒度语义锚点在隧道特定硬负样本下转换为更可靠的提示；3）将生成的Mask重建为包含类别、位置、几何形状、严重程度和上下文属性的结构化缺陷实体；4）在专家知识约束下映射到检索增强的解释和工程可读报告生成。
AI.result: 在可见光、GPR和道路缺陷任务上，TunnelMIND分别达到0.68、0.78和0.72的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: TunnelMIND表明无需训练的隧道检测可以从粗粒度定位转向用于工程评估的结构化缺陷证据。

The goal is detecting defects in tunnels, not generating 3D motion from video or text. This is a different field entirely with no relevant application to motion synthesis.

title: Dynamic Cluster Data Sampling for Efficient and Long-Tail-Aware Vision-Language Pre-training
summary: The computational cost of training a vision-language model (VLM) can be reduced by sampling the training data. Previous work on efficient VLM pre-training has pointed to the importance of semantic data balance, adjusting the distribution of topics in the data to improve VLM accuracy. However, existing efficient pre-training approaches may disproportionately remove rare concepts from the training corpus. As a result, \emph{long-tail concepts} remain insufficiently represented in the training data and are not effectively captured during training. In this work, we introduce a \emph{dynamic cluster-based sampling approach (DynamiCS)} that downsamples large clusters of data and upsamples small ones. The approach is dynamic in that it applies sampling at each epoch. We first show the importance of dynamic sampling for VLM training. Then, we demonstrate the advantage of our cluster-scaling approach, which maintains the relative order of semantic clusters in the data and emphasizes the long-tail. This approach contrasts with current work, which focuses only on flattening the semantic distribution of the data. Our experiments show that DynamiCS reduces the computational cost of VLM training and provides a performance advantage for long-tail concepts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynamiCS，一种动态聚类采样方法，通过在每个epoch对大规模数据簇降采样、小规模数据簇升采样来解决VLM预训练中的长尾概念问题，在降低计算成本的同时提升长尾概念的性能。
AI.motivation: 训练视觉语言模型的计算成本高昂，现有的高效预训练方法可能会不成比例地移除稀有概念，导致长尾概念在训练数据中表示不足，未能有效学习。
AI.method: 提出动态聚类采样方法DynamiCS，在每个epoch对数据应用采样。具体做法是对大规模数据簇降采样，对小规模数据簇升采样，维持语义聚类的相对顺序并强调长尾概念。方法核心包括：(1)动态采样在每个epoch应用：(2)聚类缩放保持语义簇的相对顺序。
AI.result: DynamiCS降低了VLM训练的计算成本，并为长尾概念提供了性能优势。实验表明该方法在保持语义分布相对顺序的同时，有效提升了长尾概念的表示效果。
AI.conclusion: 与现有仅关注flatten语义分布的方法不同，DynamiCS通过聚类缩放方式强调长尾概念，在计算效率和长尾概念性能之间取得平衡，为高效VLM预训练提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses dynamic cluster data sampling for efficient VLM pre-training to handle long-tail concepts, which is completely outside the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion domain. While it mentions VLM, it uses VLM for general vision-language understanding tasks, not for extracting visual guidance features for 3D motion generation. The application domain, goal, and methodology are fundamentally different - this is about improving VLM training efficiency, not about text-to-motion generation, bridging 2D-3D domains, or ensuring temporal consistency in motion synthesis.

title: TripVVT: A Large-Scale Triplet Dataset and a Coarse-Mask Baseline for In-the-Wild Video Virtual Try-On
summary: Due to the scarcity of large-scale in-the-wild triplet data and the improper use of masks, the performance of video virtual try-on models remains limited. In this paper, we first introduce **TripVVT-10K**, the largest and most diverse in-the-wild triplet dataset to date, providing explicit video-level cross-garment supervision that existing video datasets lack. Built upon this resource, we develop **TripVVT**, a Diffusion Transformer-based framework that replaces fragile garment masks with a simple, stable human-mask prior, enabling reliable background preservation while remaining robust to real-world motion, occlusion, and cluttered scenes. To support comprehensive evaluation, we further establish **TripVVT-Bench**, a 100-case benchmark covering diverse garments, complex environments, and multi-person scenarios, with metrics spanning video quality, try-on fidelity, background consistency, and temporal coherence. Compared to state-of-the-art academic and commercial systems, TripVVT achieves superior video quality and garment fidelity while markedly improving generalization to challenging in-the-wild videos. We publicly release the dataset and benchmark, which we believe provide a solid foundation for advancing controllable, realistic, and temporally stable video virtual try-on.

AI.tldr: 本文发布了TripVVT-10K数据集和TripVVT框架，用于提升视频虚拟试穿的质量和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 由于大规模真实世界三元组数据稀缺以及mask使用不当，现有视频虚拟试穿模型的性能仍然受限。
AI.method: 提出TripVVT-10K数据集（含最大最多样的真实世界视频三元组），基于Diffusion Transformer构建TripVVT框架，用简单稳定的人体mask先验替代脆弱的衣物mask。
AI.result: TripVVT在视频质量、试穿保真度、背景一致性和时间稳定性上均优于现有学术和商业系统，对复杂真实场景具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文工作为推进可控、真实、时间稳定的视频虚拟试穿提供了坚实基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Video Virtual Try-On (VTO) - a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion. While both are in computer graphics and use diffusion models, VTO focuses on putting virtual clothes on a person in video (rendering task), whereas Text-to-Motion focuses on generating 3D human motion sequences from visual/text inputs (motion generation task). The pain points, goals, and application domains are fundamentally different - this is as different as image classification vs text classification despite both being ML problems.

title: Rethinking Agentic Reinforcement Learning In Large Language Models
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has traditionally focused on training specialized agents to optimize predefined reward functions within narrowly defined environments. However, the advent of powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and increasingly complex, open-ended tasks has catalyzed a paradigm shift towards agentic paradigms within RL. This emerging framework extends beyond traditional RL by emphasizing the development of autonomous agents capable of goal-setting, long-term planning, dynamic strategy adaptation, and interactive reasoning in uncertain, real-world environments. Unlike conventional approaches that rely heavily on static objectives and episodic interactions, LLM-based Agentic RL incorporates cognitive-like capabilities such as meta-reasoning, self-reflection, and multi-step decision-making directly into the learning loop. In this paper, we provide a deep insight for looking the conceptual foundations, methodological innovations, and effective designs underlying this trend. Furthermore, we identify critical challenges and outline promising future directions for building LLM-based Agentic RL.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了基于大型语言模型(LLM)的智能体强化学习(Agentic RL)这一新兴范式，探讨了其概念基础、方法创新和设计方向，并展望了未来的研究挑战和发展趋势。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习专注于在狭义环境中优化预定义奖励函数，而LLMs的出现和复杂开放性任务的增加推动了RL向智能体范式的转变，需要开发具备目标设定、长期规划、动态策略调整和交互式推理能力的自主智能体。
AI.method: 该研究采用综述性方法，深入分析基于LLM的智能体强化学习的概念基础、方法论创新和有效设计，包括元推理、自我反思和多步决策等认知能力的整合。
AI.result: 论文识别了这一新兴领域的关键挑战，包括如何在不确定的真实世界环境中实现自主目标设定和动态策略适应，并展望了构建更智能的LLM-based Agentic RL系统的未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的智能体强化学习代表了强化学习领域的重要范式转变，超越了传统RL依赖静态目标和 episodic 交互的方法，为构建具备类认知能力的自主智能体提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Agentic Reinforcement Learning in Large Language Models - a completely different field from Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. This paper addresses LLM agent systems and reinforcement learning for LLMs, which is entirely unrelated to generating 3D human motion from text or video inputs.

title: ClimateVID -- Social Media Videos Analysis and Challenges Involved
comment: Equal contributions by Shiqi Xu and Moritz Burmester
summary: The pervasive growth of digital content, specifically short videos on social media platforms, has significantly altered how topics are discussed and understood in public discourse. In this work, we advance automated visual theme detection by assessing zero-shot and clustering capabilities on social media data. (1) We evaluated the capabilities of notable VLMs such as VideoChatGPT, PandaGPT, and VideoLLava using zero-shot image classification and compared their performance to the baseline provided by frame-wise CLIP image classification. (2) By treating clustering as a minimum cost multicut problem, we aim to uncover insightful patterns in an unsupervised manner. For both analysis strategies, we provide extensive evaluations and practical guidance to practitioners. While VLMs are currently not able to detect climate change specific classes, the clustering results are distinct visual frames. %Given that VLMs are not currently capable to grasp the climate change discourse, we focus the clustering evaluation of image embedding models. We find that both ConvNeXt V2 and DINOv2 produce meaningful clusters, with DINOv2 focusing more on style differences and abstract categories, while ConvNeXt V2 clusters differ in more fine-grained ways. Code available at https://github.com/KathPra/ClimateVID.git.

title: Building Persona-Based Agents On Demand: Tailoring Multi-Agent Workflows to User Needs
summary: Recent advances in agentic AI are shifting automation from discrete tools to proactive multi-agent systems that coordinate multi-specialized capabilities behind unified interfaces. However, today's agent systems typically rely on hard-coded agent architectures with fixed roles, coordination patterns, and interaction flows that limit end-user personalization and make adaptation to individual needs and contexts difficult. Given this limitation, we argue that on-demand persona-based agent generation offers a promising path towards more efficient and contextually appropriate interaction within agentic workflows. By dynamically crafting agents and personas at run-time to match user characteristics, task demands, and workflow context, agentic platforms can move beyond one-size-fits-all configurations. We present a pipeline for on-demand persona generation in agentic platforms, detailing how real-time crafting of AI personas can be systematically integrated within agent systems, aiming to open new possibilities in agentic platform design paradigms.

AI.tldr: 论文提出在智能体AI平台中实现按需生成基于人设（persona）的智能体，以解决当前硬编码智能体架构无法满足个性化需求的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前agent系统依赖硬编码架构，固定角色、协调模式和交互流程，限制终端用户个性化，适应个人需求和上下文困难。
AI.method: 提出了一个在智能体平台中按需生成人设的管道，详细说明如何将实时生成AI人设系统性地集成到智能体系统中。
AI.result: 通过动态创建匹配用户特征、任务需求和工作流上下文的智能体和人设，智能体平台可以超越"一 fits all"配置。
AI.conclusion: 为智能体平台设计范式开启新的可能性，提供更高效和上下文适当的交互方式。

title: Faster 3D Gaussian Splatting Convergence via Structure-Aware Densification
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting has emerged as a powerful scene representation for real-time novel-view synthesis. However, its standard adaptive density control relies on screen-space positional gradients, which do not distinguish between geometric misplacement and frequency aliasing, often leading to either over-blurred high-frequency textures or inefficient over-densification. We present a structure-aware densification framework. Our key insight is that the decision to subdivide a Gaussian should be driven by an explicit comparison between its projected screen-space extent and the local structure of the texture it seeks to represent. We introduce a multi-scale frequency analysis combining structure tensors with Laplacian scale space analysis to estimate the dominant frequency at each pixel, enabling robust supervision across varying texture scales. Based on this analysis, we define $η$, a per-Gaussian, per-axis frequency violation metric that indicates when a primitive may be under-resolving local texture details. Unlike methods that perform isotropic splitting (e.g., splitting each Gaussian into two smaller ones with uniform shape), our approach performs anisotropic splitting. For each axis with high $η$, we compute a split factor to better resolve the local frequency content. We further introduce a multiview consistency criterion that aggregates $η$ observations across multiple views. By performing densification early and faster, we skip the lengthy iterative densification phases required by baseline methods and achieve significantly faster convergence. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method also achieves superior reconstruction quality, particularly in high-frequency regions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构感知的3D Gaussian Splatting密集化框架，通过多尺度频率分析和η指标指导各向异性分裂，解决了传统方法无法区分几何错位和频率混叠的问题，实现了更快收敛和更好的高频区域重建质量。
AI.motivation: 3D Gaussian Splatting的自适应密度控制依赖屏幕空间位置梯度，无法区分几何错位和频率混叠，导致高频纹理过度模糊或效率低下的过度密集化。
AI.method: 提出结构感知密集化框架，结合结构张量与Laplacian尺度空间进行多尺度频率分析，估计每个像素的主频率。引入per-Gaussian、per-axis的频率违反指标η，指示原语是否未能解析局部纹理细节。执行各向异性分裂而非各向同性分裂，并引入多视图一致性准则聚合η观测。
AI.result: 通过更早更快的密集化，跳过基线方法所需的漫长迭代密集化阶段，实现了显著更快的收敛。在标准基准测试中，特别是在高频区域，取得了优于基线的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持实时渲染能力的同时，通过结构感知的密集化策略有效提升了重建质量，尤其在高频纹理区域表现优异，为3D场景表示提供了更高效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain and methodology. The paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting (a novel view synthesis/rendering technique for 3D reconstruction), while the research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion generation (generating human motion from text/video using diffusion models and video generation models). There is no overlap in methods - the paper addresses rendering quality, not motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (visual feature extraction, quality assessment for motion prior, 2D-to-3D domain gap, or temporal consistency in motion generation).

title: Graph World Models: Concepts, Taxonomy, and Future Directions
summary: As one of the mainstream models of artificial intelligence, world models allow agents to learn the representation of the environment for efficient prediction and planning. However, classical world models based on flat tensors face several key problems, including noise sensitivity, error accumulation and weak reasoning. To address these limitations, many recent studies use graph structure to decompose the environment into entity nodes and interactive edges, and model virtual environments in a structured space. This paper systematically formalizes and unifies these emerging graph-based works under the concept of graph world models (GWMs). To the best of our knowledge, GWMs have not yet been explicitly defined and surveyed as a unified research paradigm. Furthermore, we propose a taxonomy based on relational inductive biases (RIB), categorizing GWMs by the specific structural priors they inject: (1) spatial RIB for topological abstraction; (2) physical RIB for dynamic simulation; and (3) logical RIB for causal and semantic reasoning. For each model category, we outline the key design principles, summarize representative models, and conduct comparative analyses. We further discuss open challenges and future directions, including dynamic graph adaptation, probabilistic relational dynamics, multi-granularity inductive biases, and the need for dedicated benchmarks and evaluation metrics for GWMs.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了图世界模型(GWMs)的概念框架，系统形式化了新兴的基于图结构的世界模型研究，并基于关系归纳偏置(RIB)提出了三维分类法：空间RIB、物理RIB和逻辑RIB，为 Graph AI 和世界模型研究提供了统一的研究范式和理论指导。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机是解决传统基于扁平张量的世界模型面临的噪声敏感、误差累积和弱推理等关键问题。近年来，许多研究开始使用图结构来分解环境建模虚拟环境，但缺乏统一的理论框架和研究范式。
AI.method: 作者提出了图世界模型(GWMs)的概念，并基于关系归纳偏置(RIB)提出了一种分类法，将GWMs分为三类：(1)空间RIB用于拓扑抽象；(2)物理RIB用于动态模拟；(3)逻辑RIB用于因果和语义推理。对每类模型概述设计原则、总结代表性模型并进行对比分析。
AI.result: 本文系统地形式化和统一了新兴的基于图的图世界模型 work，将其作为统一的研究范式，并提出了基于RIB的分类框架，为该领域的研究提供了理论指导。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了GWMs领域统一理论框架的空白，为后续研究奠定了基础。未来挑战包括动态图适应、概率关系动力学、多粒度归纳偏置以及专用基准和评估指标的开发。

relevance_reason: The paper is about "Graph World Models" - a general AI/ML framework for environmental modeling in virtual worlds. This is completely unrelated to Text-to-Motion in Computer Graphics. The application domain is entirely different: it's about world modeling for AI agents/robotics, not about generating 3D human motion from text or video. The methods discussed (graph-based world models with spatial, physical, logical RIB) have no connection to diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual feature extraction from video, or video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance. This paper would not help someone working on Text-to-Motion research at all.

title: Simulating clinical interventions with a generative multimodal model of human physiology
summary: Understanding how human health changes over time, and why responses to interventions vary between individuals, remains a central challenge in medicine. Here we present HealthFormer, a decoder-only transformer that models the human physiological trajectory generatively, by training on data from the Human Phenotype Project, a multi-visit cohort of over 15,000 deeply phenotyped individuals. We tokenise each participant's health trajectory across 667 measurements spanning seven domains: blood biomarkers, body composition, sleep physiology, continuous glucose monitoring, gut microbiome, wearable-derived physiology, and behaviour and medication exposure. We train HealthFormer to forecast individual physiological trajectories across these domains, and from this single generative objective a range of clinically relevant tasks can be expressed as queries on the model. We show that, without task-specific training, HealthFormer transfers to four independent cohorts and improves prediction for 27 of 30 incident-disease and mortality endpoints, exceeding established clinical risk scores in every comparison. We further show that the model can simulate interventions in silico: in a held-out personalised-nutrition trial, intervention-conditioned predictions recover individual six-month biomarker changes (e.g., Pearson r = 0.78 for diastolic blood pressure). Across 41 randomised intervention-outcome comparisons drawn from published trials, our results show that the predicted direction of effect agrees in every case, and the predicted mean falls within the reported 95% confidence interval in 30 cases. We position HealthFormer as an initial health world model, from which forecasting, risk stratification, and intervention-conditioned simulation arise as queries, providing a basis for clinical digital twins.

AI.tldr: 提出HealthFormer，一个基于Transformer的生成式健康世界模型，通过学习Human Phenotype Project数据集（包含15,000多名个体的多访视数据）来模拟人类生理轨迹，实现疾病预测和干预模拟。
AI.motivation: 理解人类健康随时间变化的规律，以及不同个体对干预措施响应差异的原因，是医学领域的核心挑战。现有方法难以实现个体化健康轨迹建模和干预效果预测。
AI.method: 使用decoder-only transformer架构，将667个测量指标（涵盖7个领域：血液生物标志物、身体组成、睡眠生理、连续血糖监测、肠道微生物组、可穿戴设备数据和行为与药物暴露）进行token化，训练模型预测个体生理轨迹，并将其应用于疾病预测和干预模拟任务。
AI.result: 在四个独立队列中验证，未经任务特定训练即改善了30个终点中的27个疾病和死亡预测，性能超过临床风险评分。在个性化营养试验中，干预条件预测成功恢复了6个月的生物标志物变化（如舒张压 Pearson r=0.78）。在41项随机干预试验中，预测效果方向全部一致，30项预测均值落在95%置信区间内。
AI.conclusion: HealthFormer作为首个健康世界模型，从单一生成目标实现了预测、风险分层和干预模拟等功能，为临床数字孪生提供了基础框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is in the medical/health domain (disease prediction, clinical intervention simulation using physiological biomarkers like blood markers, CGM, sleep data), while the research profile is in Computer Graphics specifically for Text-to-Motion generation. The application domains are completely different - medical health prediction vs human motion animation. Using transformer architecture in medical domain is not comparable to video generation models and 3D motion synthesis in computer graphics. This paper would be useful for health AI researchers but has no relevance for someone working on text-to-motion generation in computer graphics.

title: TAFA-GSGC: Group-wise Scalable Point Cloud Geometry Compression with Progressive Residual Refinement
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2026
summary: Scalable compression is essential for bandwidth-adaptive transmission, yet most learned codecs are optimized for a fixed rate-distortion point, making rate adaptation costly due to re-encoding or maintaining multiple bitstreams. In this work, we propose TAFA-GSGC, a scalable learned point cloud geometry codec that enables multi-quality decoding from a single bitstream and a single trained model. TAFA-GSGC combines layered residual refinement with channel-group entropy coding, and introduces Target-Aligned Feature Aggregation module to reduce cross-layer redundancy in enhancement residuals. Our framework supports up to 9 decodable quality levels with monotonic quality improvement as more subbitstreams are received, while maintaining strong compression efficiency. Compared with the baseline PCGCv2, TAFA-GSGC attains comparable and slightly better RD performance, achieving average BD-Rate savings of -4.99% in D1 and -5.92% in D2.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAFA-GSGC，一种可学习的点云几何可扩展Codec，通过分层残差refinement和目标对齐特征聚合模块，支持从单一比特流实现多质量解码，在D1/D2上分别节省4.99%和5.92%的BD-Rate。
AI.motivation: 可扩展压缩对于带宽自适应传输至关重要，但大多数学习型codec针对固定率失真点进行优化，使得率适应成本高昂，因为需要重新编码或维护多个比特流。
AI.method: TAFA-GSGC结合了分层残差 refinement和信道组熵编码，并引入目标对齐特征聚合(TAFA)模块来减少增强残差中的跨层冗余。该框架支持最多9个可解码质量等级，随着接收更多子比特流，质量单调提升。
AI.result: 与基线PCGCv2相比，TAFA-GSGC实现了相当且略优的RD性能，在D1上实现平均BD-Rate节省-4.99%，在D2上实现-5.92%。
AI.conclusion: TAFA-GSGC是一种可扩展学习的点云几何codec，能够从单一比特流和单一训练模型实现多质量解码，支持高达9个可解码质量等级。该框架在保持强压缩效率的同时实现了单调质量提升，与基线PCGCv2相比，在D1和D2上分别实现了-4.99%和-5.92%的平均BD-Rate节省。

relevance_reason: This paper is about point cloud geometry compression, which is completely unrelated to Text-to-Motion. The application domain is wrong: point cloud processing for 3D scanning/compression vs. generating human motion from text/video inputs. Although both involve 3D data, this paper focuses on scalable video codec compression for point clouds (like 3D scanning data), not motion generation. The methods are also different: hierarchical residual refinement and entropy coding for compression vs. diffusion models and VLM for text-to-motion.

title: Taming the Centaur(s) with LAPITHS: a framework for a theoretically grounded interpretation of AI performances
summary: We introduce a framework called LAPITHS (Language model Analysis through Paradigm grounded Interpretations of Theses about Human likenesS) and use it to show that several major claims advanced by models such as CENTAUR, proposed as an artificial Unified Model of Cognition, are not theoretically or empirically justified. LAPITHS provides a principled reference point for counteracting the current behaviouristic tendency in AI research to interpret the human level performances of transformer based language models as evidence of human like underlying computation and, by extension, as signs of cognitive abilities. The novelty of LAPITHS lies in making explicit the arguments grounded in two quantitative assessments: (i) the Minimal Cognitive Grid, a theoretically motivated method for estimating the cognitive plausibility of artificial systems, and (ii) a behavioural comparison showing that results similar to those reported for CENTAUR like models can be reproduced by other systems that do not satisfy the structural constraints typically associated with cognitive plausibility, and whose outputs do not provide independent explanatory insight into human cognition.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为LAPITHS的分析框架,用于质疑CENTAUR等模型声称的类人认知能力。作者批评了当前AI研究中将transformer模型的类人表现简单解释为认知能力的倾向,并提出两种量化评估方法来支持其论点。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究存在行为主义倾向,即将transformer语言模型的人类水平表现误认为是类人认知能力的证据。作者认为需要建立一个有原则的参考点来对抗这种趋势,特别是针对CENTAUR等声称的人工认知统一模型。
AI.method: 提出两种定量评估方法:(1)最小认知网格(Minimal Cognitive Grid)-一种评估人工系统认知合理性的理论方法;(2)行为对比实验-表明类似CENTAUR模型的结果可以用其他不符合认知结构约束的系统复制。
AI.result: 证明CENTAUR等模型的主要主张在理论和经验上都没有充分依据。研究表明,即使不具备典型认知合理性的系统也能产生类似的人类水平表现,这些输出并不能为人类认知提供独立的解释性洞察。
AI.conclusion: LAPITHS框架为评估AI系统的认知声称提供了原则性方法,有助于纠正AI研究中对语言模型能力的过度解读,推动更严谨的认知能力评估标准。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI evaluation and interpretability (critiquing CENTAUR models' claimed cognitive abilities), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different - this focuses on cognitive science and AI理论框架评估, not video generation, visual feature extraction, or 3D motion synthesis. The pain points (visual guidance extraction, domain gap between 2D and 3D, temporal consistency) are not addressed at all.

title: 3D Reconstruction Techniques in the Manufacturing Domain: Applications, Research Opportunities and Use Cases
summary: This comprehensive review examines the evolution and the current state of the art in three-dimensional (3D) reconstruction techniques in manufacturing applications. The analysis covers both traditional approaches and emerging deep learning methods, showing a critical research gap in unified 3d reconstruction frameworks. Through systematic review of 106 recent publications, we classify reconstruction techniques into three primary categories: data acquisition, point cloud generation, post-processing and applications. Non-contact methods, particularly structured light scanning and stereo vision, have shown significant adoption in manufacturing, with 47% of surveyed applications focusing on quality inspection. The integration of deep learning has enhanced reconstruction accuracy and processing speed, particularly in feature extraction and matching. Key applications span design and development (13%), machining (8%), process (17%), assembly (22%), and quality inspection (40%). While current technologies achieve sub-millimeter accuracy in controlled environments, challenges persist in handling reflective surfaces and dynamic environments. Our findings indicate a trend toward hybrid systems combining multiple sensor types and processing methods to overcome individual limitations. This survey provides a structured framework for understanding current capabilities and future directions in manufacturing-focused 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文是对制造领域三维重建技术的综合综述，涵盖传统方法和新兴深度学习方法，系统分析了106篇 publications，将重建技术分为数据采集、点云生成、后处理和应用四大类别。
AI.motivation: 全面审查制造应用中三维重建技术的演变和当前技术状态，揭示统一三维重建框架的关键研究空白。
AI.method: 系统综述方法，对106篇近期出版物进行分类分析，将重建技术分为数据采集、点云生成、后处理和应用四个主要类别。
AI.result: 非接触方法（结构光扫描和立体视觉）在制造中得到显著应用，47%的应用聚焦于质量检测。深度学习集成提升了重建精度和处理速度。关键应用涵盖设计开发(13%)、加工(8%)、工艺(17%)、装配(22%)和质量检测(40%)。当前技术在受控环境下达到亚毫米精度，但处理反射表面和动态环境仍存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: 趋势向混合系统发展，结合多种传感器类型和处理方法来克服个体局限性。传统方法与深度学习的融合成为提升重建精度和处理速度的关键。未来需要在统一框架、反射表面处理和动态环境适应等方向取得突破。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D reconstruction in the MANUFACTURING domain, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion research field. The application domains are fundamentally different: Text-to-Motion focuses on generating human/animal motion from text/video for graphics/animation, while this paper focuses on reconstructing 3D objects for manufacturing quality control. The methods and pain points are also completely mismatched - this paper uses traditional 3D reconstruction techniques (structure light scanning, stereo vision) rather than diffusion-based motion synthesis, video generation models, or VLM approaches.
