No connection to motion generation, visual guidance extraction, or temporal consistency in motion synthesis.

title: MM-StanceDet: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-modal Multi-agent Stance Detection
summary: Multimodal Stance Detection (MSD) is crucial for understanding public discourse, yet effectively fusing text and image, especially with conflicting signals, remains challenging. Existing methods often face difficulties with contextual grounding, cross-modal interpretation ambiguity, and single-pass reasoning fragility. To address these, we propose Retrieval-Augmented Multi-modal Multi-agent Stance Detection (MM-StanceDet), a novel multi-agent framework integrating Retrieval Augmentation for contextual grounding, specialized Multimodal Analysis agents for nuanced interpretation, a Reasoning-Enhanced Debate stage for exploring perspectives, and Self-Reflection for robust adjudication. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate MM-StanceDet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating the efficacy of its multi-agent architecture and structured reasoning stages in addressing complex multimodal stance challenges.

AI.tldr: MM-StanceDet是一种新型多智能体框架,用于多模态立场检测,通过检索增强、专业多模态分析智能体、推理增强辩论和自我反思四个组件,有效解决文本图像融合中的冲突信号处理、上下文 grounding 和跨模态解释歧义等问题,在五个数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 多模态立场检测(MSD)在理解公众舆论中至关重要,但有效融合文本和图像(尤其是存在冲突信号时)仍然具有挑战性。现有方法在上下文 grounding、跨模态解释歧义和单次推理脆弱性方面存在困难。
AI.method: 提出检索增强多模态多智能体立场检测(MM-StanceDet),这是一个新颖的多智能体框架,集成了:1)检索增强用于上下文 grounding;2)专业多模态分析智能体用于细致解释;3)推理增强辩论阶段用于探索观点;4)自我反思用于稳健裁决。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上的广泛实验表明,MM-StanceDet显著优于最先进的基线,验证了其在处理复杂多模态立场挑战方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MM-StanceDet的多智能体架构和结构化推理阶段能够有效解决多模态立场检测中的挑战,为该领域提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about multi-modal stance detection (NLP/public opinion analysis), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics (3D human motion synthesis from video). The paper deals with text-image fusion for understanding public opinion, not visual feature extraction for motion generation. No overlap in application domain, pain points, or methods - uses multi-agent stance detection instead of diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: AesRM: Improving Video Aesthetics with Expert-Level Feedback
summary: Despite rapid advances in photorealistic video generation, real-world applications such as filmmaking require video aesthetics, e.g., harmonious colors and cinematic lighting, beyond visual fidelity. Prior work on visual aesthetics largely focuses on images, often reducing aesthetics to coarse definitions, e.g., visual pleasure, without a rigorous and systematic evaluation. To improve video aesthetics, we propose a hierarchical rubric that decomposes video aesthetics into three core dimensions, Visual Aesthetics (VA), Visual Fidelity (VF), and Visual Plausibility (VP), with 15 fine-grained criteria, e.g., shot composition. This framework enables a large-scale expert-annotated preference dataset and an evaluation benchmark, AesVideo-Bench, containing about 2500 video pairs with expert annotations on VA, VF, and VP. We then build a family of Video Aesthetic Reward Models (AesRM): AesRM-Base, which directly predicts pairwise preferences on these dimensions to provide efficient post-training rewards, and AesRM-CoT, which additionally generates CoT aligned with all 15 criteria to improve assessment interpretability. Specifically, we train AesRM with a three-stage progressive scheme: (1) Atomic Aesthetic Capability Learning, which strengthens AesRM's recognition of fundamental aesthetic concepts, e.g., accurately identifying centered composition; (2) Cold-Start, aligning the model with structured reasoning protocols; and (3) GRPO, further improving evaluation accuracy. To enhance AesRM-CoT, we additionally propose self-consistency-based CoT synthesis to improve CoT quality and design CoT-based process rewards during GRPO. Extensive experiments show AesRM outperforms baselines on multiple aesthetics benchmarks and is more robust, with lower position bias. Finally, we align Wan2.2 with AesRM and observe clear aesthetic gains over existing aesthetic reward models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统化的视频美学评估框架，包含三维度和15个细粒度标准，构建了大规模专家注释数据集AesVideo-Bench，并开发了视频美学奖励模型（AesRM-Base和AesRM-CoT）。通过三阶段训练和思维链增强方法，实现了对视频美学的高效评估，实验证明该方法显著优于现有基线，并能为视频生成模型提供有效的美学奖励信号。
AI.motivation: 尽管视频生成技术发展迅速，但电影等实际应用需要超越视觉保真度的美学效果（如和谐色彩、电影级光照）。此前视觉美学研究主要聚焦于图像，且常将美学简化为粗略定义（如视觉愉悦），缺乏严格系统的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出分层评估框架，将视频美学分解为三个核心维度：视觉美学（VA）、视觉保真度（VF）和视觉可信度（VP），包含15个细粒度标准。基于此构建了约2500对视频的专家注释数据集AesVideo-Bench。提出两种视频美学奖励模型：AesRM-Base直接预测成对偏好，AesRM-CoT生成与15个标准对齐的思维链以提高可解释性。采用三阶段渐进训练：(1)原子美学能力学习，强化基础美学概念识别；(2)冷启动阶段，对齐结构化推理协议；(3)GRPO进一步提升评估精度。还提出自一致性思维链合成和基于思维链的过程奖励。
AI.result: 实验表明AesRM在多个美学基准上优于基线方法，且更具鲁棒性，位置偏差更低。使用AesRM对齐Wan2.2后获得明显的美学提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次实现了视频美学的系统化评估，为视频生成后训练提供了高效的美学奖励信号，推动了视频生成技术的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video aesthetics evaluation (assessing visual quality of AI-generated videos), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from video/text inputs). These are fundamentally different application domains in computer graphics - one focuses on evaluating aesthetic quality of generated videos (like Wan2.2), the other focuses on extracting and generating 3D skeletal human motion. Although both deal with video generation models (like Wanxiang), the paper addresses aesthetic quality assessment rather than motion extraction or 3D motion generation. It doesn't address the core pain points of: extracting visual guidance features for motion, bridging 2D visual to 3D motion domain gap, or ensuring temporal consistency in 3D motion generation.

title: A Collective Variational Principle Unifying Bayesian Inference, Game Theory, and Thermodynamics
comment: Submitted to Nature. 21 pages, 4 figures. Code and data available at https://github.com/dbouchaffra/game-theoretic-free-energy-principle
summary: Collective intelligence emerges across biological, physical, and artificial systems without central coordination, yet a unifying principle governing such behaviour remains elusive. The Free Energy Principle explains how individual agents adapt through variational inference, while game theory formalises strategic interactions. Here we introduce the Game-Theoretic Free Energy Principle, a unified framework showing that multi-agent systems performing local free-energy minimisation implicitly implement a stochastic game. We prove that, under bounded rationality and local information constraints, stationary points of collective free energy correspond to approximate Nash equilibria of an induced game. Conversely, a broad class of cooperative games admits a variational representation in which equilibria arise as Gibbs distributions over coalitions, establishing a bridge between Bayesian inference and strategic interaction. To characterise higher-order effects, we introduce a free-energy formulation of the Harsanyi dividend, isolating irreducible multi-agent synergy. This yields a predictive theory of cooperation, including a falsifiable non-monotonic relationship between sensory precision and agent influence. We validate this prediction across neural, biological, and artificial multi-agent systems. These results identify a common variational principle underlying inference, thermodynamics, and game-theoretic equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Game-Theoretic Free Energy Principle，统一了多智能体系统、博弈论和自由能原理，证明局部自由能最小化的稳定点对应近似纳什均衡，合作博弈可表示为Gibbs分布，并发现感觉精度与智能体影响的非单调关系。
AI.motivation: 集体智能在生物、物理和人工系统中涌现，但缺乏统一的数学解释框架。自由能原理解释个体智能体的变异推断，博弈论形式化战略互动，但两者尚未统一。
AI.method: 提出Game-Theoretic Free Energy Principle框架，证明在有限理性和局部信息约束下，集体自由能的稳定点对应近似纳什均衡；建立合作博弈的变分表示，其中均衡为联盟上的Gibbs分布；引入Harsanyi股息的自由能形式化。
AI.result: 建立了合作的可预测理论，包括感觉精度与智能体影响的非单调关系，在神经、生物和人工多智能体系统中验证了该预测。
AI.conclusion: 识别出推理、热力学和博弈论均衡背后的共同变分原理，为理解集体智能提供了统一框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about game theory, multi-agent systems, and thermodynamic free energy principles - completely outside the Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion domain. No mention of visual feature extraction, video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or any of the motion generation methods (diffusion models, VLM, etc.) in the research profile. The paper addresses theoretical foundations of multi-agent systems and Nash equilibrium, which has no connection to text-to-motion generation, quality assessment of AI-generated videos, or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output.

title: The Effects of Visual Priming on Cooperative Behavior in Vision-Language Models
summary: As Vision-Language Models (VLMs) become increasingly integrated into decision-making systems, it is essential to understand how visual inputs influence their behavior. This paper investigates the effects of visual priming on VLMs' cooperative behavior using the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma (IPD) as a test scenario. We examine whether exposure to images depicting behavioral concepts (kindness/helpfulness vs. aggressiveness/selfishness) and color-coded reward matrices alters VLM decision patterns. Experiments were conducted across multiple state-of-the-art VLMs. We further explore mitigation strategies including prompt modifications, Chain of Thought (CoT) reasoning, and visual token reduction. Results show that VLM behavior can be influenced by both image content and color cues, with varying susceptibility and mitigation effectiveness across models. These findings not only underscore the importance of robust evaluation frameworks for VLM deployment in visually rich and safety-critical environments, but also highlight how architectural and training differences among models may lead to distinct behavioral responses-an area worthy of further investigation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉语言模型(VLM)在决策场景中受视觉输入影响的行为变化，使用迭代囚徒困境(IPD)作为测试场景，探讨图像内容(善良/帮助性与攻击性/自私性)和颜色提示对VLM合作行为的影响，并评估提示修改、思维链推理和视觉标记减少等缓解策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型越来越多地集成到决策系统中，理解视觉输入如何影响其行为变得至关重要，需要评估VLM在视觉丰富的安全关键环境中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 使用迭代囚徒困境(IPD)作为测试场景，实验考察：1)展示行为概念(善良/帮助性vs攻击性/自私性)的图像；2)颜色编码的奖励矩阵；3)多种缓解策略包括提示修改、思维链(CoT)推理和视觉标记减少；在多个主流VLM上进行实验。
AI.result: VLM行为受图像内容和颜色线索的双重影响，不同模型的易感性和缓解策略有效性存在差异，表明模型架构和训练差异可能导致不同的行为反应。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调需要建立鲁棒的评估框架以确保VLM在视觉丰富和安全关键环境中的可靠部署，架构和训练差异会导致独特的行为响应，值得进一步研究。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper studies how Vision-Language Models behave in game theory decision-making scenarios (Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. While both involve VLMs, this paper focuses on VLM decision-making behavior and cooperation strategies, whereas the research profile requires VLMs for extracting visual features from 2D videos to generate 3D human motion. The methods, goals, and application domains are entirely unrelated.

title: Beyond Gaussian Bottlenecks: Topologically Aligned Encoding of Vision-Transformer Feature Spaces
summary: Modern visual world modeling systems increasingly rely on high-capacity architectures and large-scale data to produce plausible motion, yet they often fail to preserve underlying 3D geometry or physically consistent camera dynamics. A key limitation lies not only in model capacity, but in the latent representations used to encode geometric structure. We propose S$^2$VAE, a geometry-first latent learning framework that focuses on compressing and representing the latent 3D state of a scene, including camera motion, depth, and point-level structure, rather than modeling appearance alone. Building on representations from a Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), we introduce a novel type of variational autoencoder using a product of Power Spherical latent distributions, explicitly enforcing hyperspherical structure in the bottleneck to preserve directional and geometric semantics under strong compression. Across depth estimation, camera pose recovery, and point cloud reconstruction, we show that geometry-aligned hyperspherical latents consistently outperform conventional Gaussian bottlenecks, particularly in high-compression regimes. Our results highlight latent geometry as a first-class design choice for physically grounded visual and world models.

AI.tldr: S²VAE提出一种几何优先的潜在学习框架，通过超球面结构（Power Spherical分布）替代传统高斯潜在空间，在深度估计、相机姿态恢复和点云重建任务中，特别是在高压缩场景下，显著优于传统高斯瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉世界建模系统依赖大容量架构和大规模数据产生合理运动，但往往无法保留底层3D几何结构或物理一致的相机动态。关键限制不仅在于模型容量，还在于用于编码几何结构的潜在表示方法。
AI.method: 基于Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT)的表示，引入了一种新型变分自编码器，使用乘积Power Spherical潜在分布，在瓶颈处明确强制超球面结构，以在强压缩下保留方向和几何语义。
AI.result: 在深度估计、相机姿态恢复和点云重建三项任务上，几何对齐的超球面潜在表示一致优于传统高斯瓶颈，尤其在高压役压缩 regime。
AI.conclusion: 将几何 latent 作为一等公民设计选择，对于物理可匹配的视觉和世界模型具有重要意义。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D geometry understanding (depth estimation, camera pose recovery, point cloud reconstruction) using VGGT and Power Spherical VAEs. This is a fundamentally different application domain from Text-to-Motion generation in Computer Graphics. While both use Vision Transformers, this paper addresses geometric representation learning for 3D scene understanding, not motion synthesis or generation. It does not address any of the specified pain points: visual guidance extraction from videos, quality assessment for motion priors, 2D-to-3D domain bridging for motion output, or temporal motion consistency. The methods and tasks are in different domains entirely.

title: AdvDMD: Adversarial Reward Meets DMD For High-Quality Few-Step Generation
summary:
Diffusion models offer superior generation quality at the expense of extensive sampling steps.
  Distillation methods, with Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) as a popular example, can mitigate this issue, but performance degradation remains pronounced when sampling steps are limited.
  Reinforcement learning (RL) has been leveraged to improve the few-step generation quality during distillation, with the potential to even surpass the performance of the teacher model. However, existing approaches are combinatorial in nature, merely integrating an RL process with the distillation process, which introduces unnecessary complexities. To address this gap, we propose AdvDMD, a method that seamlessly unifies DMD distillation and RL.
  Specifically, AdvDMD employs the adversarially trained discriminator from DMD2 as the reward model, which assigns low scores to generated images and high scores to real ones.
  It is trained on both intermediate and final states of the denoising process and updated online with the distilled model, enabling a holistic supervision of the sampling trajectories and mitigating reward hacking.
  We adopt a unified SDE backward simulation and a different training schedule for DMD and RL to enable a more stable and efficient training.
  Experimental results demonstrate that the 4-step AdvDMD outperforms the original 40-step model for SD3.5 on DPG-Bench, while achieving significant performance gains for SD3 on the GenEval.
  On Qwen-Image, our 2-step AdvDMD achieves superior performance over TwinFlow.

AI.tldr: AdvDMD是一种将分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）与强化学习（RL）统一起来的方法，旨在解决扩散模型采样步骤多的问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型生成质量好但需要大量采样步骤；蒸馏方法虽能减少采样步骤，但在有限步骤下性能下降严重；现有RL方法只是简单组合蒸馏和RL，引入不必要复杂性。
AI.method: AdvDMD使用DMD2的对抗训练判别器作为奖励模型，对生成图像给低分、对真实图像给高分；在去噪过程的中间和最终状态上训练并与蒸馏模型在线更新；采用统一的SDE反向模拟和不同的训练调度。
AI.result: 4步AdvDMD在DPG-Bench上超越SD3.5的40步原始模型；在GenEval上显著提升SD3性能；2步AdvDMD在Qwen-Image上优于TwinFlow。
AI.conclusion: AdvDMD成功统一了DMD蒸馏和RL，实现了少步数采样下超越教师模型的性能，为高效扩散模型采样提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about image generation using diffusion models (AdvDMD for few-step image generation), while the research profile is specifically about Text-to-Motion in Computer Graphics - generating 3D human motion. Even though both use diffusion models, they are in completely different application domains: Image Generation vs. Human Motion Generation. This is exactly what the evaluation criteria warn about - using the same method in different application domains should be considered different. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to motion generation, visual guidance feature extraction from video, or bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output.

title: MoCapAnything V2: End-to-End Motion Capture for Arbitrary Skeletons
summary: Recent methods for arbitrary-skeleton motion capture from monocular video follow a factorized pipeline, where a Video-to-Pose network predicts joint positions and an analytical inverse-kinematics (IK) stage recovers joint rotations. While effective, this design is inherently limited, since joint positions do not fully determine rotations and leave degrees of freedom such as bone-axis twist ambiguous, and the non-differentiable IK stage prevents the system from adapting to noisy predictions or optimizing for the final animation objective. In this work, we present the first fully end-to-end framework in which both Video-to-Pose and Pose-to-Rotation are learnable and jointly optimized. We observe that the ambiguity in pose-to-rotation mapping arises from missing coordinate system information: the same joint positions can correspond to different rotations under different rest poses and local axis conventions. To resolve this, we introduce a reference pose-rotation pair from the target asset, which, together with the rest pose, not only anchors the mapping but also defines the underlying rotation coordinate system. This formulation turns rotation prediction into a well-constrained conditional problem and enables effective learning. In addition, our model predicts joint positions directly from video without relying on mesh intermediates, improving both robustness and efficiency. Both stages share a skeleton-aware Global-Local Graph-guided Multi-Head Attention (GL-GMHA) module for joint-level local reasoning and global coordination. Experiments on Truebones Zoo and Objaverse show that our method reduces rotation error from ~17 degrees to ~10 degrees, and to 6.54 degrees on unseen skeletons, while achieving ~20x faster inference than mesh-based pipelines. Project page: https://animotionlab.github.io/MoCapAnythingV2/

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个端到端的任意骨骼动作捕捉框架，将Video-to-Pose和Pose-to-Rotation统一为可学习模块，通过引入参考pose-rotation对解决姿态到旋转的歧义问题，实现从单目视频直接预测关节旋转。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用分解管道（Video-to-Pose + 解析IK），但存在两个关键限制：(1)关节位置不能完全确定旋转，存在骨骼轴扭转等自由度歧义；(2)非可微的IK阶段无法反向传播优化最终动画目标。这限制了系统的精度和适应性。
AI.method: 提出首个完全端到端框架：(1)引入参考pose-rotation对定义旋转坐标系，将旋转预测转化为有约束的条件问题；(2)使用共享的Global-Local Graph-guided Multi-Head Attention (GL-GMHA)模块进行关节级局部推理和全局协调；(3)直接从视频预测关节位置，不依赖网格中间表示，提高鲁棒性和效率。两阶段可联合优化。
AI.result: 在Truebones Zoo和Objaverse数据集上，旋转误差从~17度降至~10度，未知骨骼达6.54度，推理速度比网格管道提升~20倍。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实现任意骨骼动作捕捉的端到端学习，通过参考pose-rotation对和GL-GMHA模块有效解决了姿态到旋转映射的歧义问题，显著提升了精度和效率，为单目视频动作捕捉提供新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses "Video-to-Motion" (extracting 3D motion from video), while the research profile focuses on "Text-to-Motion" (generating 3D motion from text). Although both deal with 3D motion generation and share some methodological similarities (bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output), the input modality is fundamentally different. The paper addresses pain points #1 (extracting visual features from 2D video) and #3 (bridging 2D→3D domain gap), but does not address text-based motion generation or diffusion-based motion synthesis, which are key to the research profile. It's in the same general Computer Graphics domain but different input-output paradigm.

title: Splitting Assumption-Based Argumentation Frameworks
summary: Assumption-Based Argumentation (ABA) is a well-established formalism for modelling and reasoning over debates, with a wide range of applications. However, the high computational complexity of core reasoning tasks in ABA poses a significant challenge for its applicability. This issue is further aggravated when ABA frameworks (ABAFs) are instantiated into graph-based argumentation formalisms, such as Dung's Argumentation Frameworks (AFs) and Argumentation Frameworks with Collective Attacks (SETAFs). In knowledge representation and reasoning, a key strategy to address computational intractability is to optimise reasoning over a given knowledge base through divide-and-conquer algorithms. A paradigmatic example of this approach is splitting, where extensions of a given framework are computed incrementally, by restricting the search space to sub-frameworks only, and then combining the obtained results. This approach has been successfully applied to AFs, for which also a parametrised version has been introduced under stable semantics. However, the exponential growth produced by the instantiation might undermine the usefulness of splitting on the argument graphs induced by ABAFs. To address this issue, our work investigates the concept of splitting on the knowledge base rather than on its graph-based instantiation. Furthermore, we generalise splitting to its parametrised version for ABAFs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究假设基论证(ABA)中的分割(splitting)概念，通過在知識庫層面而非圖形化實例化層面應用分割策略來解決計算複雜性問題，並將分割推廣到参数化版本。
AI.motivation: ABA框架的核心推理任務具有極高的計算複雜性，當ABA框架被實例化為圖形論證形式（如Dung的AFs和SETAFs）時，這一問題更加嚴重。現有的分割方法在論證圖上可能因指數級增長而失去效用。
AI.method: 提出在知識庫層面而非圖形實例化層面進行分割的策略，並將分割推廣到ABA框架的参数化版本。
AI.result: 通過在知識庫層面應用分割技術，可以有效規避圖形實例化帶來的指數級膨脹問題，為ABA框架提供了更高效的推理方法。
AI.conclusion: 這項工作為解決ABA框架計算複雜性問題提供了新的思路，通過知識庫層面的分割策略和参数化推廣，有望顯著提升ABA系統的實用性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Assumption-Based Argumentation (ABA) frameworks in formal AI/logic - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion. It deals with computational complexity in logical argumentation systems, not motion generation, video synthesis, or any visual/motion tasks. Zero methodological or application overlap with the research profile.

title: 3D-ReGen: A Unified 3D Geometry Regeneration Framework
summary: We consider the problem of regenerating 3D objects from 2D images and initial 3D shapes. Most 3D generators operate in a one-shot fashion, converting text or images to a 3D object with limited controllability. We introduce instead 3D-ReGen, a 3D regenerator that is conditioned on an initial 3D shape. This conceptually simple formulation allows us to support numerous useful tasks, including 3D enhancement, reconstruction, and editing. 3D-ReGen uses a new conditioning mechanism based on VecSet, which allows the regenerator to update or improve the input geometry with consistent fine-grained details. 3D-ReGen learns a widely applicable regeneration prior from off-the-shelf 3D datasets via self-supervised pretext tasks and augmentations, without additional annotations. We evaluate both the geometric consistency and fine-grained quality of 3D-ReGen, achieving state-of-the-art performance in controllable 3D generation across several tasks.

AI.tldr: 3D-ReGen 是一个基于初始3D形状进行条件化的3D再生器，支持3D增强、重建和编辑等任务，使用VecSet条件化机制从无标注3D数据集中学习再生先验，在可控制的3D生成任务上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成器大多以单次方式将文本或图像转换为3D对象，可控性有限。需要一种支持多种任务（3D增强、重建、编辑）的可控制3D再生方法。
AI.method: 提出3D-ReGen框架，采用新的VecSet条件化机制，使用自监督 pretext 任务和增强从现成3D数据集中学习广泛适用的再生先验，无需额外标注。
AI.result: 在几何一致性和细粒度质量方面均取得先进性能，在多个可控3D生成任务上达到最优效果。
AI.conclusion: VecSet条件化机制使再生器能够一致地更新或改进输入几何形状，3D-ReGen展示了一种概念简单但效果优异的可控3D生成方法。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D geometry/object regeneration (generating 3D meshes and shapes), which is fundamentally different from Text-to-Motion generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text). The application domain mismatch is critical: the research profile focuses on human motion generation with temporal consistency, while this paper focuses on 3D object shape enhancement and reconstruction. Although both use diffusion-based methods, they address completely different output domains - 3D object geometry vs. 3D motion trajectories. The paper does not address any of the pain points: extracting visual guidance from video, bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion, or ensuring temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: From LLM-Driven Trading Card Generation to Procedural Relatedness: A Pokémon Case Study
summary:
Since the dawn of Trading Card Games, the genre has grown into a multi-billion-dollar industry engaging millions of analog and digital players worldwide. Popular TCGs rely on regular updates, balance adjustments, and rotating constraints to sustain engagement. Yet, as metagames stabilize, predictable strategies dominate and viable card options diminish, often resulting in repetitive and impaired player experiences.
  This paper investigates the use of Large Language Models and Image Diffusion Models for Procedural Content Generation of TCG cards, addressing these challenges by enabling a personalized infinity of card designs. Modern generative AI not only enables large-scale content creation but could even introduce procedural relatedness, fostering unique connections between players and their cards. We present a pipeline combining player-centric co-creation, fine-tuned embeddings, local LLMs, and Diffusion Models to generate dynamic, personalized cards while potentially expanding creative range.
  We evaluated the pipeline in a user study with 49 participants who generated 196 Pokémon card samples. Participants rated aesthetics and representativeness of visuals and mechanics, and provided qualitative feedback. Results show high satisfaction and indicate that most participants successfully realized their own ideas through prompt adjustments. These findings lay groundwork for future content generation systems and alternatives to conventional metagame evolution through procedural relatedness.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨利用大型语言模型和图像扩散模型进行集换式卡牌游戏（TCG）卡片的程序化内容生成，旨在解决传统TCG中元游戏僵化、策略可预测性高、玩家体验重复等问题。研究团队设计了一套结合玩家协同创作、精细化嵌入、本地LLM和扩散模型的pipeline，并通过49名用户生成196张宝可梦卡牌样本进行评估。
AI.motivation: 集换式卡牌游戏虽然是一个价值数十亿美元、吸引全球数百万玩家的产业，但随着元游戏的稳定，可预测的策略开始主导局面，可行的卡牌选项逐渐减少，导致玩家体验变得重复且受损。研究旨在利用生成式AI创造个性化的无限卡牌设计，并引入程序化关联性来增强玩家与卡牌之间的独特联系。
AI.method: 研究团队开发了一个结合玩家中心协同创作、精细化嵌入、本地大型语言模型和图像扩散模型的pipeline，用于生成动态、个性化的卡牌设计。该pipeline允许玩家通过提示调整来实现自己的创意想法。研究通过用户研究进行评估，49名参与者共生成196张宝可梦卡牌样本，参与者对视觉美学和代表性、机械设计进行评分，并提供定性反馈。
AI.result: 评估结果显示参与者满意度很高，表明大多数参与者能够通过提示调整成功实现自己的想法。玩家对视觉美学和代表性评分较高，机械设计也获得积极评价。定性反馈进一步支持了这些发现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为未来的内容生成系统奠定了基础，展示了通过程序化关联性替代传统元游戏演化的可能性。这种生成式AI方法不仅能够实现大规模内容创作，还能引入程序化关联性，为TCGs提供传统平衡调整和轮换机制之外的替代方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about generating Trading Card Game (TCG) images using LLMs and image diffusion models - a completely different application domain. The research profile requires Text-to-Motion (3D human motion generation), not image generation. Even though both use diffusion models, motion generation and image generation are distinctly different application domains in computer graphics. The paper does not address any of the motion-specific pain points (visual feature extraction from videos, 2D-to-3D domain gap, temporal consistency in motion generation).

title: Beyond Pixel Fidelity: Minimizing Perceptual Distortion and Color Bias in Night Photography Rendering
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing
summary: Night Photography Rendering (NPR) poses a significant challenge due to the extreme contrast between dark and illuminated areas in scenes, stemming from concurrent capture of severely dark regions alongside intense point light sources. Existing methods, which are mainly tailored for fidelity metrics, reveal considerable perceptual gaps and often detract from visual quality. We introduce pHVI-ISPNet, a novel RAW-to-RGB framework built on the robust HVI color space. Our network integrates four distinct key refinements: RAW-domain feature processing and Wavelet-based feature propagation to mitigate high-frequency detail loss; sample-based dynamic loss coefficients to ensure stable learning across varying exposure levels; and loss term based on feature distributions to maintain rigorous color constancy. Evaluations on the dataset introduced in the NTIRE 2025 challenge on NPR confirm our approach achieves competitive fidelity while establishing new state-of-the-art results in both CIE2000 color difference and LPIPS. This validates our perceptually-driven design for high-quality nighttime imaging.

AI.tldr: pHVI-ISPNet是一种新型的RAW到RGB夜间摄影渲染框架，基于HVI色彩空间，通过RAW域特征处理、基于小波的特征传播、样本级动态损失系数和特征分布损失项四个关键改进来实现高质量夜间成像。
AI.motivation: 夜间摄影渲染面临极端对比度挑战，现有方法主要针对保真度指标，存在显著的感知差距，往往降低视觉质量。
AI.method: 1) RAW域特征处理与小波特征传播，减少高频细节损失；2) 样本级动态损失系数，确保在不同曝光水平下稳定学习；3) 基于特征分布的损失项，保持严格的颜色恒定性。
AI.result: 在NTIRE 2025夜间摄影挑战赛数据集上验证，取得了具有竞争力的保真度，并在CIE2000色差和LPIPS指标上达到最新最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 验证了感知驱动设计在高画质夜间成像中的有效性，pHVI-ISPNet在颜色准确性和感知质量方面表现优异。

relevance_reason: This paper is about night photography rendering (RAW to RGB image processing), which is completely different from Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is image enhancement for low-light photography, not 3D human motion synthesis. The pain points, methods, and expected outputs have no alignment with the research profile. A paper about "image rendering/processing" is entirely unrelated to "text-to-motion" even if both might use some neural network techniques.

title: D3-Gym: Constructing Real-World Verifiable Environments for Data-Driven Discovery
summary: Despite recent progress in language models and agents for scientific data-driven discovery, further advancing their capabilities is held back by the absence of verifiable environments representing real-world scientific tasks.To fill this gap, we introduce D3-Gym, the first automatically constructed dataset with verifiable environments for scientific Data-Driven Discovery. D3-Gym comprises (1) 565 tasks sourced from 239 real scientific repositories across four disciplines where (2) each task is equipped with a natural language instruction, an executable environment with pre-installed dependencies, input dataset and artifact previews, a reference code solution, and an automatically synthesized evaluation script. Rigorous evaluation of the quality of the verification signal in D3-Gym confirms that our evaluation scripts achieve 87.5% agreement with human-annotated gold standards and strong alignment in domain-specific evaluation logic, showing their scientific soundness. Further, training on trajectories sampled from D3-Gym yields consistent and substantial gains across Qwen3 models of varying sizes on ScienceAgentBench, boosting Qwen3-32B by 7.8 absolute points and substantially shrinking the gap with strong proprietary models. All D3-Gym artifacts (environments, creation workflow, trajectories, and models) can be found at https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/D3-Gym.

AI.tldr: D3-Gym: 首个用于科学数据驱动发现的可验证环境数据集，包含565个任务，来自239个真实科学仓库，每个任务配备自然语言指令、可执行环境、参考代码和自动合成评估脚本，在Qwen3-32B模型上提升7.8个百分点。
AI.motivation: Despite recent progress in language models and agents for scientific data-driven discovery, further advancing their capabilities is held back by the absence of verifiable environments representing real-world scientific tasks.
AI.method: D3-Gym is introduced - the first automatically constructed dataset with verifiable environments for scientific Data-Driven Discovery. It comprises 565 tasks sourced from 239 real scientific repositories across four disciplines. Each task is equipped with a natural language instruction, an executable environment with pre-installed dependencies, input dataset and artifact previews, a reference code solution, and an automatically synthesized evaluation script.
AI.result: Rigorous evaluation confirms that evaluation scripts achieve 87.5% agreement with human-annotated gold standards and strong alignment in domain-specific evaluation logic. Training on trajectories sampled from D3-Gym yields consistent and substantial gains across Qwen3 models of varying sizes on ScienceAgentBench, boosting Qwen3-32B by 7.8 absolute points and substantially shrinking the gap with strong proprietary models.
AI.conclusion: D3-Gym provides a comprehensive benchmark for training and evaluating scientific data-driven discovery agents, with verified artifacts and evaluation scripts that align with human annotations.

relevance_reason: This paper is about creating verifiable environments for scientific data-driven discovery tasks using language models and agents. It addresses a completely different application domain - it's about LLM agents for scientific tasks, not about text-to-motion generation in computer graphics. The field, methods, and application are entirely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on extracting visual features from 2D videos for 3D human motion generation.

title: Exploring Interaction Paradigms for LLM Agents in Scientific Visualization
summary: This paper examines how different types of large language model (LLM) agents perform on scientific visualization (SciVis) tasks, where users generate visualization workflows from natural-language instructions. We compare three primary interaction paradigms, including domain-specific agents with structured tool use, computer-use agents, and general-purpose coding agents, by evaluating eight representative agents across 15 benchmark tasks and measuring visualization quality, efficiency, robustness, and computational cost. We further analyze interaction modalities, including code scripts and model context protocol (MCP) or API calls for structured tool use, as well as command-line interfaces (CLI) and graphical user interfaces (GUI) for more general interaction, while additionally studying the effect of persistent memory in selected agents. The results reveal clear tradeoffs across paradigms and modalities. General-purpose coding agents achieve the highest task success rates but are computationally expensive, while domain-specific agents are more efficient and stable but less flexible. Computer-use agents perform well on individual steps but struggle with longer multi-step workflows, indicating that long-horizon planning is their primary limitation. Across both CLI- and GUI-based settings, persistent memory improves performance over repeated trials, although its benefits depend on the underlying interaction mode and the quality of feedback. These findings suggest that no single approach is sufficient, and future SciVis systems should combine structured tool use, interactive capabilities, and adaptive memory mechanisms to balance performance, robustness, and flexibility.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了三大类LLM智能体（领域专用智能体、计算机使用智能体、通用编码智能体）在科学可视化任务上的表现，通过8个智能体在15个基准任务上的评测，发现通用编码智能体任务成功率最高但计算成本高，领域专用智能体效率高且稳定但灵活性差，计算机使用智能体擅长单步操作但长流程规划能力不足，持久内存可提升重复任务表现，但效果取决于交互模式和反馈质量。
AI.motivation: 随着自然语言处理技术的发展，如何利用LLM智能体自动生成科学可视化工作流成为重要研究方向。不同类型的智能体采用不同的交互范式，各有优劣势，但目前缺乏系统性的对比评测研究。
AI.method: 研究对比了三类交互范式：领域专用智能体（结构化工具使用）、计算机使用智能体、通用编码智能体；评估维度包括可视化质量、效率、鲁棒性和计算成本；分析了多种交互模态（代码脚本、MCP/API调用、CLI/GUI）以及持久内存的影响。
AI.result: 通用编码智能体任务成功率最高但计算成本昂贵；领域专用智能体更高效稳定但灵活性不足；计算机使用智能体在单步操作表现好但长流程规划是主要瓶颈；持久内存可改善重复任务表现，但效果依赖交互模式和反馈质量。
AI.conclusion: 没有单一方法能满足所有需求，未来科学可视化系统应结合结构化工具使用、交互能力和自适应内存机制，以平衡性能、鲁棒性和灵活性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agents for scientific visualization workflows, which is a completely different field from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. It does not address any of the pain points: visual guidance feature extraction from 2D video, quality assessment for AI-generated videos for motion prior, bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output, or temporal consistency in 3D motion generation. The methods are also unrelated - it focuses on agent interaction paradigms (domain-specific agents, computer-use agents, coding agents) rather than video generation models, VLM for visual feature extraction, or diffusion-based motion synthesis. Despite both containing "visualization," the application domains are entirely different (LLM agent automation vs. 3D human motion generation).

title: PhyCo: Learning Controllable Physical Priors for Generative Motion
summary: Modern video diffusion models excel at appearance synthesis but still struggle with physical consistency: objects drift, collisions lack realistic rebound, and material responses seldom match their underlying properties. We present PhyCo, a framework that introduces continuous, interpretable, and physically grounded control into video generation. Our approach integrates three key components: (i) a large-scale dataset of over 100K photorealistic simulation videos where friction, restitution, deformation, and force are systematically varied across diverse scenarios; (ii) physics-supervised fine-tuning of a pretrained diffusion model using a ControlNet conditioned on pixel-aligned physical property maps; and (iii) VLM-guided reward optimization, where a fine-tuned vision-language model evaluates generated videos with targeted physics queries and provides differentiable feedback. This combination enables a generative model to produce physically consistent and controllable outputs through variations in physical attributes-without any simulator or geometry reconstruction at inference. On the Physics-IQ benchmark, PhyCo significantly improves physical realism over strong baselines, and human studies confirm clearer and more faithful control over physical attributes. Our results demonstrate a scalable path toward physically consistent, controllable generative video models that generalize beyond synthetic training environments.

AI.tldr: PhyCo是一个将物理一致性控制引入视频生成的整体框架，通过100K+仿真视频数据集、物理监督微调和VLM奖励优化，使扩散模型能够生成物理一致且可控制的视频输出。
AI.motivation: 现代视频扩散模型在外观合成方面表现优秀，但在物理一致性方面仍存在困难：物体漂移、碰撞缺乏真实反弹、材质响应与属性不匹配等问题。
AI.method: 提出三组件方案：(1)大规模仿真视频数据集，包含摩擦、恢复力、变形和力的系统变化；(2)使用ControlNet进行物理监督微调，像素级物理属性图作为条件；(3)VLM引导的奖励优化，视觉语言模型评估生成视频并提供可微分反馈。
AI.result: 在Physics-IQ基准上显著提升物理真实感，人类研究确认对物理属性有更清晰和忠实的控制，证明可扩展路径超越合成训练环境的物理一致可控生成视频模型。
AI.conclusion: PhyCo为视频扩散模型引入连续、可解释、物理基础的控制提供了可行方案，通过结合大规模仿真数据、物理监督微调和VLM反馈优化，实现了无需推理时模拟器或几何重建的物理一致性生成。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain - Paper is about 2D video generation with physical consistency, not 3D Text-to-Motion. Although both use diffusion models and VLMs, PhyCo generates 2D video frames while the research profile needs 3D human motion generation. The "motion" in this paper refers to physical motion in videos (object movement, physics simulation), not skeletal motion for characters. This is a similar method (diffusion) but completely different output domain (2D video vs 3D motion).

title: A Pattern Language for Resilient Visual Agents
comment: Accepted to the 23rd International Conference on Software Architecture (ICSA 2026), New and Emerging Ideas Track. 5 pages, 1 figure
summary: Integrating multimodal foundation models into enterprise ecosystems presents a fundamental software architecture challenge. Architects must balance competing quality attributes: the high latency and non-determinism of vision language action (VLA) models versus the strict determinism and real-time performance required by enterprise control loops. In this study, we propose an architectural pattern language for visual agents that separates fast, deterministic reflexes from slow, probabilistic supervision. It consists of four architectural design patterns: (1) Hybrid Affordance Integration, (2) Adaptive Visual Anchoring, (3) Visual Hierarchy Synthesis, and (4) Semantic Scene Graph.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向视觉智能体的架构模式语言，通过分离快速的确定性反射与慢速的概率性监督来解决多模态基础模型与企业控制系统的集成难题，包含四种设计模式：混合感知集成、自适应视觉锚定、视觉层次合成和语义场景图。
AI.motivation: 将多模态基础模型集成到企业生态系统中面临架构挑战，需要平衡VLA模型的高延迟与非确定性特性与企业在控制回路中所需的严格确定性和实时性能之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 提出了一个包含四种架构设计模式的模式语言：(1)混合感知集成 (2)自适应视觉锚定 (3)视觉层次合成 (4)语义场景图，用于分离快速确定性反射与慢速概率性监督。
AI.result: 通过该架构模式语言，视觉智能体可以同时满足企业控制系统的实时 deterministic 需求和 VLA 模型的 probabilistic 推理需求。
AI.conclusion: 该架构模式语言为企业系统架构师提供了在多模态AI能力与严格企业控制系统要求之间取得平衡的实用指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about software architecture patterns for integrating visual language models (VLA) into enterprise control systems, focusing on separating deterministic reflexes from probabilistic supervision. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's about enterprise system integration, not 3D motion generation from video or text. The methods mentioned (visual anchoring, scene graphs) are architectural patterns for AI agents, not motion synthesis or diffusion models for human motion.

title: SpecVQA: A Benchmark for Spectral Understanding and Visual Question Answering in Scientific Images
summary: Spectra are a prevalent yet highly information-dense form of scientific imagery, presenting substantial challenges to multimodal large language models (MLLMs) due to their unstructured and domain-specific characteristics. Here we introduce SpecVQA, a professional scientific-image benchmark for evaluating multimodal models on scientific spectral understanding, covering 7 representative spectrum types with expert-annotated question-answer pairs. The aim comprises two aspects: spectra scientific QA evaluation and corresponding underlying task evaluation. SpecVQA contains 620 figures and 3100 QA pairs curated from peer-reviewed literature, targeting both direct information extraction and domain-specific reasoning. To effectively reduce token length while preserving essential curve characteristics, we propose a spectral data sampling and interpolation reconstruction approach. Ablation studies further confirm that the approach achieves substantial performance improvements on the proposed benchmark. We test the capability of prominent MLLMs in scientific spectral understanding on our benchmark and present a leaderboard. This work represents an essential step toward enhancing spectral understanding in multimodal large models and suggests promising directions for extending visual-language models to broader scientific research and data analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SpecVQA，一个专门用于评估多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在科学光谱理解方面能力的基准测试数据集。该基准涵盖7种代表性光谱类型，包含620幅图谱和3100个问答对，均来自同行评审文献。论文还提出了一种光谱数据采样和插值重建方法来在保持曲线特征的同时减少token长度，并对主流MLLMs进行了测试。
AI.motivation: 光谱是一种信息密集但难以解析的科学图像形式，当前多模态大语言模型在处理这种非结构化、领域特定的科学图像时存在显著困难，缺乏专门的评估基准来衡量模型的光谱理解能力。
AI.method: 1) 构建了SpecVQA基准数据集，包含7种光谱类型、620幅图谱和3100个QA对，全部来自同行评审文献；2) 提出光谱数据采样与插值重建方法以减少token长度同时保留关键曲线特征；3) 在该基准上测试了多个主流MLLMs并建立排行榜。
AI.result: 消融研究确认所提出的方法在SpecVQA基准上实现了显著的性能提升，同时提供了现有主流MLLMs在科学光谱理解方面的能力评估排行榜。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为增强多模态大语言模型的光谱理解能力提供了重要基础，并指出了将视觉-语言模型扩展到更广泛科学研究和数据分析的有前景方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about scientific spectral image understanding and Visual Question Answering for multi-modal large language models. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. While both mention "Vision Language Models," the application domains are completely different: this paper deals with understanding scientific spectrum charts from papers, while the research profile focuses on extracting visual features from video sequences to generate 3D human motion. There is zero overlap in the actual application domain.

title: AEGIS: A Holistic Benchmark for Evaluating Forensic Analysis of AI-Generated Academic Images
summary: We introduce AEGIS, A holistic benchmark for Evaluating forensic analysis of AI-Generated academic ImageS. Compared to existing benchmarks, AEGIS features three key advances: (1) Domain-Specific Complexity: covering seven academic categories with 39 fine-grained subtypes, exposing intrinsic forensic difficulty, where even GPT-5.1 reaches 48.80% overall performance and expert models achieve only limited localization accuracy (IoU 30.09%); (2) Diverse Forgery Simulations: modeling four prevalent academic forgery strategies across 25 generative models, with 11 yielding average forensic accuracy below 50%, showing that forensics lag behind generative advances; and (3) Multi-Dimensional Forensic Evaluation: jointly assessing detection, reasoning, and localization, revealing complementary strengths between model families, with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) at 84.74% accuracy in textual artifact recognition and expert detectors peaking at 79.54% accuracy in binary authenticity detection. By evaluating 25 leading MLLMs, nine expert models, and one unified multimodal understanding and generation model, AEGIS serves as a diagnostic testbed exposing fundamental limitations in academic image forensics.

AI.tldr: AEGIS是一个评估AI生成学术图像取证的holistic benchmark，包含领域特定复杂性（7个学术类别39个子类）、多样化伪造模拟（25个生成模型4种策略）和多维取证评估（检测、推理、定位），揭示当前取证方法的基础性局限。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试缺乏领域特定的复杂性、多样化的伪造模拟和多维取证评估，需要一个全面综合的基准来暴露学术图像取证的fundamental limitations。
AI.method: 评估了25个领先的多模态大语言模型、9个专家模型和1个统一的多模态理解与生成模型，涵盖七个学术类别39个细分子类、25个生成模型和四种学术伪造策略。
AI.result: GPT-5.1仅达到48.80%整体性能，专家模型IoU仅30.09% localization accuracy，11个生成模型平均取证准确率低于50%，显示当前取证技术落后于生成技术的进步。
AI.conclusion: AEGIS作为诊断测试平台，揭示了当前学术图像取证的基础性局限性。多模态大语言模型在文本伪造识别达84.74%准确率，而专家检测器在二进制真实性检测上峰值达79.54%，显示不同模型家族间存在互补优势。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Paper is about AI-generated image forensics/detection (identifying fake images), while research profile is about Text-to-Motion generation (converting 2D visual inputs to 3D human motion). Even though both may use diffusion models, the goal and domain are entirely different - one detects fake images, the other generates human motion.

title: Stop Holding Your Breath: CT-Informed Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Bronchoscopy
summary: Bronchoscopic navigation relies on registering endoscopic video to a preoperative CT scan, but respiratory motion deforms the airway by 5-20 mm, creating CT-to-body divergence that limits localization accuracy. In practice, this is mitigated through breath-hold protocols, which attempt to match the intraoperative anatomy to a static CT, but are difficult to reproduce and disrupt clinical workflow. We propose to eliminate the need for breath-hold protocols by leveraging patient-specific respiratory modeling. Paired inhale-exhale CT scans, already acquired for planning, implicitly define the patient-specific deformation space of the breathing airway. By registering these scans, we reduce respiratory motion to a single scalar breathing phase per frame, constraining all reconstructions to anatomically observed configurations. We embed this representation within a mesh-anchored Gaussian splatting framework, where a lightweight estimator infers breathing phase directly from endoscopic RGB, enabling continuous, deformation-aware reconstruction throughout the respiratory cycle without breath-holds or external sensing. To enable quantitative evaluation, we introduce RESPIRE, a physically grounded bronchoscopy simulation pipeline with per-frame ground truth for geometry, pose, breathing phase, and deformation. Experiments on RESPIRE show that our approach achieves geometrically faithful reconstruction, over 20x faster training, and 1.22 mm target localization accuracy (within the 3mm clinically relevant tolerances) outperforming unconstrained single-CT baselines. Please check out our website for additional visuals: https://asdunnbe.github.io/RESPIRE/

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于患者特定呼吸建模的支气管镜导航方法，利用成对的吸气和呼气CT扫描来定义呼吸变形的患者特定空间，将呼吸运动简化为单一标量呼吸相位，并嵌入到网格锚定的Gaussian splatting框架中，实现连续、无需屏息的变形感知重建，在RESPIRE数据集上实现了1.22mm的定位精度（临床相关容差为3mm），训练速度提升20倍以上。
AI.motivation: 呼吸运动可使气道变形5-20mm，导致CT与实际解剖之间的差异，限制了定位精度。现有的屏息协议难以重复执行且扰乱临床工作流程。
AI.method: 利用已采集的成对吸气和呼气CT扫描来隐式定义患者特定的呼吸变形空间。通过注册这些扫描，将呼吸运动简化为每个帧的单一标量呼吸相位，将所有重建约束到解剖学上观察到的配置。将该表示嵌入到网格锚定的Gaussian splatting框架中，轻量级估计器直接从内镜RGB推断呼吸相位，实现整个呼吸周期连续的变形感知重建，无需屏息或外部传感。为定量评估引入RESPIRE，这是一个具有每帧几何、姿态、呼吸相位和变形真实值模型的物理 grounded支气管镜模拟管道。
AI.result: 在RESPIRE数据集上的实验表明，该方法实现了几何保真的重建，训练速度提升20倍以上，1.22mm的目标定位精度（在3mm临床相关容差内），优于无约束的单CT基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过患者特定呼吸建模消除对屏息协议的需求，在保持临床相关容差的同时实现了准确的支气管镜导航重建。RESPIRE数据集和代码已公开可用。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于医学影像/支气管镜导航，使用CT扫描进行患者呼吸变形建模和内镜导航，与Text-to-Motion（文本到3D人体动作生成）完全不同。虽然都涉及"3D"和"运动"概念，但医学中的呼吸运动变形建模与人类动作生成是完全不同的领域。方法上使用Gaussian Splatting进行3D重建，而非文本到动作生成或视频引导的动作合成。没有任何关于视觉特征提取、视频语言模型、扩散模型动作合成等该研究 profile 所需的方法。

title: Visual Generation in the New Era: An Evolution from Atomic Mapping to Agentic World Modeling
summary: Recent visual generation models have made major progress in photorealism, typography, instruction following, and interactive editing, yet they still struggle with spatial reasoning, persistent state, long-horizon consistency, and causal understanding. We argue that the field should move beyond appearance synthesis toward intelligent visual generation: plausible visuals grounded in structure, dynamics, domain knowledge, and causal relations. To frame this shift, we introduce a five-level taxonomy: Atomic Generation, Conditional Generation, In-Context Generation, Agentic Generation, and World-Modeling Generation, progressing from passive renderers to interactive, agentic, world-aware generators. We analyze key technical drivers, including flow matching, unified understanding-and-generation models, improved visual representations, post-training, reward modeling, data curation, synthetic data distillation, and sampling acceleration. We further show that current evaluations often overestimate progress by emphasizing perceptual quality while missing structural, temporal, and causal failures. By combining benchmark review, in-the-wild stress tests, and expert-constrained case studies, this roadmap offers a capability-centered lens for understanding, evaluating, and advancing the next generation of intelligent visual generation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了视觉生成模型的五级分类体系(原子生成、条件生成、上下文生成、主体生成、世界模型生成)，从被动渲染器向交互式、主体感知的生成器演进，并分析了技术驱动因素和评估方法。呼吁从外观合成转向智能视觉生成。动机旨在建立五级分类体系以推动领域从被动渲染向智能生成演进。方法采用分类学框架结合基准审查和案例研究。结果识别出当前评估过度强调感知质量而忽视结构性缺陷。结论为视觉生成领域应从静态图像生成转向具有空间推理、持久状态和因果理解能力的智能系统。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉生成模型虽在 photorealism、typography、指令遵循和交互编辑方面取得进展，但在空间推理、持久状态、长时间一致性和因果理解方面存在不足。作者认为领域应从"外观合成"转向"智能视觉生成"，即基于结构、动力学、领域知识和因果关系的合理视觉。提出五级分类体系作为框架来指导这一转变。
AI.method: 论文采用五级分类学框架(Atomic、Conditional、In-Context、Agentic、World-Modeling Generation)进行分析，并结合基准审查、实际压力测试和专家约束的案例研究。通过分析关键技术驱动因素包括flow matching、统一理解和生成模型、改进的视觉表示、post-training、reward modeling、数据策展、合成数据蒸馏和采样加速。
AI.result: 当前评估方法存在缺陷，常高估进展，因为强调感知质量而忽视结构、时间和因果失败。研究揭示了模型在空间推理、持久状态保持、长时间一致性理解和因果关系推理方面的系统性不足。
AI.conclusion: 视觉生成领域需要从被动渲染器向交互式、主体感知的生成器转变。五级分类体系为理解、评估和推进下一代智能视觉生成系统提供了以能力为中心的视角。需要关注空间推理、持久状态、长期一致性和因果理解等核心能力的发展。

relevance_reason: The paper is about VISUAL GENERATION (2D image/video synthesis), while the research profile is specifically about TEXT-TO-MOTION (3D human motion generation). These are completely different application domains - one generates 2D images/videos, the other generates 3D character motion. Even though the paper discusses diffusion models and temporal consistency, these are in the context of 2D visual content generation, not 3D motion synthesis. The pain points are orthogonal - this paper addresses spatial reasoning for image generation, not extracting visual features from 2D video for 3D motion extraction or bridging 2D-to-3D motion domains.

title: RHyVE: Competence-Aware Verification and Phase-Aware Deployment for LLM-Generated Reward Hypotheses
summary: Large language models (LLMs) make reward design in reinforcement learning substantially more scalable, but generated rewards are not automatically reliable training objectives. Existing work has focused primarily on generating, evolving, or selecting reward candidates, while paying less attention to when such candidates can be verified and deployed during policy optimization. We study this deployment-time problem by treating generated rewards as reward hypotheses whose utility depends on the competence of the current policy and the phase of training. We propose \textsc{RHyVE}, a competence-aware verification and phase-aware deployment protocol that compares small sets of reward hypotheses from shared policy checkpoints using short-horizon fork verification. Our experiments show that reward rankings are unreliable at low competence but become informative after task-dependent thresholds. On a sparse manipulation task, phase-aware deployment improves peak and retained performance under a locked protocol. Updated LLM-generated reward-candidate experiments show candidate-family-dependent behavior: generated pools can exhibit phase-dependent winner changes, but no fixed warm-up schedule is universally optimal. Held-out schedule selection, conservative selector baselines, compute-matched controls, and scale controls further show that \textsc{RHyVE} is best understood as a verification-informed deployment protocol rather than a universal scheduler. Dense and all-failure boundary experiments delimit the scope of the method. Together, these results suggest that reward generation and reward deployment should be studied as coupled problems: generated rewards must be verified and deployed under changing policy competence.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM生成的奖励在强化学习中的部署时机问题，提出RHyVE协议通过 competence-aware验证和phase-aware部署来处理生成的奖励假设。
AI.motivation: 现有工作侧重于生成、进化或选择奖励候选，但较少关注这些候选在策略优化过程中的验证和部署时机。
AI.method: 提出RHyVE方法：一种 competence-aware验证和 phase-aware部署协议，使用短视野分叉验证从共享策略检查点比较小集奖励假设。
AI.result: 奖励排名在低能力时不可靠，在任务相关阈值后变得可信息；在稀疏操作任务中，phase-aware部署提高了峰值和保留性能；生成的奖励池表现出phase-dependent winner变化，但没有固定的warm-up schedule是普遍最优的。
AI.conclusion: 奖励生成和奖励部署应该作为耦合问题来研究：生成的奖励必须在不断变化的策略能力下进行验证和部署。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-generated reward hypotheses for reinforcement learning (RL), focusing on competence-aware verification and phase-aware deployment protocols. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation. The application domains are entirely different: RL training procedures vs. 3D human motion generation from text/video. No mention of vision-language models for visual feature extraction, 2D-to-3D domain bridging, temporal motion consistency, or any computer graphics methodology.

title: Representation Fréchet Loss for Visual Generation
comment: Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/Jiawei-Yang/FD-loss
summary: We show that Fréchet Distance (FD), long considered impractical as a training objective, can in fact be effectively optimized in the representation space. Our idea is simple: decouple the population size for FD estimation (e.g., 50k) from the batch size for gradient computation (e.g., 1024). We term this approach FD-loss. Optimizing FD-loss reveals several surprising findings. First, post-training a base generator with FD-loss in different representation spaces consistently improves visual quality. Under the Inception feature space, a one-step generator achieves0.72 FID on ImageNet 256x256. Second, the same FD-loss repurposes multi-step generators into strong one-step generators without teacher distillation, adversarial training or per-sample targets. Third, FID can misrank visual quality: modern representations can yield better samples despite worse Inception FID. This motivates FDr$^k$, a multi-representation metric. We hope this work will encourage further exploration of distributional distances in diverse representation spaces as both training objectives and evaluation metrics for generative models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FD-loss方法，通过解耦FD估计的群体规模（如50k）与梯度计算的批量规模（如1024），使Fréchet Distance可作为训练目标优化。实验表明该方法在多种表示空间中提升图像质量，单步生成器在ImageNet 256x256上达到0.72 FID，并揭示了FID可能误排视觉质量的问题，提出FDr^k多表示度量。
AI.motivation: Fréchet Distance（FD）长期被认为不适合作为训练目标，因其需要大规模样本估算而实际不可行。现有FID指标主要用于评估但未用于训练，且FID可能无法准确反映人类感知的视觉质量。
AI.method: 提出FD-loss方法：1）解耦群体规模（估计FD所需50k样本）与批量规模（梯度计算1024样本）；2）在不同表示空间（Inception等）中进行训练；3）提出FDr^k多表示度量替代单一FID。
AI.result: 1）在Inception表示空间下，单步生成器在ImageNet 256x256达到0.72 FID；2）FD-loss可将多步生成器转化为强单步生成器，无需教师蒸馏或对抗训练；3）揭示现代表示空间可产出更好样本尽管Inception FID更差，证明FID可能误排视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 在多样表示空间中探索分布距离作为生成模型的训练目标和评估指标具有重要价值，FD-loss方法为生成模型训练提供了新思路，FDr^k度量更全面评估生成质量。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual/image generation (2D ImageNet generation), NOT Text-to-Motion or 3D motion generation. While it discusses Fréchet Distance and diffusion models, the application domain is completely different - it's about improving image generation quality metrics, not about generating human motion from text/video. This is a fundamental field mismatch (Computer Vision/Image Generation vs Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion).

title: Characterizing the Consistency of the Emergent Misalignment Persona
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) on narrowly misaligned data generalizes to broadly misaligned behavior, a phenomenon termed emergent misalignment (EM). While prior work has found a correlation between harmful behavior and self-assessment in emergently misaligned models, it remains unclear how consistent this correspondence is across tasks and whether it varies across fine-tuning domains. We characterize the consistency of the EM persona by fine-tuning Qwen 2.5 32B Instruct on six narrowly misaligned domains (e.g., insecure code, risky financial advice, bad medical advice) and administering experiments including harmfulness evaluation, self-assessment, choosing between two descriptions of AI systems, output recognition, and score prediction. Our results reveal two distinct patterns: coherent-persona models, in which harmful behavior and self-reported misalignment are coupled, and inverted-persona models, which produce harmful outputs while identifying as aligned AI systems. These findings reveal a more fine-grained picture of the effects of emergent misalignment, calling into question the consistency of the EM persona.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型在窄域错位数据上微调后出现的突发错位(EM)现象，发现模型表现出两种不同的人格模式：有连贯人格模型（有害行为与自我报告错位一致）和倒置人格模型（产生有害输出但自认为对齐）。
AI.motivation: 探究突发错位(EM)人格的一致性，特别是有害行为与自我评估之间的对应关系是否在不同任务和微调域中保持一致。
AI.method: 在六个窄域错位数据（不安全代码、风险金融建议、不当医疗建议等）上微调Qwen 2.5 32B Instruct，并进行有害性评估、自我评估、系统描述选择、输出识别和分数预测等实验。
AI.result: 发现两种模式：coherent-persona models（有害行为与自我报告错位相耦合）和inverted-persona models（产生有害输出但自认为是对齐AI系统）。
AI.conclusion: EM人格一致性存在问题，揭示了突发错位效应的更细粒度图景，对EM人格一致性提出质疑。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Large Language Model (LLM) safety and alignment - specifically studying emergent misalignment in Qwen 2.5 32B after fine-tuning on narrow-domain misalignment data. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, video generation, 3D motion synthesis, or diffusion-based motion generation. The application domain is completely different: it's in the field of AI safety/NLP, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: Generalizable Sparse-View 3D Reconstruction from Unconstrained Images
summary: Reconstructing 3D scenes from sparse, unposed images remains challenging under real-world conditions with varying illumination and transient occlusions. Existing methods rely on scene-specific optimization using appearance embeddings or dynamic masks, which requires extensive per-scene training and fails under sparse views. Moreover, evaluations on limited scenes raise questions about generalization. We present GenWildSplat, a feed-forward framework for sparse-view outdoor reconstruction that requires no per-scene optimization. Given unposed internet images, GenWildSplat predicts depth, camera parameters, and 3D Gaussians in a canonical space using learned geometric priors. An appearance adapter modulates appearance for target lighting conditions, while semantic segmentation handles transient objects. Through curriculum learning on synthetic and real data, GenWildSplat generalizes across diverse illumination and occlusion patterns. Evaluations on PhotoTourism and MegaScenes benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art feed-forward rendering quality, achieving real-time inference without test-time optimization

AI.tldr: GenWildSplat是一种前馈框架，用于从稀疏、无姿态的互联网图像进行3D场景重建，无需每场景优化即可实现实时高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 从稀疏、无姿态的互联网图像重建3D场景在现实世界条件下面临挑战，现有方法需要针对特定场景进行优化，泛化能力有限。现有方法依赖场景特定的优化，使用外观嵌入或动态掩码，需要广泛的每场景训练，并且在稀疏视图下失败。此外，有限场景的评估引发了关于泛化的问题。
AI.method: GenWildSplat，一个用于稀疏视图室外重建的前馈框架，无需每场景优化。给定无姿态的互联网图像，GenWildSplat使用学习的几何先验预测深度、相机参数和3D高斯分布的规范空间。外观适配器调节目标光照条件的外观，而语义分割处理瞬态目标。通过在合成和真实数据上的课程学习，GenWildSplat泛化到不同的光照和遮挡模式。
AI.result: 在PhotoTourism和MegaScenes基准测试上的评估展示了最先进的前馈渲染质量，实现实时推理，无需测试时优化。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需每场景优化的前馈3D重建方法，能够在稀疏视图和不同光照条件下实现高质量的实时渲染，具有良好的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D SCENE reconstruction from sparse-view images (outdoor scenesbuildings in PhotoTourism/MegaScenes), completely different from Text-to-Motion. The application domain is 3D scene reconstruction (static environments), not human motion generation. Methods used (3D Gaussian splatting for scenes) are for scene rendering, not motion synthesis. None of the pain points are addressed - not about extracting visual guidance for motion, not about bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion, not about temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: HERMES++: Toward a Unified Driving World Model for 3D Scene Understanding and Generation
comment: Extended version of ICCV 25 paper HERMES, Code: https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2, Project page: https://h-embodvis.github.io/HERMESV2/
summary: Driving world models serve as a pivotal technology for autonomous driving by simulating environmental dynamics. However, existing approaches predominantly focus on future scene generation, often overlooking comprehensive 3D scene understanding. Conversely, while Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive reasoning capabilities, they lack the capacity to predict future geometric evolution, creating a significant disparity between semantic interpretation and physical simulation. To bridge this gap, we propose HERMES++, a unified driving world model that integrates 3D scene understanding and future geometry prediction within a single framework. Our approach addresses the distinct requirements of these tasks through synergistic designs. First, a BEV representation consolidates multi-view spatial information into a structure compatible with LLMs. Second, we introduce LLM-enhanced world queries to facilitate knowledge transfer from the understanding branch. Third, a Current-to-Future Link is designed to bridge the temporal gap, conditioning geometric evolution on semantic context. Finally, to enforce structural integrity, we employ a Joint Geometric Optimization strategy that integrates explicit geometric constraints with implicit latent regularization to align internal representations with geometry-aware priors. Extensive evaluations on multiple benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our method. HERMES++ achieves strong performance, outperforming specialist approaches in both future point cloud prediction and 3D scene understanding tasks. The model and code will be publicly released at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2.

AI.tldr: HERMES++是一个统一驾驶世界模型,将3D场景理解与未来几何预测集成在单一框架中,解决大型语言模型(LLM)缺乏预测几何演变能力的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型方法主要关注未来场景生成,往往忽略综合3D场景理解;而大型语言模型虽然展示出令人印象深刻的推理能力,但缺乏预测未来几何演变的能力,在语义理解和物理模拟之间存在显著差距。
AI.method: 提出四个关键设计:(1)BEV表示将多视图空间信息整合成与LLM兼容的结构;(2)LLM增强的世界查询促进理解分支的知识迁移;(3)当前到未来链接(Current-to-Future Link)桥接时间间隙,将几何演化置于语义上下文条件下;(4)联合几何优化策略,将显式几何约束与隐式潜在正则化相结合,使内部表征与几何感知先验对齐。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上进行广泛评估,HERMES++在未来的点云预测和3D场景理解任务中均优于专家方法,实现了强大的性能。
AI.conclusion: HERMES++成功地将3D场景理解与未来几何预测统一在单一框架中,通过协同设计弥合了语义解释与物理模拟之间的差距,为自动驾驶环境模拟提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving world models (3D scene understanding and point cloud prediction for driving), completely unrelated to the Text-to-Motion domain (human motion generation from visual/text inputs). Different application domain entirely - no relevance to human motion synthesis.

title: Splitting Argumentation Frameworks with Collective Attacks and Supports
comment: Extended version of a paper presented at the 23rd International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning July 20-23, 2026 - Lisbon, Portugal, 27 pages
summary: This work proposes novel splitting techniques for argumentation formalisms that incorporate supports between defeasible elements. We base our studies on bipolar set-based argumentation frameworks (BSAFs) which generalize argumentation frameworks with collective attacks (SETAFs), as well as bipolar argumentation frameworks (BAFs), by incorporating both collective attacks and supports. Notably, BSAFs establish a crucial link to structured argumentation as they naturally capture general (potentially non-flat) assumption-based argumentation. The increase in expressiveness calls for diverse forms of splitting. We consider splits over collective attacks (thereby generalizing the recently proposed splitting techniques for SETAFs), splits over collective supports, as well as splits over both collective attacks and supports. We establish suitable splitting schemata and prove their correctness for the most common argumentation semantics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了包含集体攻击和支持的双极集合论证框架(BSAFs)的新型分裂技术，推广了SETAFs和BAFs，并建立了适用于各种论证语义的分裂模式。
AI.motivation: 论证形式主义的表达能力增强，需要多样化的分裂形式来处理集体攻击和支持的组合
AI.method: 基于双极集合论证框架，提出三类分裂技术：集体攻击分裂、集体支持分裂、以及两者的组合分裂
AI.result: 建立了合适的分裂模式并证明了其对主流论证语义(common argumentation semantics)的正确性
AI.conclusion: 为包含集体攻击和支持的复杂论证框架提供了系统的分裂方法

relevance_reason: The paper is about formal argumentation frameworks in AI/knowledge representation - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. It deals with collective attacks and supports in abstract argumentation theory, not video generation, motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or any 3D motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - from formal logic to computer graphics/motion generation. Zero methodological overlap with the required methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLM, video generation models, etc.).

title: Normativity and Productivism: Ableist Intelligence? A Degrowth Analysis of AI Sign Language Translation Tools for Deaf People
comment: Paper submitted and accepted to IJES 2026
summary:
Sign languages, of any geographical or accentual variation, understandably face continuous scrutiny under the ever present popularity of verbal dictation and audism. Through this, many potential problems arise with the current lack of accessible communication for those who rely on such sign languages for essential conversation. Such AI systems regularly take the form of recognition and interpretation models, designed to provide seamless and accurate translation. In reality these systems are built from biased data and created without any input from deaf communities. Such models are widely used and accepted by their hearing counterparts who remain ignorant to the inherent culture, semantics and colloquial language present in gestural language systems.
  This phenomenon is best analysed under the scope of The Technological System and Technological bluff by Ellul. Indeed, what is at play here is the standardization of language by technicians into what can be captured by technique: data, statistics, a mathematical language. For that AI technique to exist, sign language must be rationalized, in a search for profit that annihilates the conditions for communication and fails to capture the human experience of the deaf person. By that process, it presents normative effects, creating a model of Man, standardized, massified, and who has to adapt to the tool and technical milieu instead of the other way around, which we assume should have been the goal of such a technology.
  Technique thus reshapes what it means to be human, to submit deaf people to the goals of productivity and efficiency. In doing so, it exhibits clear counter productivity, alienating instead of emancipating, isolating instead of nourishing human relationships. Therefore this paper argues for the idea of AI as Ableist Intelligence, as such systems seek to emphasise the humiliated and marginalised nature of sign.

AI.tldr: 本文批判了手语AI翻译系统的本质，认为这些系统看似是为聋人社区服务，实则是将手语理性化和标准化为数据的过程，导致反生产力后果。作者运用Ellul的技术系统理论，分析AI如何将手语扭曲为可捕获的技术数据，忽视了手语的文化内涵和人类体验，最终成为压迫聋人群体的" Ableist Intelligence"（能力歧视智能）。
AI.motivation: 手语AI系统在实际应用中面临根本性问题：这些系统建立在偏见数据基础上，完全没有聋人社区的参与，却又被 hearing 群体广泛接受和使用。本文试图揭示这一技术进步表象下的权力不对等和语言文化压迫问题。
AI.method: 采用Jacques Ellul的技术哲学框架（技术系统和技术 bluff 概念），结合批判性技术研究和残疾研究视角，对手语AI系统进行哲学分析。
AI.result: 识别出手语AI系统的核心问题在于：技术理性化过程将手语简化为数据和统计，忽视了手势语言的文化内在性、语义丰富性和口语变体；这种标准化模型要求聋人适应技术工具而非技术服务于人；最终导致反生产力——疏离而非解放，孤立而非促进人类关系。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出"AI as Ableist Intelligence"（能力歧视智能）这一概念，认为手语AI系统本质上强化了手语的被贬低和边缘化地位，而非真正解放聋人群体；技术应当服务于人的需求，而非让人适应技术的标准化要求。

title: Intern-Atlas: A Methodological Evolution Graph as Research Infrastructure for AI Scientists
summary: Existing research infrastructure is fundamentally document-centric, providing citation links between papers but lacking explicit representations of methodological evolution. In particular, it does not capture the structured relationships that explain how and why research methods emerge, adapt, and build upon one another. With the rise of AI-driven research agents as a new class of consumers of scientific knowledge, this limitation becomes increasingly consequential, as such agents cannot reliably reconstruct method evolution topologies from unstructured text. We introduce Intern-Atlas, a methodological evolution graph that automatically identifies method-level entities, infers lineage relationships among methodologies, and captures the bottlenecks that drive transitions between successive innovations. Built from 1,030,314 papers spanning AI conferences, journals, and arXiv preprints, the resulting graph comprises 9,410,201 semantically typed edges, each grounded in verbatim source evidence, forming a queryable causal network of methodological development. To operationalize this structure, we further propose a self-guided temporal tree search algorithm for constructing evolution chains that trace the progression of methods over time. We evaluate the quality of the resulting graph against expert-curated ground-truth evolution chains and observe strong alignment. In addition, we demonstrate that Intern-Atlas enables downstream applications in idea evaluation and automated idea generation. We position methodological evolution graphs as a foundational data layer for the emerging automated scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Intern-Atlas，一个方法论演进图谱,自动识别方法级实体、推断方法论间的谱系关系,并捕获推动连续创新的瓶颈节点。该图谱基于1,030,314篇AI论文构建,包含9,410,201条语义边,可作为自动化科学发现的基础数据层。
AI.motivation: 现有研究基础设施以文档为中心,仅提供论文间的引用链接,缺乏对方法论演进的显式表示。无法捕捉研究方法如何出现、适应和相互建立的结构化关系。随着AI驱动研究agent成为新的科学知识消费者,这一局限愈发严重,因为这些agent无法从非结构化文本中可靠地重构方法演进拓扑。
AI.method: 1.构建方法论演进图谱Intern-Atlas:自动识别方法级实体;推断方法论间的谱系关系;捕获驱动连续创新的瓶颈;基于1,030,314篇AI论文(会议、期刊、arXiv预印本)构建图谱,包含9,410,201条语义边,每条边基于原文证据。2.提出自引导时序树搜索算法:构建演进链,追踪方法随时间的演进过程。
AI.result: 1.在专家标注的真实演进链上进行评估,表现出强对齐。2.支持下游应用:想法评估和自动化想法生成。
AI.conclusion: 方法论演进图谱可作为新兴自动化科学发现的基础数据层,使AI系统能够追踪方法的演化轨迹,为idea评估和生成提供结构化支持。

The paper deals with identifying methodological entities and building semantic graphs from research papers, which has zero connection to the research profile's pain points about bridging 2D visual representations to 3D motion output, temporal consistency in motion generation, or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: LLM as Clinical Graph Structure Refiner: Enhancing Representation Learning in EEG Seizure Diagnosis
comment: This paper is accepted by the 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-ECAI 2026)
summary: Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals are vital for automated seizure detection, but their inherent noise makes robust representation learning challenging. Existing graph construction methods, whether correlation-based or learning-based, often generate redundant or irrelevant edges due to the noisy nature of EEG data. This significantly impairs the quality of graph representation and limits downstream task performance. Motivated by the remarkable reasoning and contextual understanding capabilities of large language models (LLMs), we explore the idea of using LLMs as graph edge refiners. Specifically, we propose a two-stage framework: we first verify that LLM-based edge refinement can effectively identify and remove redundant connections, leading to significant improvements in seizure detection accuracy and more meaningful graph structures. Building on this insight, we further develop a robust solution where the initial graph is constructed using a Transformer-based edge predictor and multilayer perceptron, assigning probability scores to potential edges and applying a threshold to determine their existence. The LLM then acts as an edge set refiner, making informed decisions based on both textual and statistical features of node pairs to validate the remaining connections. Extensive experiments on TUSZ dataset demonstrate that our LLM-refined graph learning framework not only enhances task performance but also yields cleaner and more interpretable graph representations.

AI.tldr: 提出使用大型语言模型(LLM)作为图边细化器来改进EEG信号癫痫检测的两阶段框架。第一阶段使用Transformer边预测器和MLP构建初始图，第二阶段利用LLM基于文本和统计特征验证和细化边连接。
AI.motivation: EEG信号对自动癫痫检测至关重要，但其固有噪声使得稳健的表示学习具有挑战性。现有的图构建方法(基于相关性或学习的方法)经常生成冗余或不相关的边，严重影响图表示质量和下游任务性能。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段使用Transformer边预测器和多层感知器(MLP)构建初始图，为潜在边分配概率分数并应用阈值确定边的存在；第二阶段LLM作为边集细化器，基于节点对的文本和统计特征做出决策来验证剩余连接。
AI.result: 在TUSZ数据集上的广泛实验表明，LLM优化的图学习框架不仅提高了任务性能，还产生了更清晰、更可解释的图表示。
AI.conclusion: 验证了LLM边细化可以有效识别和去除冗余连接，显著提高癫痫检测精度并产生更有意义的图结构。

relevance_reason: The paper is completely unrelated to the research field. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion (generating 3D human motion from video/text inputs), while this paper is about EEG signal processing for medical seizure diagnosis. The application domains are completely different - one deals with human motion generation in computer graphics, the other deals with clinical medical signal analysis. There's no connection to video generation models, visual feature extraction, 3D motion generation, or any aspect of text-to-motion synthesis. The only superficial similarity is that both mention "transformer" but the purposes are entirely different.

title: Synthetic Computers at Scale for Long-Horizon Productivity Simulation
summary:
Realistic long-horizon productivity work is strongly conditioned on user-specific computer environments, where much of the work context is stored and organized through directory structures and content-rich artifacts. To scale synthetic data creation for such productivity scenarios, we introduce Synthetic Computers at Scale, a scalable methodology for creating such environments with realistic folder hierarchies and content-rich artifacts (e.g., documents, spreadsheets, and presentations). Conditioned on each synthetic computer, we run long-horizon simulations: one agent creates productivity objectives that are specific to the computer's user and require multiple professional deliverables and about a month of human work; another agent then acts as that user and keeps working across the computer -- for example, navigating the filesystem for grounding, coordinating with simulated collaborators, and producing professional artifacts -- until these objectives are completed.
  In preliminary experiments, we create 1,000 synthetic computers and run long-horizon simulations on them; each run requires over 8 hours of agent runtime and spans more than 2,000 turns on average. These simulations produce rich experiential learning signals, whose effectiveness is validated by significant improvements in agent performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain productivity evaluations. Given that personas are abundant at billion scale, this methodology can in principle scale to millions or even billions of synthetic user worlds with sufficient compute, enabling broader coverage of diverse professions, roles, contexts, environments, and productivity needs. We argue that scalable synthetic computer creation, together with at-scale simulations, is highly promising as a foundational substrate for agent self-improvement and agentic reinforcement learning in long-horizon productivity scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"规模化合成计算机"(Synthetic Computers at Scale)方法,通过大规模创建带有真实文件夹层级和内容丰富工件(文档、电子表格、演示文稿等)的合成计算机环境,在此基础上运行长周期模拟仿真。模拟中,一个智能体为目标用户创建需要约一个月工作的生产性目标,另一个智能体则扮演用户完成这些目标。实验表明,这些仿真产生的经验学习信号能显著提升智能体在生产力任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现实长周期生产力任务的训练强烈依赖于用户特定的计算机环境(目录结构、内容丰富的工件等),但获取大规模真实训练数据成本高昂且存在隐私问题。传统合成数据方法难以生成足够真实的计算机环境来模拟实际工作场景。
AI.method: 提出规模化合成计算机方法:1)创建具有真实文件夹层级和内容丰富工件(文档、电子表格、演示文稿等)的合成计算机环境;2)在每个合成计算机上运行长周期模拟:一个智能体创建针对该计算机用户的生产力目标(需要多月工作),另一个智能体扮演用户完成目标,包括文件系统导航、协调模拟协作者、生产专业工件等。
AI.result: 创建1000台合成计算机并运行长周期模拟，每轮需要超过8小时智能体运行时间,平均超过2000轮交互。实验表明，这些仿真产生丰富的经验学习信号,在领域内和领域外的生产力评估任务上都带来显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 规模化合成计算机创建方法具有高度可扩展性(可扩展到百万甚至十亿级合成用户环境),为长周期生产力场景下的智能体自我改进和智能体强化学习提供了有前景的基础框架。未来可覆盖更多样化的职业、角色、环境和生产力需求。

It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion. No motion generation, no video-to-motion, no 3D kinematics, no computer graphics concepts are involved.

title: Culture-inspired Multi-modal Color Palette Generation and Colorization: A Chinese Youth Subculture Case
comment: accepted by the 3rd IEEE Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Art Creation
summary: Color is an essential component of graphic design, acting not only as a visual factor but also carrying cultural implications. However, existing research on algorithmic color palette generation and colorization largely ignores the cultural aspect. In this paper, we contribute to this line of research by first constructing a unique color dataset inspired by a specific culture, i.e., Chinese Youth Subculture (CYS), which is an vibrant and trending cultural group especially for the Gen Z population. We show that the colors used in CYS have special aesthetic and semantic characteristics that are different from generic color theory. We then develop an interactive multi-modal generative framework to create CYS-styled color palettes, which can be used to put a CYS twist on images using our automatic colorization model. Our framework is illustrated via a demo system designed with the human-in-the-loop principle that constantly provides feedback to our algorithms. User studies are also conducted to evaluate our generation results.

AI.tldr: 本文关注算法色彩生成中的文化因素，针对中国青年亚文化（CYS）构建独特色彩数据集并开发交互式多模态生成框架，实现CYS风格色彩palette自动生成和图像色彩化，通过人机-loop演示系统和用户研究进行评估
AI.motivation: 现有算法色彩palette生成和色彩化研究大多忽略色彩的文化层面，仅关注视觉因素。作者认为色彩具有重要的文化内涵，特别是中国青年亚文化作为_gen Z群体中充满活力的Trending文化群体，其色彩使用具有独特的审美和语义特征
AI.method: 研究方法包括：构建CYS色彩数据集→开发交互式多模态生成框架→设计自动色彩化模型→构建人机-loop演示系统→开展用户研究评估
AI.result: 构建了CYS色彩数据集证明了CYS色彩具有不同于通用色彩理论的特殊审美和语义特征开发了交互式多模态生成框架可自动创建CYS风格色彩palette并实现图像色彩化设计了人机-loop演示系统并通过用户研究验证了生成效果
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献了三个核心成果：1）首个基于中国青年亚文化（CYS）的独特色彩数据集；2）交互式多模态生成框架用于创建CYS风格色彩配色；3）结合人机交互原理的演示系统及用户研究评估。为算法色彩生成领域引入了文化维度。)

These are entirely different application domains - one deals with temporal motion synthesis while the other deals with color design. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to motion generation, visual-to-motion bridging, or temporal consistency in motion synthesis.
